🎯

本周核心方向（ML × ferro / 凝聚态）

4 篇

新材料：单层d1T相MoS₂被预测为兼具铁电性的高阶拓扑绝缘体，其能隙内存在非零轨道霍尔电导平台，且铁电极化翻转可调控σᴼᴴˣ的正负号，为电场可控轨道电子学提供首候选材料。新方法：AlScN极化反转研究采用DFT结合机器学习分子动力学，首次系统揭示Sc浓度-电场相空间内畴壁介导反转的完整图景；压电DC-DC变换器则提出环形-点形压电变压器的运动电流检测法，以事件驱动控制实现零电压开关与硬件简化。新现象：AlScN中过大晶格应变抑制集体反转，预存畴壁通过应变释放主导低场KAI渐进推进与高场非线性成核生长的转变；自旋电子神经形态硬件中，3 ns脉冲驱动矩形轨道横畴壁模拟ReLU神经元，10 ns脉冲于波纹HM/FM轨道半圆形凹槽实现阶跃式突触权重量子化。

  1. 01
    基于畴壁神经元与量子化突触的自旋电子神经形态硬件
    Spintronic Neuromorphic Hardware Using Domain Wall Based Neurons and Quantized Synapses
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作模拟了利用自旋轨道力矩自旋电子器件实现人工神经元和突触的功能，并构建了全连接人工神经网络。神经元ReLU激活函数通过3 ns电流脉冲驱动矩形磁纳米轨道中的横畴壁运动模拟；突触则采用波纹HM/FM纳米轨道中10 ns电流脉冲诱导的畴壁动力学，利用半圆形凹槽实现可控钉扎，形成阶跃式运动和稳定突触权重电导。该工作围绕畴壁动力学神经形态计算展开，详情需查阅原文。

    📐 方法要点：自旋轨道力矩驱动畴壁动力学：3 ns脉冲矩形磁轨道横畴壁模拟ReLU神经元，10 ns脉冲波纹HM/FM轨道凹槽钉扎实现阶跃式突触电导。

    🔗 相关工作关联：延续畴壁神经形态计算路线，区别于磁隧道结或斯格明子方案，以电流脉冲时长-几何结构协同实现模拟-离散混合计算。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为全自旋电子神经网络提供器件级物理实现，但3 ns/10 ns脉冲精度要求及热稳定性需电路级验证。

    阅读原文 ↗
  2. 02
    高阶拓扑绝缘体中铁电极化调控的轨道霍尔电导：d1T相单层MoS₂
    Ferroelectric polarization controlled orbital Hall conductivity in a higher-order topological insulator: d1T-phase monolayer MoS₂
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作预测单层d1T相过渡金属硫族化合物MoS₂是一种兼具铁电特性的高阶拓扑绝缘体，明确展示了非平庸拓扑指标及带隙内具有量子化分数电荷的角态特征。研究发现该体系能隙内存在非零轨道霍尔电导平台，可作为识别高阶拓扑系统的标志；更重要的是，铁电极化方向能够调控轨道霍尔电导σᴼᴴˣ的正负号，为实现外电场可控的轨道电子学提供了理论基础和材料候选。

    📐 方法要点：第一性原理计算结合对称性分析，构建d1T-MoS₂铁电-高阶拓扑统一模型，计算轨道霍尔电导张量随极化方向演化。

    🔗 相关工作关联：拓展铁电拓扑材料库，区别于已知二维铁电如In₂Se₃或1T'-WTe₂，首次将轨道霍尔响应作为高阶拓扑的可观测探针。

    💡 对你方向的启示：确立σᴼᴴˣ符号翻转作为极化方向读取的电学手段，为无耗散轨道电子学器件奠定材料基础。

    阅读原文 ↗
  3. 03
    铁电AlScN中畴壁介导的极化反转：应变释放与场依赖动力学
    Domain-Wall Mediated Polarization Switching in Ferroelectric AlScN: Strain Relief and Field-Dependent Dynamics
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：结合DFT与机器学习分子动力学，研究了不同Sc浓度与电场下AlScN的极化反转机制。结果表明过大晶格应变阻止集体反转，而预存畴壁释放应变并主导反转：低场下遵循Kolmogorov-Avrami-Ishibashi模型的畴壁渐进推进，高场下伴随成核驱动同时非线性成核生长的快速均匀反转，凸显畴工程作为降低矫顽场的可行路径。

    📐 方法要点：DFT-机器学习势函数驱动大规模分子动力学，追踪Al₁₋ₓScₓN（x=0.25-0.5）在不同电场下的极化反转原子路径。

    🔗 相关工作关联：突破传统相场或单纯DFT的时空尺度限制，与实验观测的AlScN低矫顽场形成机制直接对话。

    💡 对你方向的启示：定量证明预存畴壁降低矫顽场的物理根源为应变释放，指导铁电存储器通过畴工程优化写入电压。

    阅读原文 ↗
  4. 04
    压电谐振器DC-DC变换器的运动电流检测方法与简化闭环控制策略
    Motional-Current-Sensing Method and Simplified Closed-Loop Control Strategy for Piezoelectric-Resonator-based DC-DC Converters
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作提出环形-点形压电变压器的运动电流检测方法，具有低延迟、低损耗和本征隔离特性，并证明其对压电陶瓷和电路实现的多种非理想因素具有鲁棒性。基于此引入事件驱动控制策略，仅包含有限状态机、PI环、低速ADC和若干比较器；在降压PR变换器上的实验验证实现了开关周期内所有转换的零电压开关，并降低了硬件复杂度。

    📐 方法要点：环形-点形压电变压器运动电流检测，以本征隔离低延迟传感替代传统电阻采样，事件驱动有限状态机+PI闭环控制。

    🔗 相关工作关联：针对压电谐振器DC-DC变换器的控制瓶颈，区别于电感-电容谐振方案的电流模式控制架构。

    💡 对你方向的启示：实现全开关周期零电压开关与硬件复杂度降低，推动压电功率集成向高频高密度方向实用化。

    阅读原文 ↗
01

本周总览#

先把握一周的主线，再进入交叉重点与专题全文速览。

整体概览

本周Nature/Science系列期刊中，磁性/铁电领域呈现交错磁性（altermagnetism）研究爆发态势，涵盖理论分类、输运效应、超导耦合及材料预测；多层镍酸盐超导机制与铜氧化物的对应关系获ARPES直接验证；AI/ML方面，材料发现自动化（自主实验、生成模型、主动学习）与科学机器学习（物理信息神经网络、神经算子、ML原子势）持续深化，量子计算与神经网络的交叉探索活跃。

趋势观察

交错磁性（altermagnetism）成为本周最突出的研究热点，从对称性分类、非微扰输运效应到约瑟夫森器件和超导配对对称性，形成完整研究链条；多层镍酸盐超导机制通过ARPES与铜氧化物建立直接对应，氧轨道角色获实验确认；AI驱动材料自主实验取得标志性进展，Qumus系统实现全周期自动化；机器学习原子势向量子蒙特卡洛精度升级，主动学习策略将数据需求降至10²-10³量级；物理信息神经网络与神经算子在PDE求解中持续演进，但工程外推能力仍存根本局限。

后续展望

交错磁性向实用化自旋电子器件的转化需解决材料稳定性和界面工程挑战；AI自主实验系统将从演示走向规模化材料发现，与生成模型和主动学习形成闭环；量子精度机器学习势有望扩展至更复杂关联电子体系，但费米能级对齐等带电缺陷处理仍是瓶颈。

02

交叉研究#

优先覆盖 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料的直接交叉工作。

01

基于CNN的自旋动力学模拟磁态自动识别分类器#

CNN-Based Classifier for Automated Identification of Magnetic States in Spin Dynamics Simulations
📚 arXiv👤 Amal Aldarawsheh, Ahmed Alia, Stefan Blügel📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将EfficientNetV1B0卷积神经网络引入自旋纹理识别领域，突破了传统依赖人工判读磁态的局限，首次实现九种复杂磁态（含反铁磁斯格明子等）的高通量自动分类。该方法为大规模自旋动力学数据挖掘
该工作提出采用EfficientNetV1B0卷积神经网络自动分类九种不同磁态（包括铁磁和反铁磁自旋纹理如反铁磁斯格明子和反铁磁条带畴）。通过Spirit代码进行原子自旋动力学模拟生成自旋组态，经VFRendering可视化产生RGB图像作为分类模型输入，为复杂自旋纹理的自动识别提供了深度学习方法。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出采用EfficientNetV1B0卷积神经网络自动分类九种不同磁态（包括铁磁和反铁磁自旋纹理如反铁磁斯格明子和反铁磁条带畴）。通过Spirit代码进行原子自旋动力学模拟生成自旋组态，经VFRendering可视化产生RGB图像作为分类模型输入，为复杂自旋纹理的自动识别提供了深度学习方法。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22125v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The identification and classification of different magnetic states are essential for understanding the complex behavior of magnetic systems. Traditional approaches that rely on handcrafted features or manual inspection often fall short, particularly when dealing with subtle or topologically complex spin textures. In this study, we present an automated deep learning model that employs an EfficientNetV1B0 Convolutional Neural Network to classify nine distinct magnetic states, including both ferromagnetic (FM) and antiferromagnetic (AFM) spin textures such as AFM skyrmions and AFM stripe domains. The spin configurations are generated through atomistic spin dynamics simulations using the Spirit code, then visualized with VFRendering to produce RGB images, which serve as inputs to the classification model.

02

基于畴壁神经元与量子化突触的自旋电子神经形态硬件#

Spintronic Neuromorphic Hardware Using Domain Wall Based Neurons and Quantized Synapses
📚 arXiv👤 Sakshi Kiran Bandekar, Arnab Ganguly, Debanjan Polley, Debasis Das📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将畴壁动力学与神经形态计算融合，以自旋轨道力矩驱动纳米磁结构实现ReLU神经元与量子化突触，构建全连接神经网络。其意义在于为后摩尔时代高能效、非冯·诺依曼架构的自旋电子神经芯片提供了可扩
该工作模拟了利用自旋轨道力矩自旋电子器件实现人工神经元和突触的功能，并构建了全连接人工神经网络。神经元ReLU激活函数通过3 ns电流脉冲驱动矩形磁纳米轨道中的横畴壁运动模拟；突触则采用波纹HM/FM纳米轨道中10 ns电流脉冲诱导的畴壁动力学，利用半圆形凹槽实现可控钉扎，形成阶跃式运动和稳定突触权重电导。该工作围绕畴壁动力学神经形态计算展开，详情需查阅原文。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作模拟了利用自旋轨道力矩自旋电子器件实现人工神经元和突触的功能，并构建了全连接人工神经网络。神经元ReLU激活函数通过3 ns电流脉冲驱动矩形磁纳米轨道中的横畴壁运动模拟；突触则采用波纹HM/FM纳米轨道中10 ns电流脉冲诱导的畴壁动力学，利用半圆形凹槽实现可控钉扎，形成阶跃式运动和稳定突触权重电导。该工作围绕畴壁动力学神经形态计算展开，详情需查阅原文。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22625v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In this work, we simulate the functionality of artificial neuron and synapse using spin-orbit torque-based spintronic devices and implemented a fully connected artificial neural netwrok (ANN). These neuro-synaptic devices are emulated using transverse domain wall dynamics in a rectangular magnetic nanotrack comprised of heavy metal/ferromagnet (HM/FM) heterostructures. The ReLU activation function of the neuron has been mimicked using the domain wall motion induced by a 3 ns current pulse. The synapse has been modelled using current-induced domain wall (DW) dynamics through a corrugated HM/FM nanotrack under the influence of a 10 ns current pulse with varying current density. The semicircular corrugations are in the form of notches, which are symmetrically located on both sides of the nanotrack. By applying 10 ns current pulses of varying densities, we achieve controlled DW pinning, revealing a step-like motion caused by temporary pauses at each pinning center. The electrical conductance of the pinned DW across various pinning points, act as stable synaptic weights for our ANN. Furthermore, we observe a threshold-dependent delay effect where each depinning event is influenced by previous ones, successfully mimicking synaptic memory and adaptability in neuromorphic systems. The fully connected ANN has been modeled using the conventional float32 synaptic weights for the MNIST and Fashion MNIST datasets with an accuracy of ~97 % and ~86 %, respectively, which serves as a test bed of our neuromorphic simulations. With the aim of implementing a sparse and low memory footprint ANN, we quantize the trained synaptic weights into discrete quantized level and tested the network, which demonstrate an accuracy of ~95% and ~62%, for the MNIST and Fashion-MNIST dataset, respectively.

03

基于原子坐标实现近实验精度的普适磁结构预测#

Universal Magnetic Structure Prediction from Atomic Coordinates with Near-Experimental Accuracy
📚 arXiv👤 Abhijatmedhi Chotrattanapituk, Ryotaro Okabe, Eunbi Rha, Mariya Al-Hinai, Eugene Jiang, Daniel Pajerowski, Yongqiang Cheng, Joshua J. Turner, Mingda Li📅 2026-05-18⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破传统磁结构预测依赖对称性假设的局限，核心创新在于提出本征调制结构表示（PMSR），首次实现公度与非公度磁结构的统一编码；结合E(3)等变图神经网络，直接从原子坐标端到端预测共线/非共线磁构型
该工作提出磁结构网络（MSN），一种E(3)等变图神经网络，可直接从晶体结构预测共线与非共线磁结构。通过引入本征调制结构表示（PMSR），统一编码公度与非公度结构而无需对称性假设；模型在MAGNDATA实验数据上训练，能以高保真度重构实验磁结构，为磁性材料数据驱动发现提供可扩展框架。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出磁结构网络（MSN），一种E(3)等变图神经网络，可直接从晶体结构预测共线与非共线磁结构。通过引入本征调制结构表示（PMSR），统一编码公度与非公度结构而无需对称性假设；模型在MAGNDATA实验数据上训练，能以高保真度重构实验磁结构，为磁性材料数据驱动发现提供可扩展框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16230v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic order is a fundamental property of materials, governing collective behavior and enabling a broad range of functionalities. Yet magnetic structure remains difficult to determine: experiments are costly and specialized, while first-principles methods often struggle with the noncollinear and incommensurate orders found in real materials. Here we introduce magnetic structure network (MSN), an E(3) equivariant graph neural network that predicts both collinear and non-collinear magnetic structures directly from atomic crystal structures, trained directly on experimentally determined structures from MAGNDATA. By proposing the primitive modulated structure representation (PMSR), we are able to encode commensurate and incommensurate structures in a unified way without symmetry assumptions. The model achieves strong performance across all modulation components and reconstructs experimental magnetic structures with high fidelity. Our approach provides a scalable framework for rapid magnetic structure prediction and opens a route to data-driven discovery of magnetic materials.

04

带概率先验的变分自回归网络#

Variational Autoregressive Networks with probability priors
📚 arXiv👤 Piotr Białas, Piotr Korcyl, Tomasz Stebel, Dawid Zapolski📅 2026-05-18⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将物理先验概率嵌入变分自回归网络，替代从零学习对称性的训练模式，有效缓解临界慢化导致的采样效率崩溃。这一"物理引导学习"策略显著降低训练成本，为更大尺度临界现象与自旋玻璃体系的精确模拟开辟新途径
针对蒙特卡洛方法在相变附近因临界慢化导致自相关时间剧增的问题，作者提出在神经网络采样器中引入物理先验概率分布作为训练起点，避免模型从零学习物理对称性。在Ising模型与Edwards-Anderson自旋玻璃模型上的结果表明，融入物理先验的训练负担显著降低，并有助于模拟更大体系。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对蒙特卡洛方法在相变附近因临界慢化导致自相关时间剧增的问题，作者提出在神经网络采样器中引入物理先验概率分布作为训练起点，避免模型从零学习物理对称性。在Ising模型与Edwards-Anderson自旋玻璃模型上的结果表明，融入物理先验的训练负担显著降低，并有助于模拟更大体系。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16020v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Monte Carlo methods are essential across diverse scientific fields, yet their efficiency is frequently hampered by critical slowing down-a sharp increase in autocorrelation times near phase transitions. Although deep learning approaches, such as neural-network-based samplers, have been proposed to alleviate this issue, they face another serious problem: the difficulty of training the models. This difficulty partially stems from the overly general nature of original machine-learning architectures, which often ignore underlying physical symmetries and force networks to relearn them from scratch. In this paper, we demonstrate that incorporating physical priors into the model significantly enhances performance. Building upon existing strategies that integrate spin-spin interactions, we propose a framework that utilizes a prior probability distribution as a starting point for training. Our results for the Ising model, as well as for the Edwards-Anderson spin glass model, suggest that moving away from `blank slate' models in favor of physics-informed priors reduces the training burden and facilitates the simulation of larger system sizes in discrete spin models.

05

铁电AlScN中畴壁介导的极化反转：应变释放与场依赖动力学#

Domain-Wall Mediated Polarization Switching in Ferroelectric AlScN: Strain Relief and Field-Dependent Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Xiangyu Zheng, Charles Paillard, Dawei Wang, Peng Chen, Hong Jian Zhao, Yu Xie, Laurent Bellaiche📅 2026-05-18⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示AlScN中预存畴壁通过应变释放机制打破集体反转限制，建立"渐进推进—快速均匀反转"的场依赖动力学相图，为通过畴工程降低铁电薄膜矫顽场、优化存储器件能效提供理论依据与材料设计策略。
结合DFT与机器学习分子动力学，研究了不同Sc浓度与电场下AlScN的极化反转机制。结果表明过大晶格应变阻止集体反转，而预存畴壁释放应变并主导反转：低场下遵循Kolmogorov-Avrami-Ishibashi模型的畴壁渐进推进，高场下伴随成核驱动同时非线性成核生长的快速均匀反转，凸显畴工程作为降低矫顽场的可行路径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

结合DFT与机器学习分子动力学，研究了不同Sc浓度与电场下AlScN的极化反转机制。结果表明过大晶格应变阻止集体反转，而预存畴壁释放应变并主导反转：低场下遵循Kolmogorov-Avrami-Ishibashi模型的畴壁渐进推进，高场下伴随成核驱动同时非线性成核生长的快速均匀反转，凸显畴工程作为降低矫顽场的可行路径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.00705v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: While scandium-doped aluminum nitride (AlScN) exhibits robust ferroelectricity and excellent thermal stability, its utility is limited by an exceptionally high coercive field (E_c) for polarization switching. Unraveling the atomistic switching dynamics is therefore critical for tailoring E_c. Here, we combine density functional theory and machine-learning molecular dynamics to elucidate the polarization switching mechanisms in AlScN over various Sc concentrations and applied electric fields. We find that excessive lattice strain strictly prohibits collective polarization switching, but the pre-existing domain walls relieve strain and lead to a distinct switching dynamics -- dictating a field-dependent switching mechanism. At low electric fields, switching occurs via gradual domain-wall propagation consistent with the Kolmogorov-Avrami-Ishibashi model. In contrast, high fields stimulate additional nucleation, driving a rapid, homogeneous reversal process described by the simultaneous non-linear nucleation and growth model. These findings highlight the critical role of domain-wall dynamics and suggest domain engineering as a viable strategy to tailor coercive fields in AlScN and related ferroelectrics.

03

磁性 / 铁电专题#

聚焦自旋、铁电、多铁与相关功能材料研究。

01

利用电子显微镜量化高熵氧化物薄膜中应变与阳离子价态的耦合#

Quantifying the coupling between strain and cation valence in high entropy oxide thin films using electron microscopy
📚 arXiv👤 Sai Venkata Gayathri Ayyagari, Saeed SI Almishal, Debangshu Mukherjee, Kevin M. Roccapriore, Jon-Paul Maria, Nasim Alem📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将4D-STEM与EELS/EDS联用，在纳米尺度建立了HEO薄膜中应变-化学-电子态的定量关联，突破了传统宏观表征的局限。其意义在于揭示了合成条件对亚稳材料局域结构的精细调控机制，为通
高熵氧化物(HEOs)具有广阔组份空间和可调性质，但其亚稳本性使局域结构对生长条件高度敏感。作者采用4D-STEM结合电子能量损失谱和能散X射线谱等先进S/TEM技术，研究衬底温度对HEO薄膜纳米尺度结构与应变的影响。量化了纳米尺度应变变化与Co价态及细微化学差异的关联，证明相同名义组份的HEO薄膜可承载不同应变和缺陷态，合成条件可用于调控应变和Co价态。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

高熵氧化物(HEOs)具有广阔组份空间和可调性质，但其亚稳本性使局域结构对生长条件高度敏感。作者采用4D-STEM结合电子能量损失谱和能散X射线谱等先进S/TEM技术，研究衬底温度对HEO薄膜纳米尺度结构与应变的影响。量化了纳米尺度应变变化与Co价态及细微化学差异的关联，证明相同名义组份的HEO薄膜可承载不同应变和缺陷态，合成条件可用于调控应变和Co价态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21612v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: High entropy oxides (HEOs) are a class of materials with vast compositional space and tunable properties, making them attractive for applications in thermoelectrics, magnetism, ionic conduction, and beyond. However, their metastable nature makes the local structure, and consequently their properties, highly sensitive to growth conditions. It is therefore essential to probe the local modulations in atomic, chemical, and electronic structure as a function of growth conditions. Here, advanced S/TEM techniques, including 4D-STEM combined with electron energy loss spectroscopy and energy-dispersive X-ray spectroscopy are used to investigate the effect of substrate temperature on structure and strain at the nanoscale regime in HEO thin films. We quantify how nanoscale strain variations correlate with Co valence and subtle chemical differences in the films with the same nominal composition but different growth temperatures. Our results demonstrate that identical HEO compositions can accommodate distinct strain and defect states in thin film form and highlight how synthesis conditions can be leveraged to manipulate strain and Co valence. These findings establish a framework to tailor functional properties via strain and valence control in high entropy oxide thin films.

02

偏振中子衍射观测块体MnTe中交错磁序的翻转#

Observation of Altermagnetic Order Switching in Bulk MnTe by Polarized Neutron Diffraction
📚 arXiv👤 Zheyuan Liu, Shinichiro Asai, Shingo Takahashi, Hiraku Saito, Taro Nakajima, Takatsugu Masuda📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次利用偏振中子衍射在块体MnTe中直接观测到交错磁序的核-磁干涉效应，确证了净Néel矢量的存在；同时揭示弱铁磁矩与交错磁序的耦合机制，并实现毫特斯拉级低场翻转，为新型反铁磁自旋电子学器件提供
交错磁序以Néel矢量为特征，即使在非相对论极限下也破坏时间反演对称性。作者利用偏振中子衍射直接探测MnTe的交错磁序，观察到显著的核-磁干涉项，为块体晶体中存在净Néel矢量提供直接证据。同时发现源于相对论自旋-轨道耦合的弱铁磁矩与交错磁序耦合，二者均可通过毫特斯拉量级磁场冷却实现翻转。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

交错磁序以Néel矢量为特征，即使在非相对论极限下也破坏时间反演对称性。作者利用偏振中子衍射直接探测MnTe的交错磁序，观察到显著的核-磁干涉项，为块体晶体中存在净Néel矢量提供直接证据。同时发现源于相对论自旋-轨道耦合的弱铁磁矩与交错磁序耦合，二者均可通过毫特斯拉量级磁场冷却实现翻转。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21616v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnetic order, characterized by the Néel vector, breaks time-reversal symmetry (TRS) even in the nonrelativistic limit. Although spin-polarized and anomalous transport phenomena emerge with this order, they are mutually compensated by TRS-connected antiphase domains with opposite Néel vectors. Here we employ polarized neutron diffraction to directly probe the altermagnetic order in MnTe. Pronounced nuclear-magnetic interference terms were observed, providing direct evidence of a net Néel vector in the bulk crystal. Moreover, a weak ferromagnetic moment (WFM), originating from relativistic spin-orbit coupling, was found to be coupled with the altermagnetic order. Both the altermagnetic order and the WFM can be switched by milli-Tesla-scale magnetic field cooling.

03

低温下CoFe₂O₄纳米纤维磁性与磁热性能的增强#

Enhancement in Magnetic and Magnetocaloric Properties of CoFe2O4 Nanofibers at Lower Temperatures
📚 arXiv👤 Salma El Mouloua, Youness Hadouch, Salma Ayadh, Salma Touili, Daoud Mezzane, M barek Amjoud, Said Ben Moumen, Abdelhadi Alimoussa, Abdelilah Lahmar, Zvonko Jaglicic, Zdravko Kutnjak, Mimoun El Marssi📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：溶胶-凝胶电纺制备的CoFe₂O₄纳米纤维在低温区展现显著磁热增强效应，其高饱和磁化强度与可调矫顽力源于一维结构对磁晶各向异性的优化。该研究为低温磁制冷材料的设计提供了新思路，拓展了尖晶石铁氧体在低温
该工作研究溶胶-凝胶电纺技术制备的一维钴铁氧体CoFe₂O₄纳米纤维在低温和特定应用下的磁性与磁热性能。纳米纤维平均直径约210 nm，呈纯立方密堆积尖晶石结构(Fd-3m)。10-300 K温度范围内表现为铁磁性，室温饱和磁化强度达75.87 emu/g，矫顽力723 Oe。采用Maxwell方法间接测量磁熵变，该工作围绕低温磁热效应展开，详情需查阅原文。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究溶胶-凝胶电纺技术制备的一维钴铁氧体CoFe₂O₄纳米纤维在低温和特定应用下的磁性与磁热性能。纳米纤维平均直径约210 nm，呈纯立方密堆积尖晶石结构(Fd-3m)。10-300 K温度范围内表现为铁磁性，室温饱和磁化强度达75.87 emu/g，矫顽力723 Oe。采用Maxwell方法间接测量磁熵变，该工作围绕低温磁热效应展开，详情需查阅原文。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21697v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This research paper investigates new and first insights into the magnetic and magnetocaloric properties of one-dimensional (1D) cobalt ferrite CoFe2O4 (CFO) nanofibers elaborated by sol gel based electrospinning technique, particularly focusing on their behavior at low temperatures for specific applications. The calcined CFO nanofibers microstructural, structural, magnetic, and magnetocaloric properties were explored. The nanofibers (NFs) microstructure, with an average diameter of 210 nm, was examined by scanning and transmission electron microscopies (SEM, TEM). The X-ray diffraction (XRD) of the CFO nanofibers showed a pure cubic close-packed (c.c.p) spinel crystalline structure with the F d 3 -m space group. The Raman spectroscopic studies further confirm the cubic inverse spinel phase. The Magnetic properties were explored as a function of temperature, ranging from 10 to 300 K, a ferromagnetic behaviour was observed with the highest saturation magnetization of 75.87 emu g(-1) and a coercivity of 723 Oe at room temperature. The variation of the magnetic entropy was measured indirectly using the Maxwell approach with an increasing magnetic field. A maximum of Delta(S)=1.71 J K-1 was reached around 32 K. At 180 K, the associated adiabatic temperature change, Delta (Tmax), was 0.93 K, with a large RCP value of 7.58 J kg-1 was measured, which is reasonably high for the corresponding nanoparticles (NPs). This work may suggest that 1D CFO nanofibers offer a promising route for the production of nanostructured magnetic materials, potentially impacting various electronic and electromagnetic device applications at low temperatures.

04

六方LaN中反极化序与压强调控相的揭示#

Uncovering Antipolar Ordering and Pressure-Tunable Phases in Hexagonal LaN
📚 arXiv👤 Atanu Paul, Laurent Bellaiche, Charles Paillard📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在六方LaN中预言了反极化相的存在，揭示极性与反极化声子不稳定性竞争机制，发现压强调控可实现两种相之间低能垒切换，为设计新型压电、铁电存储及压力传感器材料提供了全新理论范式。
作者基于第一性原理密度泛函理论预测六方LaN中存在反极化不稳定性。从非极性六方相出发，识别出竞争的极性和反极化布里渊区中心声子不稳定性：极性模式凝聚稳定为动力学稳定的纤锌矿(WZ)相，反极化模式凝聚形成六方反极化(AP)相，其特征为单胞内交替局域极化与零净宏观极化。常压下AP相相对于WZ相为亚稳态，两相间存在有限能垒，暗示可能通过AP中间态的极化翻转路径。能垒随压力增加而降低，增强极性与反极化态间的可调性；压力增加时AP相亚晶格极化增…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

作者基于第一性原理密度泛函理论预测六方LaN中存在反极化不稳定性。从非极性六方相出发，识别出竞争的极性和反极化布里渊区中心声子不稳定性：极性模式凝聚稳定为动力学稳定的纤锌矿(WZ)相，反极化模式凝聚形成六方反极化(AP)相，其特征为单胞内交替局域极化与零净宏观极化。常压下AP相相对于WZ相为亚稳态，两相间存在有限能垒，暗示可能通过AP中间态的极化翻转路径。能垒随压力增加而降低，增强极性与反极化态间的可调性；压力增加时AP相亚晶格极化增强而WZ相减弱。更高压力下岩盐和四方相变得比六方相更稳定。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21767v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We predict an antipolar instability in hexagonal LaN using first-principles density functional theory. Starting from a nonpolar hexagonal phase, we identify competing polar and antipolar zone-center phonon instabilities. Condensation of the polar and antipolar modes stabilizes, respectively, dynamically stable wurtzite (WZ) phase and an hexagonal antipolar (AP) phase which is characterized by alternating local polarization and zero net macroscopic polarization within the unit cell. At ambient conditions, the AP phase is metastable with respect to the WZ phase, and a finite energy barrier exists between these phases, suggesting a possible polarization-switching pathway via the AP intermediate state. The energy barrier between the WZ and AP phases decreases with increasing pressure, indicating enhanced tunability between polar and antipolar states. The sublattice polarization increases with pressure in the AP phase, while it decreases in the WZ phase. We further find that, with increasing pressure, the rock-salt and tetragonal phases of LaN become more stable than the hexagonal phases (AP and WZ). Consequently, the realization of the AP phase is more favorable in the low-pressure regime, where hexagonal phases remain energetically competitive. These results demonstrate pressure-driven competition between polar and antipolar phases in LaN and point toward antiferroelectric-like behavior in this binary nitride system.

05

Mo位Pb掺杂对极性磁体Fe₂Mo₃O₈磁性的影响#

Effect of Pb Substitution at the Mo site on the Magnetic Properties of the Polar Magnet Fe₂Mo₃O₈
📚 arXiv👤 Takumi Shirasaki, Taichi Ishikawa, Shungo Nakayama, Hideki Kuwahara📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：通过在Mo位引入非磁性Pb⁴⁺/Zr⁴⁺离子，打破Mo⁴⁺自旋单态三聚体，首次在非磁性笼目晶格中激活出有效S=1/2自旋，实现室温铁磁性。该策略突破了传统磁性设计依赖磁性离子的局限，为室温磁电材料开发
Fe₂Mo₃O₈是一种具有磁性Fe蜂窝晶格和非磁性Mo笼目晶格层状结构的极性磁体。本研究通过在Mo位引入非磁性Pb⁴⁺和Zr⁴⁺离子破坏Mo⁴⁺离子的自旋单态三聚体，发现Mo层中出现活跃自旋并产生室温铁磁性行为。定量分析表明每个被激活的Mo离子形成有效自旋S=1/2态，为设计室温磁电材料提供了新思路。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

Fe₂Mo₃O₈是一种具有磁性Fe蜂窝晶格和非磁性Mo笼目晶格层状结构的极性磁体。本研究通过在Mo位引入非磁性Pb⁴⁺和Zr⁴⁺离子破坏Mo⁴⁺离子的自旋单态三聚体，发现Mo层中出现活跃自旋并产生室温铁磁性行为。定量分析表明每个被激活的Mo离子形成有效自旋S=1/2态，为设计室温磁电材料提供了新思路。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21841v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The ternary transition-metal oxide Fe₂Mo₃O₈ is a polar magnet characterized by a layered structure of magnetic Fe honeycomb lattices and non-magnetic Mo kagome lattices. Whereas previous studies have primarily focused on the chemical substitution at the Fe sites to modulate the magnetic properties, the Mo sites have remained largely unexplored due to the strong spin-singlet trimerization of Mo⁴⁺ ions. In this study, we investigated the effect of substituting non-magnetic Pb⁴⁺ and Zr⁴⁺ ions into the Mo sites to intentionally disrupt the Mo trimers. Our results reveal that the disruption of the Mo spin-singlet state induces active spins within the Mo layer, resulting in the emergence of a ferromagnetic-like behavior that persists even at room temperature. Quantitative analysis that takes into account the weight fraction of the main phase suggests an effective spin S = 1/2 state per active Mo ion upon trimer disruption. These findings demonstrate that controlling non-magnetic cluster states within a polar host via chemical substitution is a promising approach for designing room-temperature magnetoelectric materials.

06

多色性材料Ca₃ReO₅Cl₂中的光学各向异性与电子态#

Optical anisotropy and electronic states in the pleochroic material Ca₃ReO₅Cl₂
📚 arXiv👤 Takumi Tsukihara, Ibuki Terada, Michi-To Suzuki📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本研究以铁磁有序态有效刻画Re 5d电子局域性，突破强关联体系光学计算难题，首次从轨道层面揭示Re-d电子态主导多色性光学跃迁的微观机制，为设计新型各向异性光学材料提供电子结构层面的理论指导。
Ca₃ReO₅Cl₂是一种具有显著多色性的氧氯化物化合物。本研究采用第一性原理计算研究其光学各向异性，利用铁磁有序态有效描述Re 5d电子的局域特性。计算的介电函数和吸收系数定性复现了实验观测的峰结构，轨道分辨分析表明多色性相关的特征光学跃迁主要涉及Re-d主导的电子态，揭示了Re d电子在多色性光学响应中的关键作用。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

Ca₃ReO₅Cl₂是一种具有显著多色性的氧氯化物化合物。本研究采用第一性原理计算研究其光学各向异性，利用铁磁有序态有效描述Re 5d电子的局域特性。计算的介电函数和吸收系数定性复现了实验观测的峰结构，轨道分辨分析表明多色性相关的特征光学跃迁主要涉及Re-d主导的电子态，揭示了Re d电子在多色性光学响应中的关键作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21904v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Pleochroism is a type of optical anisotropy in which the apparent color of a material varies depending on the polarization and propagation direction of incident light. The oxychloride compound Ca₃ReO₅Cl₂ has recently attracted attention due to its pronounced pleochroism. The paramagnetic state of this compound, characterized by localized Re 5d electrons, is challenging to describe within conventional first-principles methods. In this study, we investigate the optical anisotropy in Ca₃ReO₅Cl₂ using first-principles calculations, with particular focus on the relationship between the optical spectra and electronic states. We employ a ferromagnetically ordered state to effectively capture the localized character of the Re 5d electrons. The calculated dielectric function and absorption coefficient qualitatively reproduce the experimentally observed peak structures. An orbital-resolved analysis indicates that the characteristic optical transitions associated with the pleochroism predominantly involve Re-d-dominated electronic states, highlighting the key role of the Re d electrons in the pleochroic optical response of Ca₃ReO₅Cl₂.

07

表面导电金刚石的高场磁输运研究#

High-field Magnetotransport Studies of Surface Conducting Diamonds
📚 arXiv👤 Kaijian Xing, Daniel L. Creedon, Golrokh Akhgar, Steve A. Yianni, Jeffrey C. McCallum, Lothar Ley, Dong-Chen Qi, Christopher I. Pakes📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究构建了适用于量子扩散区内外的高场磁输运统一分析框架，核心创新在于揭示轨道磁电阻而非自旋-轨道耦合效应主导表面导电金刚石的磁输运机制，并证实局部空穴迁移率可达千量级cm²/Vs，为低温超高迁移率金
该工作建立了分析表面导电氢终止金刚石及Al/Al₂O₃/V₂O₅/H-金刚石MOSFET磁输运行为的综合方法。采用改进的理论磁输运模型，可在量子扩散区内外准确解释磁导降低。分析发现高磁场下轨道磁电阻（区别于自旋-轨道耦合的经典效应）主导表面导电金刚石的磁输运，并观测到局部空穴迁移率高达1000-3000 cm²/Vs，表明低温下超高空穴迁移率金刚石电子学的可能性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作建立了分析表面导电氢终止金刚石及Al/Al₂O₃/V₂O₅/H-金刚石MOSFET磁输运行为的综合方法。采用改进的理论磁输运模型，可在量子扩散区内外准确解释磁导降低。分析发现高磁场下轨道磁电阻（区别于自旋-轨道耦合的经典效应）主导表面导电金刚石的磁输运，并观测到局部空穴迁移率高达1000-3000 cm²/Vs，表明低温下超高空穴迁移率金刚石电子学的可能性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22032v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The observation of strong and tunable spin-orbit interaction (SOI) in surface conducting diamond opens up a new avenue for building diamond-based spintronics. Herein we provide a comprehensive method to analyze the magnetotransport behavior of surface conducting hydrogen-terminated diamond (H-diamond) Hall bar devices and Al/Al2O3/V2O5/H-diamond MOSFETs, respectively. By adopting a significantly improved theoretical magneto transport model, the reduced magnetoconductance can be accurately explained both within and outside the quantum diffusive regime. The model is valid for all doping strategies of surface conducting diamond tested. From this analysis, we find that the orbital magnetoresistance, a classical effect distinct from the SOI, dominates the magnetotransport in surface conducting diamond at high magnetic fields. Furthermore, local hole mobilities as high as 1000 ~ 3000 cm2/Vs have been observed in this work, indicating the possibility of diamond-based electronics with ultra-high hole mobilities at cryogenic temperatures.

08

瑞利涡度浴中的回转磁量子摩擦#

Gyromagnetic Quantum Friction in Rayleigh Vorticity Baths
📚 arXiv👤 Mamoru Matsuo, Ryotaro Sano, Ai Yamakage, Hiroshi Funaki, Tatsuhiko N. Ikeda📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示了瑞利表面波涡度与自旋的回转磁耦合可开启一种本征零温弛豫新机制，其超欧姆特性及磁场-深度标度律为浅层自旋传感器和声-自旋混合量子器件的设计提供了全新物理基础。
该工作识别了表面自旋与瑞利波涡度回转磁耦合产生的本征零温弛豫通道。该表面模式贡献无需热声子，由瑞利涡度而非材料特定g因子调制决定。瑞利涡度浴具有超欧姆特性且随深度衰减，产生自旋弛豫的磁场和深度标度关系，为浅层自旋传感器和混合表面声波自旋界面探测固体中的瑞利波声量子摩擦提供了依据。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作识别了表面自旋与瑞利波涡度回转磁耦合产生的本征零温弛豫通道。该表面模式贡献无需热声子，由瑞利涡度而非材料特定g因子调制决定。瑞利涡度浴具有超欧姆特性且随深度衰减，产生自旋弛豫的磁场和深度标度关系，为浅层自旋传感器和混合表面声波自旋界面探测固体中的瑞利波声量子摩擦提供了依据。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22135v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We identify an intrinsic zero-temperature relaxation channel for near-surface spins gyromagnetically coupled to Rayleigh-wave vorticity. This surface-mode contribution requires no thermal phonons, unlike Raman relaxation, and is fixed by Rayleigh vorticity rather than material-specific g-factor modulation. The Rayleigh-vorticity bath is super-Ohmic and evanescent with depth, producing field and depth scalings of spin relaxation. These scalings establish shallow spin sensors and hybrid surface-acoustic-wave spin interfaces as detectors of Rayleigh-wave acoustic quantum friction in solids.

09

磁子-极化子的非线性频移与双稳态#

Nonlinear frequency shift and bistability of magnon-polarons
📚 arXiv👤 Kevin Künstle, Matthias Wagner, Philipp Knaus, Yannik Kunz, Ephraim Spindler, Katharina Lasinger, Matthias R. Schweizer, Philipp Pirro, John F. Gregg, Mathias Weiler📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在YIG/ZnO磁声谐振器中系统揭示了磁子-极化子非线性频移的微观机制——驻波声腔同时激发反向传播自旋波产生的交叉频移项主导高功率下的正频移，并据此实现了非线性共振增强、宽带磁子散射及双稳态
研究YIG/ZnO异质结构磁声谐振器中表面声波与自旋波强耦合的非线性动力学，微波反射与微聚焦布里渊散射揭示线性能带杂化与明显 avoided crossings；高功率下驱动自旋模呈现强场依赖正频移，由矢量哈密顿形式论证实为交叉频移项主导，该效应源于驻波声腔模同时激发±k反向传播自旋波，特定场失谐下非线性频移驱动共振增强磁子布居、宽带非线性散射及双稳态折叠。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究YIG/ZnO异质结构磁声谐振器中表面声波与自旋波强耦合的非线性动力学，微波反射与微聚焦布里渊散射揭示线性能带杂化与明显 avoided crossings；高功率下驱动自旋模呈现强场依赖正频移，由矢量哈密顿形式论证实为交叉频移项主导，该效应源于驻波声腔模同时激发±k反向传播自旋波，特定场失谐下非线性频移驱动共振增强磁子布居、宽带非线性散射及双稳态折叠。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22157v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the nonlinear dynamics of strongly coupled surface acoustic waves (SAWs) and spin waves (SWs) in a magnetoacoustic resonator based on a YIG/ZnO heterostructure by combining microwave reflection measurements with microfocused Brillouin light scattering spectroscopy. In the linear regime, the electrical response reveals clear hybridization between standing SAW cavity modes and finite-wave-vector SWs, resulting in pronounced avoided crossings. At elevated drive powers, the hybrid system exhibits a strongly field-dependent nonlinear response characterized by a positive frequency shift of the driven SW mode. Using the vector Hamiltonian formalism for nonlinear spin-wave dynamics, we show that this shift is dominated by a cross-shift term. In our resonator geometry, this contribution becomes significant because the standing SAW cavity mode simultaneously excites counterpropagating SWs with wave vectors +k and -k. For suitable field detuning, the nonlinear shift drives the SW mode into resonance with the SAW excitation, leading to a strong enhancement of the magnon population, broadband nonlinear scattering, and bistable foldover behavior. Beyond the foldover threshold, both the magnon and phonon responses stabilize. These results establish SAW-driven k ≠ 0 magnon-phonon hybrids as a promising platform for nonlinear magnetoacoustics and wave-based information processing.

10

反铁磁FeSn/Py异质结构中拓扑驱动的巨大有效自旋混合电导#

Topologically Driven Giant Effective Spin Mixing Conductance in Antiferromagnetic FeSn/Py Heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Kacho Imtiyaz Ali Khan, Nidhi Kandwal, Pankhuri Gupta, Deeksha Khandelwal, Akash Kumar, Johan Åkerman, Pranaba Kishor Muduli📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本研究突破性地利用反铁磁体FeSn的拓扑活性kagome表面替代传统重金属Pt，实现自旋混合电导数量级提升，揭示了拓扑界面在高效自旋输运中的独特优势，为开发低功耗、高集成度自旋电子器件提供了全新材料平
首次研究外延FeSn/Py（Ni₈₀Fe₂₀）异质结构的自旋泵浦行为，报道有效自旋混合电导g↑↓eff达(116±7) nm⁻²，较标准Pt/Py体系高近一个数量级；3 nm Al插层使有效阻尼降低两倍，证实巨大g↑↓eff的界面起源，FeSn/Py体系逆自旋霍尔电压较Pt/Py参考膜堆高一个量级。该巨大g↑↓eff归因于Py层与外延FeSn拓扑活性[001]-kagome表面的直接界面接触，确立了拓扑活性界面对先进量子材料自旋电子器…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

首次研究外延FeSn/Py（Ni₈₀Fe₂₀）异质结构的自旋泵浦行为，报道有效自旋混合电导g↑↓eff达(116±7) nm⁻²，较标准Pt/Py体系高近一个数量级；3 nm Al插层使有效阻尼降低两倍，证实巨大g↑↓eff的界面起源，FeSn/Py体系逆自旋霍尔电压较Pt/Py参考膜堆高一个量级。该巨大g↑↓eff归因于Py层与外延FeSn拓扑活性[001]-kagome表面的直接界面接触，确立了拓扑活性界面对先进量子材料自旋电子器件的关键作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22180v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The topological semimetal FeSn antiferromagnet, characterized by its kagome lattice, two-dimensional flat bands, and Dirac-like surface states, holds immense promise for spintronic applications. In this work, for the first time, we investigate the spin pumping behavior in epitaxial-FeSn/Py (Ni₈₀Fe₂₀) heterostructures. We report a giant effective spin mixing conductance (gp̆arrow dowⁿarrowₑff) of (116± 7)~nm⁻², which is nearly one order of magnitude higher than that of standard Pt/Py heterostructures. The insertion of a 3 nm Al spacer layer results in a two-fold reduction in the effective damping, confirming the interfacial origin of the large gp̆arrowdowⁿarrowₑff. Consistently, we observe an order-of-magnitude higher inverse spin Hall effect voltage in the FeSn/Py system compared to a reference Pt/Py film stack. We attribute the giant gp̆arrowdowⁿarrowₑff to the direct interfacing of the Py layer with the topologically active [001]-kagome surface of epitaxial-FeSn. These findings establish the critical role of topologically active interfaces for advanced quantum-material-based spintronic devices.

11

拓扑半金属：表面输运与自旋效应#

Topological semimetals: surface transport and spin effects
📚 arXiv👤 E. V. Deviatov📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文系统综述Weyl半金属的拓扑表面态输运特性，核心创新在于厘清其类Chern绝缘体的手性表面态与三维量子霍尔效应的对应关系，并揭示自旋-动量锁定带来的新奇自旋输运现象。研究意义在于为无耗散电子器件与
综述拓扑半金属（特别是Weyl半金属作为最具代表性的半金属类型）的电荷与自旋输运实验研究，涵盖超导近邻器件中的电荷输运、自旋依赖输运及拓扑表面态的磁响应。Weyl半金属具有线性色散的拓扑保护手性表面态（类似Chern绝缘体而非拓扑绝缘体的螺旋表面态），可视为三维量子霍尔效应体系；其表面态的自旋-动量锁定使其在自旋相关效应方面具有独特研究价值，而输运研究的核心挑战在于揭示能隙体态中表面态的贡献。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

综述拓扑半金属（特别是Weyl半金属作为最具代表性的半金属类型）的电荷与自旋输运实验研究，涵盖超导近邻器件中的电荷输运、自旋依赖输运及拓扑表面态的磁响应。Weyl半金属具有线性色散的拓扑保护手性表面态（类似Chern绝缘体而非拓扑绝缘体的螺旋表面态），可视为三维量子霍尔效应体系；其表面态的自旋-动量锁定使其在自旋相关效应方面具有独特研究价值，而输运研究的核心挑战在于揭示能隙体态中表面态的贡献。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22278v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: For the solid state physics, recent interest to topological systems is mostly connected with topological semimetals, in particular, to Weyl ones as the most representative semimetal type. Like other topological materials, e.g. topological and Chern insulators, topological semimetals acquire topologically protected surface states with linear dispersion. In contrast to helical surface states in topological insulators, the surface states are chiral for Weyl semimetals, similarly to Chern insulators, which allows to consider Weyl semimetals as the three-dimensional analog of the quantum Hall effect regime. Weyl semimetals are also interesting for spin-dependent effects, due to the spin-momentum locking in the topological surface states. For topological semimetals, the main problem of transport investigations is to reveal the surface states contribution in the material with gapless bulk spectrum. Here, we present review of experimental results on charge and spin transport in topological semimetals: charge transport in different superconducting proximity devices; spin-dependent transport; magnetic response of the topological surface states; non-linear anomalous Hall effect as the direct manifestation of the non-zero Berry curvature in topological semimetals. Possible applications are also considered for this new class of topological materials.

12

共线反铁磁多铁性材料中的奇宇称手性磁子：对称性分类与铁电开关#

Odd-Parity Chiral Magnons in Collinear Antiferromagnetic Multiferroics: Symmetry Classification and Ferroelectric Switching
📚 arXiv👤 Quanchao Du, Zhenlong Zhang Yuanjun Jin, Rui Li, Haibo Xie, Jinlian Lu, Zhe Wang, Zhijun Jiang, Lei Zhang, Jinyang Ni📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地将铁电开关与反铁磁磁子手性耦合，利用磁子电中性规避电荷耗散瓶颈；首创奇宇称手性磁子的对称性分类体系，并建立从二维到体相的材料设计范式，为超低功耗自旋电子器件开辟新路径。
识别一类共线反铁磁多铁性材料，其中子晶格内Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用诱导可通过铁电开关反转的奇宇称手性磁子；利用磁子电中性实现反铁磁绝缘体中非易失铁电调控的磁子自旋劈裂、霍尔输运与自旋极化。磁群分析与自旋波计算揭示手性劈裂呈f波、p波及全能隙三种平面奇宇称形式，并具有Néel矢量依赖特性；密度泛函理论验证从二维到体相的多种材料候选，为低耗散自旋电子器件提供新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

识别一类共线反铁磁多铁性材料，其中子晶格内Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用诱导可通过铁电开关反转的奇宇称手性磁子；利用磁子电中性实现反铁磁绝缘体中非易失铁电调控的磁子自旋劈裂、霍尔输运与自旋极化。磁群分析与自旋波计算揭示手性劈裂呈f波、p波及全能隙三种平面奇宇称形式，并具有Néel矢量依赖特性；密度泛函理论验证从二维到体相的多种材料候选，为低耗散自旋电子器件提供新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22294v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The coupling between ferroelectrics and magnetism presents a promising avenue for low-dissipation spintronic devices. However, such couplings remain rare, and the direct realization of magnetic order driven by ferroelectric switching in insulators continues to pose a significant challenge. Here, we identify a class of collinear antiferromagnetic multiferroics in which intra-sublattice Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction (DMI) induces odd-parity chiral magnons that are reversible via ferroelectric switching. Leveraging the charge-neutral nature of magnons, such multiferroics enable non-volatile ferroelectric control over magnon spin splitting, Hall transport, and spin polarization in antiferromagnetic insulators. Remarkably, magnetic group analysis and spin wave calculations reveal that the chiral splitting adopts three planar odd-parity forms, f-wave, p-wave, and fully-gapped types, with an intriguing Néel vector dependence. Furthermore, density functional theory calculations validate various material candidates, ranging from two-dimensional to bulk systems. Our work provides new insights into the realization of odd-parity chiral magnons in collinear antiferromagnets and opens new avenues for magnetoelectric coupling mechanisms in multiferroics

13

具有应变可控半金属态与谷极化的二维交错亚铁磁性#

Two-dimensional alternating ferrimagnetism with strain-controlled half-metallic state and valley polarization
📚 arXiv👤 W. Z. Zhuo, Z. H. Guan, Z. L. Peng, Y. N. Pan, J. Chen, Y. Yang, M. H. Qin📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地融合交错磁性与铁磁性，首创二维交错亚铁磁相，兼具动量依赖自旋劈裂与净磁化双重优势，解决了传统交错磁零磁化难以外场调控的瓶颈。应变可逆调控半金属态与谷极化的特性，为低功耗自旋电子器件及谷电
提出二维交错亚铁磁相，将交错动量依赖自旋劈裂与有限净磁化相结合，克服交错磁学零净磁化限制传统磁调控的不足。紧束缚模型揭示其源于交错磁体未补偿磁化，第一性原理计算与Monte Carlo模拟证实应变及Cr掺杂V₂Te₂O中稳定存在该相，表现应变可调净磁化、可逆半金属性与谷极化，居里温度高于室温。该工作融合交错磁性与铁磁性，拓展了二维磁学相图，为高能效自旋电子应用开辟路径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

提出二维交错亚铁磁相，将交错动量依赖自旋劈裂与有限净磁化相结合，克服交错磁学零净磁化限制传统磁调控的不足。紧束缚模型揭示其源于交错磁体未补偿磁化，第一性原理计算与Monte Carlo模拟证实应变及Cr掺杂V₂Te₂O中稳定存在该相，表现应变可调净磁化、可逆半金属性与谷极化，居里温度高于室温。该工作融合交错磁性与铁磁性，拓展了二维磁学相图，为高能效自旋电子应用开辟路径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22319v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The discovery of altermagnetism offers new opportunities for exploring novel quantum states and developing spintronic devices for enabling momentum dependent spin splitting in compensated systems, while zero net magnetization limit its manipulability using conventional magnetic method. Here, we propose 2D alternating ferrimagnetism,a phase merging alternating momentum dependent spin splitting with a finite net magnetization. A tight binding model reveals that alternating ferrimagnetism originates from uncompensated magnetization in altermagnets, facilitating concurrent net magnetization and alternating spin splitting. First principles calculations and Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate stable alternating ferrimagnetism in strained and Cr substiting V2Te2O, which exhibit strain tunable net magnetization, reversable half metallicity and valley polarization, accompanied by long range magnetic order above room temperature. By combining altermagnetic and ferromagnetic properties, alternating ferrimagnetism expand the 2D magnetism landscape and offer pathways for energy efficient spintronic applications.

14

K掺杂提升Na₀.₅Bi₀.₅TiO₃钙钛矿压电催化性能用于高效罗丹明B降解#

Improvement of piezocatalytic performance of Na0.5Bi0.5TiO3 perovskite using K doping for efficient Rhodamine B degradation
📚 arXiv👤 Salma Ayadh, Salma Touili, Mbarek Amjoud, Daoud Mezzane, Mohamed Goune, Jaafar Ghanbaja, Manal Benyoussef, Hana Ursic, Nejc Suban, Mustapha Raihane, Zdravko Kutnjak, Mimoun El Marssi📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：通过K掺杂构建Na₀.₅Bi₀.₅TiO₃的准同型相界，利用两相共存增强压电响应，将压电催化降解速率提升8倍，为机械能驱动环境净化材料的设计提供了新策略。
采用溶胶-凝胶自燃烧法合成Na₀.₅₋ₓKₓBi₀.₅TiO₃（NKₓBT，x=0,0.15,0.20,0.25）纳米粉体，评估其超声振动下压电催化降解有机染料罗丹明B的性能。结构分析表明最优组成NK15BT存在中间相界（MPB，两相共存）；压电催化90分钟实现完全降解，速率常数为未掺杂NK0BT的8倍，增强活性源于压电性能改善的协同效应，该工作为利用机械绿能辅助化学过程的压电催化材料设计提供参考。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

采用溶胶-凝胶自燃烧法合成Na₀.₅₋ₓKₓBi₀.₅TiO₃（NKₓBT，x=0,0.15,0.20,0.25）纳米粉体，评估其超声振动下压电催化降解有机染料罗丹明B的性能。结构分析表明最优组成NK15BT存在中间相界（MPB，两相共存）；压电催化90分钟实现完全降解，速率常数为未掺杂NK0BT的8倍，增强活性源于压电性能改善的协同效应，该工作为利用机械绿能辅助化学过程的压电催化材料设计提供参考。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22369v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Piezocatalysis, based on the piezoelectric properties of catalysts, breaks down the barrier between mechanical energy and chemical energy. It describes the use of charges induced by piezoelectricity to assist typical chemical processes while harvesting various forms of mechanical green energy. The performance of piezocatalysis is predominantly governed by the piezoelectric properties of materials. The main aim of this work is to evaluate and analyze the potential of potassium doped sodium bismuth titanate Na0.5-xKxBi0.5TiO3 abbreviated as NKxBT (0, 0.15, 0.20, and 0.25), as a piezocatalyst in the degradation of the organic dye Rhodamine B RhB under ultrasonic vibration. The synthesis of NKxBT nanopowders was conducted using the sol-gel autocombustion method. Coupled structural analysis reveals the presence of an intermediate Morphotropic Phase Boundary (MPB, where two phases coexist) in the optimal NK15BT composition. The piezocatalytic degradation results showed a total piezo-degradation in only 90 min and a rate constant 8 times higher than the undoped NK0BT. The enhanced piezocatalytic activity results from a synergistic effect of MPB presence, reduced particle size, optimal bandgap and high lattice strain. The NK15BT sample also demonstrated good reusability and good mineralization.

15

Mn₂Au/CoFeB双层中反铁磁序增强的磁阻尼#

Antiferromagnetic Ordering Enhanced Magnetic Damping in Mn2Au/CoFeB Bilayers
📚 arXiv👤 Donghang Xie, Haozhe Wang, Zhe Zhang, Zishuang Li, Jiahua Lu, Ronghua Liu, Jun Du, Bo Liu, Yu Yan, Liang He, Jing Wu, Rong Zhang, Bo Liu, Tiejun Zhou, Yongbing Xu, Xuezhong Ruan📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示超薄Mn₂Au反铁磁序对邻近铁磁层阻尼的显著调控作用，发现纳米尺度下Néel温度急剧降低的反常现象，建立了AFM-FM交换耦合强度与磁阻尼的定量关联，为利用反铁磁序实现低功耗自旋电子器件
通过铁磁共振研究AFM/FM Mn₂Au/CoFeB双层磁动力学，发现2 nm厚Mn₂Au的Néel温度仅约40 K，与块体超过1000 K形成鲜明对比。Mn₂Au(2 nm)/CoFeB(4 nm)双层中，CoFeB磁阻尼α随温度从160 K降至10 K由0.013增至0.047，交换耦合场Hᵣₒₜ同步增大；该阻尼增强归因于Mn₂Au反铁磁序随温度降低而增强的AFM-FM交换耦合，促进了CoFeB向Mn₂Au的自旋角动量转移，为AF…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

通过铁磁共振研究AFM/FM Mn₂Au/CoFeB双层磁动力学，发现2 nm厚Mn₂Au的Néel温度仅约40 K，与块体超过1000 K形成鲜明对比。Mn₂Au(2 nm)/CoFeB(4 nm)双层中，CoFeB磁阻尼α随温度从160 K降至10 K由0.013增至0.047，交换耦合场Hᵣₒₜ同步增大；该阻尼增强归因于Mn₂Au反铁磁序随温度降低而增强的AFM-FM交换耦合，促进了CoFeB向Mn₂Au的自旋角动量转移，为AFM/FM动力学调控提供深入认识。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22382v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Antiferromagnets (AFMs) hold significant potential for spintronic devices owing to their insensitivity to external magnetic fields and the absence of stray fields. Beyond these inherent advantages, an AFM can manipulate the magnetic dynamics of a ferromagnet (FM) layer in AFM/FM bilayers, whereas the mechanism of such manipulation remains controversial. Here, we investigate the magnetic dynamics of AFM/FM Mn2Au/CoFeB bilayers via Ferromagnetic Resonance (FMR). It is found that the Néel temperature of 2-nm-thick Mn2Au is as low as ~40 K, in sharp contrast to that of bulk Mn2Au, which exceeds 1000 K. In the Mn2Au(2 nm)/CoFeB(4 nm) bilayer, the magnetic damping α of the CoFeB layer increases from 0.013 to 0.047 as temperature decreases from 160 K to 10 K, accompanied by a synchronous increase in the exchange coupling field Hᵣₒₜ. Such an increase in α is attributed to the enhanced spin angular momentum transfer from CoFeB to Mn2Au, mediated through AFM-FM exchange coupling between Mn2Au and CoFeB, which is enhanced by the Mn2Au antiferromagnetic ordering as the temperature decreases. Our study provides deeper insights into AFM/FM dynamics and spintronic storage technology.

16

独立超薄膜ε-LaVO₃中的涌现磁序与电荷有序相#

Emergent magnetic and charge ordered phases in freestanding ultrathin ȩLaVO3
📚 arXiv👤 Ashutosh Anand, Mukul Kabir📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：独立超薄膜ε-LaVO₃展现厚度依赖的磁相变序列，极性灾难驱动表面电荷重分布形成异质磁结构；掺杂诱导可调控电荷有序超结构，为低维关联氧化物多场耦合调控及新型量子功能器件设计提供理论范式。
基于密度泛函理论研究独立超薄膜ε-LaVO₃的本征性质，揭示随厚度演化的磁相变序列：从单层条纹反铁磁直至恢复类体相C-AFM。四层以上极性灾难驱动的电荷转移掺杂表面层，产生条纹AFM与铁磁表面态而中心层保持类体相。空穴掺杂单层研究进一步发现掺杂驱动系统进入铁磁态并诱导电荷有序：0.5 h/fu处出现条纹电荷有序，0.25 h/fu处出现3:1条纹超结构，表明超结构周期性随掺杂浓度变化，为关联电子体系多场调控提供新视角。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

基于密度泛函理论研究独立超薄膜ε-LaVO₃的本征性质，揭示随厚度演化的磁相变序列：从单层条纹反铁磁直至恢复类体相C-AFM。四层以上极性灾难驱动的电荷转移掺杂表面层，产生条纹AFM与铁磁表面态而中心层保持类体相。空穴掺杂单层研究进一步发现掺杂驱动系统进入铁磁态并诱导电荷有序：0.5 h/fu处出现条纹电荷有序，0.25 h/fu处出现3:1条纹超结构，表明超结构周期性随掺杂浓度变化，为关联电子体系多场调控提供新视角。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22415v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Transition metal oxide perovskites are an ideal platform for exploring the interplay between spin, orbital, charge and lattice degrees of freedom. Among them, ȩLaVO3 has been extensively studied in heterostructures and superlattices, where exotic phases have been reported. Motivated by the advances in freestanding oxide membranes, we investigate the intrinsic properties of freestanding ultrathin ȩLaVO3 films using density functional theory. Our calculations reveal a sequence of magnetic phase transitions with thickness, starting from stripe-AFM in monolayer until the bulk like C-AFM is recovered. Beyond four layers, polar catastrophe driven charge transfer dopes the surface layers giving rise to stripe-AFM and ferromagnetic surface states while the central layers remain bulk like. We further explore this fact by studying charge doped monolayer, discovering that hole doping drives the system into ferromagnetic state. Doping also induced charge ordering in the system. A striped charge ordering pattern is observed at 0.5 h/fu, while a 3:1 stripe pattern emerges at 0.25 h/fu, indicating that the periodicity of the superstructure changes with doping concentration.

17

铁电LaMoN₃中线性与非线性光学响应的光伏效率增强研究#

Harnessing Linear and Nonlinear Optical Responses in Ferroelectric LaMoN₃ for Enhanced Photovoltaic Efficiency
📚 arXiv👤 Surajit Adhikari, Sanika S. Padelkar, Jacek J. Jasieniak, Alexandr N. Simonov, Aftab Alam📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统揭示高压对氧自由氮化物钙钛矿LaMoN₃光电性能的调控规律，建立压力-电子结构-光学响应的定量关联，为设计高压可调的高效铁电光伏材料提供新范式，拓展了非线性光学材料在极端环境下的应用前景
该工作采用第一性原理方法系统研究了氧自由氮化物钙钛矿LaMoN₃在高压下的相稳定性、线性与非线性光学响应、激子及极化子行为。计算涵盖密度泛函理论、密度泛函微扰理论、多体微扰理论（G₀W₀和BSE）及紧束缚近似模型。研究表明LaMoN₃在40 GPa内保持动态稳定和单相结构，压力可系统调控电子结构以优化线性或非线性光学响应，该工作围绕高压下LaMoN₃的光电特性展开，详情需查阅原文。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用第一性原理方法系统研究了氧自由氮化物钙钛矿LaMoN₃在高压下的相稳定性、线性与非线性光学响应、激子及极化子行为。计算涵盖密度泛函理论、密度泛函微扰理论、多体微扰理论（G₀W₀和BSE）及紧束缚近似模型。研究表明LaMoN₃在40 GPa内保持动态稳定和单相结构，压力可系统调控电子结构以优化线性或非线性光学响应，该工作围绕高压下LaMoN₃的光电特性展开，详情需查阅原文。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22453v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Nitride perovskites are an emerging class of materials predicted to exhibit diverse functional properties, yet remain underexplored due to synthesis challenges of oxygen-free nitrides. Recently, LaMoN₃ has been reported as an oxygen-free nitride perovskite with polar symmetry, exhibiting excellent dynamic stability and ferroelectric properties under moderate pressure. However, its phase stability, linear and non-linear optical response, excitonic and polaronic behavior, and efficiency under high pressure remain unexplored. Applying pressure enables systematic tuning of the electronic structure properties, thereby facilitating the identification of phases optimized for either linear or nonlinear optical responses. Therefore, in this work, we systematically investigate these properties of LaMoN₃ up to 40 GPa using first-principles methods, including density functional theory, density functional perturbation theory, many-body perturbation theory (namely G₀W₀ and BSE), and tight binding approximation model. Our study shows that LaMoN₃ remains dynamically stable and retains its single-phase structure up to 40 GPa. The compound exhibits an indirect bandgap that decreases from 2.17 eV (0 GPa) to 1.45 eV (40 GPa) at the G₀W₀@PBE level. Using the BSE, we find that pressure enhances the SLME while lowering the exciton binding energy, both favorable for photovoltaic applications. The bulk photovoltaic efficiency trend with pressure mimics the behavior of the shift current density J_SC , peaking near 15 GPa before declining at higher pressures due to a diminished nonlinear shift current response. These results highlight pressure-tuned regimes to enhance photovoltaic performance. We thereby propose multi-junction device, combining absorber layers optimized for linear and nonlinear optical currents, together boosting solar energy conversion through complementary mechanisms.

18

拓扑立方螺旋磁体SrFeO₃高场相图再探究#

Revisiting the high-field phase diagram of the topological cubic helimagnet SrFeO₃
📚 arXiv👤 Masaki Gen, Shun Okumura, Shusaku Imajo, Taro Nakajima, Karel Prokes, Shunsuke Kitou, Yusuke Tokunaga, Yoichi Nii, Koichi Kindo, Yoshimitsu Kohama, Shintaro Ishiwata, Taka-hisa Arima📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地构建了含立方单离子各向异性及高阶交换作用的有效哈密顿量，揭示了SrFeO₃磁场取向依赖的复杂相图，阐明配体空穴带驱动的电子巡游性是稳定拓扑多Q相的核心机制，为理解负电荷转移体系中的磁弹性
该工作阐明了立方钙钛矿SrFeO₃磁场取向依赖的磁相图，建立了包含立方单离子各向异性及动量空间双线性、双二次相互作用的有效自旋哈密顿量。研究观察到40 T进入强制铁磁相时一阶价态转变的磁弹性特征，归因于负电荷转移的抑制。结果强调了配体空穴带形成导致的电子巡游性在稳定多Q相中的关键作用。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作阐明了立方钙钛矿SrFeO₃磁场取向依赖的磁相图，建立了包含立方单离子各向异性及动量空间双线性、双二次相互作用的有效自旋哈密顿量。研究观察到40 T进入强制铁磁相时一阶价态转变的磁弹性特征，归因于负电荷转移的抑制。结果强调了配体空穴带形成导致的电子巡游性在稳定多Q相中的关键作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22517v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The cubic perovskite SrFeO₃ is a prototypical centrosymmetric itinerant magnet that hosts a quadruple-mathbf Q hedgehog-antihedgehog lattice and exhibits a complex magnetic-field-temperature phase diagram. Yet, the microscopic mechanism underlying the emergence of its versatile multiple-mathbf Q phases remains unresolved. Here, we elucidate the field-orientation dependence of the magnetic phase diagram and establish an effective spin Hamiltonian for SrFeO₃ that incorporates a cubic single-ion anisotropy together with bilinear and biquadratic interactions in momentum space. In addition, we observe magnetoelastic signatures of a first-order valence transition upon entering the forced FM phase at 40 T, which would be attributed to the suppression of negative charge transfer. These findings emphasize the pivotal importance of electronic itinerancy arising from the formation of a ligand-hole band in stabilizing multiple-mathbf Q phases.

19

磁性可切换量子几何光电流的观测#

Observation of magnetically switchable quantum geometric photocurrents
📚 arXiv👤 Qi Tian, Zhuoliang Ni, Matthew Cothrine, David G. Mandrus, Eugene J. Mele, Andrew M. Rappe, Charles L. Kane, Fernando de Juan, Liang Wu📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在范德瓦尔斯反铁磁体中利用Néel矢量翻转实现磁性可切换光电流，通过频率与温度依赖特性区分并确认了量子度规与几何挠率驱动的两种光电流机制，为量子几何效应的光电探测及反铁磁自旋电子学器件提供了
该工作首次在范德瓦尔斯反铁磁体中通过翻转Néel矢量实现了磁性可切换光电流的实验演示，证实了线性注入电流（探测量子度规）和圆偏振位移电流（探测几何挠率）的存在。特定频率和温度依赖性确认了圆偏振位移电流与线性注入电流的归属，建立了磁晶体中量子几何与体光伏效应的新关联。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作首次在范德瓦尔斯反铁磁体中通过翻转Néel矢量实现了磁性可切换光电流的实验演示，证实了线性注入电流（探测量子度规）和圆偏振位移电流（探测几何挠率）的存在。特定频率和温度依赖性确认了圆偏振位移电流与线性注入电流的归属，建立了磁晶体中量子几何与体光伏效应的新关联。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22518v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In non-centrosymmetric materials, light can be rectified into two types of DC photocurrents, known as injection and shift currents, through the bulk photovoltaic effect. Recent theory has uncovered their deep relation with the two-state quantum geometry of resonant transitions: In non-magnetic crystals, where these currents have been routinely observed, the injection current responds to circular light and probes the Berry curvature, while the shift current responds to linear light and probes the geometric connection. Magnetic crystals have been predicted to show a new set of hitherto unobserved magnetically switchable photocurrents, with the roles of linear and circular light interchanged: A linear injection current, which probes the quantum metric, and a circular shift current, which probes the geometric torsion. In this work, we demonstrate the existence of such currents for the first time, demonstrating the switching of the current by flipping the Néel vector in a van der Waals antiferromagnet. Furthermore, their specific frequency and temperature dependence confirm the assignment of circular shift and linear injection currents. Our work demonstrates a new way to control photocurrents in magnets that are directly tied to geometry and have promising applications in antiferromagnetic spintronics and light harvesting.

20

三角晶格f波交错磁体中的非线性磁子磁矩输运#

Nonlinear Magnon Magnetic Moment Transport in Triangular-Lattice f-Wave Antialtermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Volodymyr P. Kravchuk, Kostiantyn V. Yershov, Bastián Pradenas, Robin R. Neumann, Rodrigo Jaeschke-Ubiergo, Ricardo Zarzuela, Jairo Sinova, Jeroen van den Brink, Alexander Mook📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在三角晶格受挫反铁磁体中揭示了一种新型f波交错磁序：基态磁矩共面排列，但磁振子激发却携带面外磁矩，形成奇宇称的隐藏磁序。通过层状堆叠实现三维f波交错磁体，并预言了磁振子非线性热输运效应可作为
该工作研究了三角晶格海森堡反铁磁体受挫共面120度基态中的自旋激发，发现尽管基态子晶格磁矩无面外分量，其磁振子仍携带垂直于自旋有序平面的磁矩，系统表现为奇宇称f波磁体。将模型扩展至反铁磁耦合三角层堆叠，实现三维f波交错磁体中磁振子的理论构建。研究表明磁振子的非线性热输运效应（Edelstein效应和自旋分裂器效应）为f波交错磁体提供了清晰的实验探测特征。

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了三角晶格海森堡反铁磁体受挫共面120度基态中的自旋激发，发现尽管基态子晶格磁矩无面外分量，其磁振子仍携带垂直于自旋有序平面的磁矩，系统表现为奇宇称f波磁体。将模型扩展至反铁磁耦合三角层堆叠，实现三维f波交错磁体中磁振子的理论构建。研究表明磁振子的非线性热输运效应（Edelstein效应和自旋分裂器效应）为f波交错磁体提供了清晰的实验探测特征。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22614v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study the spin excitations in the frustrated coplanar 120-degree ground state of the triangular-lattice Heisenberg antiferromagnet and demonstrate that they carry a magnetic moment perpendicular to the plane in which the spins order, despite the ground-state sublattice moments having no out-of-plane component. The symmetry of the momentum dependence of the magnetic moment and energy of the magnons renders the system an odd-parity f-wave magnet. Extending this model to a stack of antiferromagnetically coupled triangular layers provides a realization of magnons in a three-dimensional f-wave antialtermagnet. We show that nonlinear thermal transport effects of magnons, such as Edelstein and spin-splitter effects, provide clear experimental signatures of magnons in f-wave antialtermagnets.

21

Au(111)上单层FeCl₂铁磁性的原子尺度演示#

Atomic scale demonstration of ferromagnetism in a single layer FeCl2 on Au(111)
📚 arXiv👤 Adriana E. Candia, Eliecer Peláez-Sifonte, Amitayush Jha Thakur, Sebastien E. Hadjadj, Samuel Kerschbaumer, Aymeric Saunot, Martina Corso, Maxim Ilyn, Jorge Lobo-Checa, Celia Rogero, David Serrate📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在原子尺度证实单层FeCl₂的铁磁有序，揭示三角形缺陷对自旋电子态的局域调控机制，为二维磁性绝缘体的自旋电子器件设计提供了新思路。
该工作通过自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜明确证实了Au(111)上单层FeCl₂的铁磁有序。材料具有约3.3 eV的宽绝缘带隙和费米能级以上1.5 eV处出现的强自旋极化导带。三角形原子尺度缺陷在电子带隙和自旋密度分布中起关键作用，每个缺陷周围1.6 nm区域内导带被局域抑制且隧穿磁电导降低四倍。通过追踪自旋依赖隧穿电导随外加磁场的变化，实现了原子分辨的磁性表征。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜明确证实了Au(111)上单层FeCl₂的铁磁有序。材料具有约3.3 eV的宽绝缘带隙和费米能级以上1.5 eV处出现的强自旋极化导带。三角形原子尺度缺陷在电子带隙和自旋密度分布中起关键作用，每个缺陷周围1.6 nm区域内导带被局域抑制且隧穿磁电导降低四倍。通过追踪自旋依赖隧穿电导随外加磁场的变化，实现了原子分辨的磁性表征。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22783v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: FeCl2 is a promising single-layer material with sizeable magnetic susceptibility and insulating character that can be easily grown by molecular beam epitaxy on various surfaces. In order to include it into the select palette of van der Waals materials used to engineer functional heterostructures, it is necessary to confirm its magnetic and electronic ground states, and understand the influence of the supporting substrate. In this work, we unambiguously demonstrate ferromagnetic ordering in a single-layer FeCl2 on Au(111) by means of spin-polarized scanning tunnelling microscopy. The material features a relatively wide insulating gap of 3.3 eV and a strongly spin-polarized conduction band that emerges at 1.5 eV above the Fermi level. Atomic scale defects with triangular shape play a primary role in the electronic gap and spin density distribution. Specifically, in a region of 1.6 nm around each defect, the conduction band is locally suppressed and the tunnelling magneto-conductance is reduced a factor of four. By tracking the spin-dependent tunnelling conductance as a function of the applied magnetic field, we record atomically resolved hysteresis loops, revealing a soft ferromagnetic ground state with pronounced out-of-plane anisotropy and coercive fields in the range of 15-50 mT.

22

腔磁力学系统中介导的光学-微波纠缠与态隐形传态#

Optics-microwave entanglement and state teleportation mediated by a cavity magnomechanical system
📚 arXiv👤 F. Engelhardt, A. V. Bondarenko, A. Metelmann, Ya. M. Blanter, S. Viola Kusminskiy, V. A. S. V. Bittencourt📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地提出在单腔磁力学系统中同时实现高效光-微波频率转换与最大稳态纠缠，突破了以往需权衡转换效率与纠缠品质的局限；将纠缠资源用于量子隐形传态协议，为混合量子网络中的微波-光学界面提供了紧凑、可
该工作展示如何在基于共振耦合磁振子与力学激振子的两级光-微波转换装置中产生稳态输出纠缠。纠缠可在频率转换效率最优的同一参数集下最大化，并可用于基于隐形传态的相干输入态转移协议，保真度接近1。作者提出基于微米尺度钇铁石榴石盘的实现方案，通过模拟与合理估计评估优化条件下的性能，预测最大隐形传态保真度为0.75。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作展示如何在基于共振耦合磁振子与力学激振子的两级光-微波转换装置中产生稳态输出纠缠。纠缠可在频率转换效率最优的同一参数集下最大化，并可用于基于隐形传态的相干输入态转移协议，保真度接近1。作者提出基于微米尺度钇铁石榴石盘的实现方案，通过模拟与合理估计评估优化条件下的性能，预测最大隐形传态保真度为0.75。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21754v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Generating usable output-entanglement in continuous variable systems can serve as a viable resource for improving applications in quantum information science. In this work, we show how to generate steady-state output-entanglement in a two-stage conversion setup between optical and microwave photon which employs resonantly coupled magnetic and mechanical excitations, as proposed in Phys. Rev. Applied 18, 044059 (2022). We show that the entanglement can be maximized for the same set of parameters which optimize the frequency-conversion efficiency, and that it can be leveraged for a teleportation-based state-transfer protocol for coherent input-states with fidelity close to unity. We propose an implementation based on an Yittrium Iron Garnet disk of micrometer scale, and use both simulation results and reasonable estimates to assess the performance under optimized conditions. We find a maximum teleportation fidelity of 0.75 for the proposed setup.

伊辛表面缺陷可具有"脏"边界条件#

Ising surface defects can get dirty
📚 arXiv👤 António Antunes, Apratim Kaviraj, Baishali Roy📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示伊辛模型表面在随机磁场无序下可涌现"脏"边界条件这一新普适类，突破了传统边界临界行为的分类框架。通过复制方法解析地追踪了缺陷谱的对数奇异性起源，为理解淬火无序如何重塑高维临界系统的表面临
该工作研究4-ϵ维Wilson-Fisher不动点受限于局域在二维表面上的随机磁场，该表面在ϵ→1的物理极限下成为余维1缺陷。采用复制方法处理无序场，发现普通边界条件在无序下稳定，同时存在可通过调节无序强度或局域温度达到的"脏"边界条件。作者还研究了缺陷谱的对数结构及其通过复制形式的出现机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究4-ϵ维Wilson-Fisher不动点受限于局域在二维表面上的随机磁场，该表面在ϵ→1的物理极限下成为余维1缺陷。采用复制方法处理无序场，发现普通边界条件在无序下稳定，同时存在可通过调节无序强度或局域温度达到的"脏"边界条件。作者还研究了缺陷谱的对数结构及其通过复制形式的出现机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22628v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Real critical systems, such as uniaxial ferromagnets in the 3d Ising universality class, are constrained by boundaries and subject to random couplings. We consider the Wilson-Fisher fixed point in 4-ϵ dimensions subject to a random magnetic field localized on a two-dimensional surface, which becomes co-dimension 1 in the physical ϵ→1 limit. Using the replica method for the disordered field, we find that the ordinary boundary condition is stable under disorder but also discover a non-trivial ``dirty" boundary condition which can be reached by tuning the disorder strength or the local temperature. We also investigate the logarithmic structure of the defect spectrum and how it emerges via the replica formalism.

24

FePS₃中亚稳态磁化的相干太赫兹调控#

Coherent terahertz control of metastable magnetization in FePS3
📚 arXiv👤 Batyr Ilyas, Tianchuang Luo, Honglie Ning, Emil Vinas Bostrom, Alexander von Hoegen, Jaena Park, Junghyun Kim, Je-Geun Park, Angel Rubio, Nuh Gedik📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统磁调控手段，首创利用太赫兹脉冲序列相干驱动声子来操控反铁磁体中的亚稳态磁化，实现飞秒级非易失性磁化振幅双向调控，为超快低能耗光电计算器件开辟了新范式。
该工作利用太赫兹脉冲序列对范德华反铁磁体FePS₃中光诱导亚稳态磁化实现了相干声子调控。通过共振激发红外活性声子相干模式，在飞秒时间尺度上实现了磁化振幅的非易失性按需放大与抑制，为下一代超快光电计算提供了新途径。研究进一步通过偏振和场强依赖实验揭示了相关声子模式的对称性特征。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用太赫兹脉冲序列对范德华反铁磁体FePS₃中光诱导亚稳态磁化实现了相干声子调控。通过共振激发红外活性声子相干模式，在飞秒时间尺度上实现了磁化振幅的非易失性按需放大与抑制，为下一代超快光电计算提供了新途径。研究进一步通过偏振和场强依赖实验揭示了相关声子模式的对称性特征。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.16993v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The crystal lattice governs the emergent electronic, magnetic, and optical properties of quantum materials, making structural tuning through strain, pressure, or chemical substitution a key approach for discovering and controlling novel quantum phases. Beyond static modifications, driving specific lattice modes with ultrafast stimuli offers a dynamic route for tailoring material properties out of equilibrium. However, achieving dynamic coherent control of the nonequilibrium phases via resonant excitation of lattice coherences remains largely unexplored. Such manipulation enables non-volatile, on demand amplification and suppression of order parameters on femtosecond timescales, necessary for next generation optoelectronic ultrafast computation. In this study, we demonstrate coherent phononic control of a newly discovered, light-induced metastable magnetization in the van der Waals antiferromagnet FePS3. By using a sequence of terahertz (THz) pulses, we modulate the magnetization amplitude at the frequencies of phonon coherences, whose infrared-active nature and symmetries are further revealed by polarization- and field-strength-dependent measurements. Furthermore, our two-dimensional THz spectroscopy, in tandem with first-principles numerical simulations, shows that these phonons nonlinearly displace a Raman active phonon, which induces the metastable net magnetization. These findings not only clarify the microscopic mechanism underlying the metastable state in FePS3 but also establish vibrational coherences in solids as a powerful tool for ultrafast quantum phase control, enabling manipulation of material functionalities far from equilibrium.

25

iDART：干涉双交流共振跟踪纳米机电成像技术#

iDART: Interferometric Dual-AC Resonance Tracking nano-electromechanical mapping
📚 arXiv👤 J. Bemis, F. Wunderwald, U. Schroeder, X. Xu, A. Gruverman, R. Proksch📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：iDART技术通过融合干涉检测与双交流共振跟踪，突破了传统PFM在信噪比与非线性效应间的权衡瓶颈。其核心创新在于将飞米级位移分辨与接触共振放大协同，以低偏压实现高灵敏成像，为铁电材料极化表征及纳米机电
该工作提出了干涉检测共振增强双交流共振跟踪（iDART）技术，将正交相位差分干涉测量的飞米级位移灵敏度与接触共振放大相结合。该技术在压电响应力显微镜（PFM）中实现了比现有最优方法（包括单频干涉PFM和常规共振增强PFM）高10倍以上的信噪比提升，有效避免了高驱动偏压引起的静电串扰、焦耳热和针尖诱导翻转等非理想效应，在PZT等材料上展示了显著改善的成像灵敏度。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出了干涉检测共振增强双交流共振跟踪（iDART）技术，将正交相位差分干涉测量的飞米级位移灵敏度与接触共振放大相结合。该技术在压电响应力显微镜（PFM）中实现了比现有最优方法（包括单频干涉PFM和常规共振增强PFM）高10倍以上的信噪比提升，有效避免了高驱动偏压引起的静电串扰、焦耳热和针尖诱导翻转等非理想效应，在PZT等材料上展示了显著改善的成像灵敏度。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.19063v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Piezoresponse force microscopy (PFM) has established itself as a very successful and reliable imaging and spectroscopic tool for measuring a wide variety of nanoscale electromechanical functionalities. Quantitative imaging of nanoscale electromechanical phenomena requires high sensitivity while avoiding artifacts induced by large drive biases. Conventional PFM often relies on high voltages to overcome optical detection noise, leading to various non-ideal effects including electrostatic crosstalk, Joule heating, and tip-induced switching. To mitigate this situation, we introduce interferometrically detected, resonance-enhanced dual AC resonance tracking (iDART), which combines femtometer-scale displacement sensitivity of quadrature phase differential interferometry with contact resonance amplification. Through this combination, iDART achieves 10x or greater signal-to-noise improvement over current state of the art PFM approaches including both single frequency interferometric PFM or conventional, resonance enhanced PFM using optical beam detection. In this work, we demonstrate a >10x improvement of imaging sensitivity on PZT and Y-HfO. Switching spectroscopy shows similar improvements, where further demonstrates reliable hysteresis loops at small biases, mitigating nonlinearities and device failures that can occur at higher excitation amplitudes. These results position iDART as a powerful approach for probing conventional ferroelectrics with extremely high signal to noise down to weak piezoelectric systems, extending functional imaging capabilities to thin films, 2D ferroelectrics, beyond-CMOS technologies and bio-materials.

26

J₁-J₂-J₃ XXZ锯齿链中的平带#

On flat bands in the J₁₋J₂₋J₃ XXZ sawtooth chain
📚 arXiv👤 Vadim Ohanyan, Johannes Richter, Michael Sekania, Lucas Giambattista, Alexei Andreanov, Marcus Kollar📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将平带研究拓展至非均匀键合的DM-XXZ锯齿链，建立三交换参数代数约束的普适框架，揭示局域磁子态与拓扑磁电响应的关联，为电场调控量子磁性及拓扑物态设计提供新途径。
该工作研究了具有Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用的锯齿自旋链XXZ模型推广形式，其中三种交换常数（对称、反对称及轴向各向异性）在每个三角形的不同键上各不相同。推导并求解了确保单磁子谱中出现平带的代数约束条件，分析了平磁子带及局域磁子态的性质，并将DM常数的平带条件映射到Katsura-Nagaosa-Balatsky参数，探讨了利用磁电耦合实现电场驱动平带的可能性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了具有Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用的锯齿自旋链XXZ模型推广形式，其中三种交换常数（对称、反对称及轴向各向异性）在每个三角形的不同键上各不相同。推导并求解了确保单磁子谱中出现平带的代数约束条件，分析了平磁子带及局域磁子态的性质，并将DM常数的平带条件映射到Katsura-Nagaosa-Balatsky参数，探讨了利用磁电耦合实现电场驱动平带的可能性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.15461v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We consider a generalization of the XXZ model on the sawtooth spin chain with Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions in which all exchange constants (symmetric, antisymmetric, and axial anisotropy) are different for the three different bonds of each triangle. We derive and resolve algebraic constraints on the exchange constants ensuring the appearance of a flat band in the one-magnon spectrum. The properties of the corresponding flat magnon bands and localized magnon states are analyzed. We further construct the mapping of the flat-band conditions for the Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya constants onto the Katsura-Nagaosa-Balatsky parameters. Based on the mapping, the possibility of the electric-field-driven flat bands with the aid of the magnetoelectric coupling is examined.

27

铁电动态场驱动形核生长模型：面向预测性材料-电路协同设计#

Ferroelectric dynamic-field-driven nucleation and growth model for predictive materials-to-circuit co-design
📚 arXiv👤 Yi Liang, Soohyeon Kim, Tony Chiang, Megan K. Lenox, Ian Mercer, John J. Plombon, Jon-Paul Maria, Jon F. Ihlefeld, Wenhao Sun, Wei Lu, John T. Heron📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文突破传统KAI/NLS模型恒定电场假设的瓶颈，建立动态场驱动形核生长(DFNG)模型，首次实现任意电压波形下铁电开关瞬态的定量描述与时变畴壁动力学参数提取。该模型架起了材料微观机制与电路宏观性能之
该工作针对传统KAI与NLS模型假设恒定电场的局限性，提出紧凑的动态场驱动形核生长(DFNG)模型。该模型可定量拟合多种铁电材料在任意电压波形下的开关瞬态，提取时变畴壁速度与生长维度，并耦合电路级仿真平台实现存储窗口、干扰误差、速度与能耗的材料-电路协同优化。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对传统KAI与NLS模型假设恒定电场的局限性，提出紧凑的动态场驱动形核生长(DFNG)模型。该模型可定量拟合多种铁电材料在任意电压波形下的开关瞬态，提取时变畴壁速度与生长维度，并耦合电路级仿真平台实现存储窗口、干扰误差、速度与能耗的材料-电路协同优化。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.02957v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Real ferroelectric devices operate under mixed and distorted time-varying voltages, yet the standard nucleation-growth frameworks used to interpret ferroelectric switching - most notably the Kolmogorov-Avrami-Ishibashi (KAI) and nucleation-limited switching models (NLS) - are derived under the critically limiting assumption of a constant electric field. Thus, the prevailing interpretation of ferroelectric switching dynamics fails under real operating conditions. Here we introduce a compact dynamic-field-driven nucleation and growth (DFNG) model that enables quantitative fits to switching transients across multiple ferroelectric materials to extract time-varying domain wall velocity and growth dimensionality, even under arbitrary voltage waveform. This capability then motivates its use in device modeling under complex signals spanning disparate time and frequency scales. Coupling the compact model to application-related waveforms and circuit-level simulation platform facilitates a predictive materials-circuit co-design framework by linking nucleation and growth parameters to memory window, disturb error, speed, and energy dissipation for next-generation ferroelectric technologies.

28

交错磁体CrSb表面的约瑟夫森二极管与自旋阀效应#

Josephson diode and spin-valve effects on the surface of altermagnet CrSb
📚 arXiv👤 V. D. Esin, D. Yu. Kazmin, Yu. S. Barash, A. V. Timonina, N. N. Kolesnikov, E. V. Deviatov📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：首次在交错磁体CrSb基超导器件中同时实现约瑟夫森二极管效应与自旋阀效应，揭示自旋极化拓扑表面态与体带交错磁自旋劈裂的协同机制，为无耗散、非互易超导量子器件及新型拓扑超导计算方案提供了实验基础。
该工作实验研究了超导铟电极与厚单晶交错磁体CrSb构成的In-CrSb及In-CrSb-In近邻器件中的电荷输运。双结器件中观测到dV/dI(B)曲线对零场的镜像对称性，呈现约瑟夫森自旋阀特征；同时通过直接测量外场中两个相反方向的临界电流，实现了约瑟夫森二极管效应。作者将上述现象归因于CrSb自旋极化拓扑表面态与体带交错磁自旋劈裂的联合作用。单界面处超导能隙在磁场中呈现类似Fulde-Ferrell-Larkin-Ovchinniko…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作实验研究了超导铟电极与厚单晶交错磁体CrSb构成的In-CrSb及In-CrSb-In近邻器件中的电荷输运。双结器件中观测到dV/dI(B)曲线对零场的镜像对称性，呈现约瑟夫森自旋阀特征；同时通过直接测量外场中两个相反方向的临界电流，实现了约瑟夫森二极管效应。作者将上述现象归因于CrSb自旋极化拓扑表面态与体带交错磁自旋劈裂的联合作用。单界面处超导能隙在磁场中呈现类似Fulde-Ferrell-Larkin-Ovchinnikov（FFLO）的振荡行为，有限动量库珀对与约瑟夫森二极管效应的要求完全兼容。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.08766v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We experimentally investigate charge transport in In-CrSb and In-CrSb-In proximity devices, which are formed as junctions between superconducting indium leads and thick single crystal flakes of altermagnet CrSb. For double In-CrSb-In junctions, dV/dI(B) curves are mirrored in respect to zero field for two magnetic field sweep directions, which is characteristic behavior of a Josephson spin valve. Also, we demonstrate Josephson diode effect by direct measurement of the critical current for two opposite directions in external magnetic field. We interpret these observations as a joint effect of the spin-polarized topological surface states and the altermagnetic spin splitting of the bulk bands in CrSb. For a single In-CrSb interface, the superconducting gap oscillates in magnetic field for both field orientations, which strongly resembles the Fulde-Ferrell-Larkin-Ovchinnikov (FFLO) behavior. FFLO is based on finite-momentum Cooper pairing, therefore, it is fully compatible with the requirements for the Josephson diode effect.

29

交错磁体中的非微扰磁轨道霍尔效应#

Nonperturbative Magnetic Orbital Hall Effect in Altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Xukun Feng, Jin Cao, Lay Kee Ang, Shengyuan A. Yang, Cong Xiao, X. C. Xie📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地发现交错磁体中存在一类不依赖于自旋-轨道耦合强度的磁轨道霍尔效应，颠覆了传统以SOC强弱评估现象重要性的范式。其核心创新在于揭示该效应在所有共线交错磁体对称类中普适存在，且响应强度可超越
该工作揭示了交错磁体中一种非微扰于自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）强度的磁轨道霍尔效应，挑战了以SOC依赖度评判交错磁体现象重要性的常规认知。该效应在传统共线反铁磁体中严格禁戒，但在全部十种共线交错磁体自旋劳厄类中普适存在。反直觉的是，尽管由SOC诱导，其量级可达巨值，甚至超过非相对论自旋霍尔效应；交错磁对称性还允许非常规共线极化轨道电流，实现无外场调控垂直磁化。第一性原理计算预测实验已确立的交错磁体CrSb和FeSb2在室温下具有强响应。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作揭示了交错磁体中一种非微扰于自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）强度的磁轨道霍尔效应，挑战了以SOC依赖度评判交错磁体现象重要性的常规认知。该效应在传统共线反铁磁体中严格禁戒，但在全部十种共线交错磁体自旋劳厄类中普适存在。反直觉的是，尽管由SOC诱导，其量级可达巨值，甚至超过非相对论自旋霍尔效应；交错磁对称性还允许非常规共线极化轨道电流，实现无外场调控垂直磁化。第一性原理计算预测实验已确立的交错磁体CrSb和FeSb2在室温下具有强响应。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.19076v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Recent studies on altermagnets have focused considerable attention on nonrelativistic effects that persist in the absence of spin-orbit coupling (SOC). As a result, the relative importance of various phenomena in altermagnets has commonly been judged by their dependence on SOC. Here, we challenge this common wisdom by uncovering the magnetic orbital Hall effect, which is nonperturbative in SOC strength. We establish the symmetry properties of this effect, demonstrating that it is strictly forbidden in conventional collinear antiferromagnets yet universally allowed in all ten spin-Laue classes of collinear altermagnets. Counterintuitively, although SOC-induced, it reaches giant magnitudes in altermagnets-comparable to or even exceeding the nonrelativistic spin Hall effect. Moreover, altermagnetic symmetry enables unconventional collinear-polarized orbital currents, allowing field-free manipulation of perpendicular magnetization. Our first-principles calculations predict strong room-temperature responses in the experimentally established altermagnets CrSb and FeSb2. These findings reveal the previously overlooked potential of altermagnetic orbitronics and broaden the horizons for altermagnets in high-performance magnetic memory applications.

30

应变SrTiO3中的织构极化相#

A textured polar phase in strained SrTiO3
📚 arXiv👤 Huaiyu Hugo Wang, Ernesto Flores, Jade Stanton, Gal Orenstein, Peter R. Miedaner, Laura Foglia, Maya Martinez, David A. Reis, Roman Mankowsky, Mathias Sander, Henrik Lemke, Serhane Zerdane, Keith A. Nelson, Mariano Trigo📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地揭示应变SrTiO₃中存在有限波矢的极化织构相，而非传统均匀铁电体，首次将太赫兹泵浦- X射线探测技术用于探测隐藏量子有序态，为理解量子顺电体长达数十年的反常行为提供了全新范式，开辟了利
该工作结合单轴应变、单周期太赫兹激发与飞秒X射线散射，测量了钛酸锶极化集体模式随动量和应变的演化。适度拉伸应变下，新振动模式在有限波矢而非布里渊区中心出现，表明有序态为纳米尺度的极化织构而非均匀铁电体。未应变量子顺电钛酸锶可自然理解为该织构相的无序前驱，为这一长达数十年的谜题提供了新解释，展示了有限动量集体激发如何导致隐藏的量子有序态。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合单轴应变、单周期太赫兹激发与飞秒X射线散射，测量了钛酸锶极化集体模式随动量和应变的演化。适度拉伸应变下，新振动模式在有限波矢而非布里渊区中心出现，表明有序态为纳米尺度的极化织构而非均匀铁电体。未应变量子顺电钛酸锶可自然理解为该织构相的无序前驱，为这一长达数十年的谜题提供了新解释，展示了有限动量集体激发如何导致隐藏的量子有序态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.12239v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Quantum materials can harbour hidden phases whose microscopic structures differ from conventional ordered states while reproducing their macroscopic signatures, making them easy to miss. Strontium titanate is a longstanding puzzle of this kind: on cooling it shows every hallmark of an incipient ferroelectric, yet never orders, and is usually described as a quantum paraelectric in which fluctuations suppress ferroelectricity. Here we combine uniaxial strain, single-cycle terahertz excitation and femtosecond x-ray scattering to measure the polar collective modes of strontium titanate as a function of momentum and strain. Under modest tensile strain, we observe a new vibrational mode that emerges not at the Brillouin zone centre, as a ferroelectric transition would require, but at finite wavevector, identifying the ordered state as a polar texture on nanometre length scales rather than a uniform ferroelectric. Unstrained quantum paraelectric strontium titanate is then naturally understood as the disordered precursor of this textured phase, offering a resolution to a decades-old puzzle and illustrating how finite-momentum collective excitations can unmask hidden phases in quantum materials.

31

磁子介导的微波-光学时间动力学#

Magnon-mediated microwave to optical time dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Rajkumar Jadhav, Xinglin Zeng, Cedric Traub, Fabian Engelhardt, Abdullah Alabbadi, Arghadeep Pal, Pascal Del'Haye, Silvia Viola Kusminskiy, Birgit Stiller📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统磁子-光子耦合的稳态研究范式，首次实现与磁子衰减时间相当的微波-光学实时动态转换，核心创新在于利用布里渊光散射将磁子波形特征映射至光学边带。该技术为磁子寿命原位测量、磁子非平衡动力学及混
该研究利用YIG微球中的光磁子调制，在可与磁子衰减时间相比拟的时间尺度上实现了微波到光学的实时动态转换。通过电感激发微波域磁子，并利用基于磁子的布里渊光散射将激发磁子波形的特征转换至光学边带，成功恢复了磁子的方波调制信号。该工作为磁子寿命实时测量及磁子耦合研究开辟了新方向。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用YIG微球中的光磁子调制，在可与磁子衰减时间相比拟的时间尺度上实现了微波到光学的实时动态转换。通过电感激发微波域磁子，并利用基于磁子的布里渊光散射将激发磁子波形的特征转换至光学边带，成功恢复了磁子的方波调制信号。该工作为磁子寿命实时测量及磁子耦合研究开辟了新方向。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.22772v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Optomagnonic modulation techniques are an emerging platform for information transfer from the microwave to the optical domain. However, these techniques focus largely on the spectral domain of the transduced signal. Given the potential of the field to bridge the gap between microwave and optical signals, analyzing and studying the interactions real-time in temporal domain becomes equally essential. In this work, we exploit the optomagnonic modulation in a YIG microsphere to demonstrate and study microwave to optical real-time dynamic transfer on a time scale comparable to the decay of magnons. We inductively excite magnons in the microwave domain and use magnon-based Brillouin light scattering to transduce the signature of excited magnonic waveforms to the optical domain. The square type modulation of the magnons is retrieved in the corresponding optical sidebands. Our work enables real-time measurement of the magnonic dynamics and therefore direct access to lifetime measurements of the magnonic mode. Providing insight into the temporal dynamics of magnons, this work can open up new promising research directions such as in magnon coupled superconducting qubits or magnon-based Brillouin memory.

Symmetry-Broken Ground State and Phonon-Mediated Superconductivity in Kagome CsV₃Sb₅
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 Manex Alkorta, Martin Gutierrez-Amigo, Đorđe Dangić, Chunyu Mark Guo, Philip J. W. Moll, Maia G. Vergniory, and Ion Errea📅 2026-05-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在kagome金属CsV₃Sb₅中揭示电荷密度波、超导与自发时间反演对称性破缺的三者耦合，阐明电子关联驱动拓扑量子态演化的微观机制，为设计新型拓扑超导材料提供关键实验判据与理论框架。
在非磁性kagome金属AV₃Sb₅（A=K, Rb, Cs）家族中，系统研究了电荷密度波序、超导、非平庸拓扑与自发时间反演对称性破缺之间的相互作用。该工作为理解kagome体系中电子关联与拓扑量子态的耦合机制提供了新见解。

该工作提出了一种二维三角晶格上的轨道多铁性理论机制，突破了此前二维体系多铁性研究主要聚焦于自旋驱动机制的局限。研究揭示了耦合自旋-轨道序的独特物理，为探索新型二维多铁材料提供了新方向。

AI 解读：该研究首次在单分子层面实现同手性涡旋磁矩闭合环，突破分子级磁手性结构构建难题。Dy₃三角形磁矩体为磁电耦合及非磁性磁态调控提供了全新分子平台，有望推动分子自旋电子学器件发展。
磁性与手性的结合可实现磁手性和磁电耦合，从而以非磁性方式调控磁态；然而，在分子水平上构建合适的同手性涡旋状结构颇具挑战。如今，研究人员已合成出由对映纯手性配体支撑的同手性自组装Dy₃三角形，其磁矩呈涡旋状闭合环排列。Doran, B. R. Proc. Harvard Celt. Colloq. 15, 258–289 (1995). Google Scholar Flack, H. D. Acta Crystallogr. A65,…

English Abstract

The combination of magnetism and chirality enables magnetochiral and magnetoelectric coupling for non-magnetic control of magnetic states; however, achieving suitable homochiral vortex-like architectures at the molecular level is challenging. Now, homochiral self-assembled Dy3triangles supported by enantiopure chiral ligands exhibiting magnetic moments arranged in a vortex-like closed loop have been synthesized. Doran, B. R.Proc.
