多层镍酸盐电子结构与自旋密度波重构中的氧中心平面轨道#

Oxygen-centred planar orbitals in the electronic structure and spin-density-wave reconstruction of multilayer nickelates
📚 Nature Physics👤 Christine C. Au-Yeung, Xinglong Chen, S. Smit, M. Bluschke 等21位作者📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本研究利用La₃Ni₂O₇天然多型性，首次在块体镍酸盐中观测到非公度自旋密度波相干重构费米面能隙，揭示氧面内轨道主导第一电子移除态并调控磁性与超导竞争，建立了镍酸盐与铜氧化物超导微观起源的直接对应。
多层镍酸盐中高温超导性的最新发现，引发了关于其电子起源及与铜氧化物可能关联的根本性问题。本研究利用块体La₃Ni₂O₇晶体中双层与交替单层-三层堆垛序列之间的天然多型性，结合角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）与有效紧束缚模型，识别了多层镍酸盐中共同的电子现象学特征，包括掺杂依赖的非公度自旋密度波不稳定性具有足够相干性以重构并部分打开费米面能隙。偏振依赖的ARPES揭示，第一电子移除态主要由氧中心的面内轨道主导，且掺杂——因而这些轨道的占据…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

多层镍酸盐中高温超导性的最新发现，引发了关于其电子起源及与铜氧化物可能关联的根本性问题。本研究利用块体La₃Ni₂O₇晶体中双层与交替单层-三层堆垛序列之间的天然多型性，结合角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）与有效紧束缚模型，识别了多层镍酸盐中共同的电子现象学特征，包括掺杂依赖的非公度自旋密度波不稳定性具有足够相干性以重构并部分打开费米面能隙。偏振依赖的ARPES揭示，第一电子移除态主要由氧中心的面内轨道主导，且掺杂——因而这些轨道的占据情况——控制着费米面拓扑以及磁性与超导不稳定性之间的竞争。我们的结果建立了层状镍酸盐与铜氧化物低能电子结构之间的直接对应关系，并指出两者非常规超导性具有共同的微观起源，尽管镍酸盐具有多轨道特征。

English Abstract

The recent discovery of high-temperature superconductivity in multilayer nickelates has raised fundamental questions about its electronic origins and possible connection to the cuprates. Here we identify a common electronic phenomenology across multilayer nickelates, including signatures of a doping-dependent incommensurate spin-density-wave instability coherent enough to reconstruct and partially gap the Fermi surface. We achieve this by exploiting the natural polymorphism between bilayer and alternating monolayer–trilayer stacking sequences in bulk La3Ni2O7crystals and by combining angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) with effective tight-binding modelling. Polarization-dependent ARPES reveals that the first electron-removal states are dominated by oxygen-centred planar orbitals and that doping—and thus the occupation of these orbitals—controls the Fermi-surface topology and the competition between magnetic and superconducting instabilities. Our results establish a direct correspondence between the low-energy electronic structure of layered nickelates and cuprates and point to a common microscopic origin of their unconventional superconductivity, despite the multi-orbital character of the nickelates.

36

单层MoS₂中场可调自旋-谷输运#

Field-tunable spin-valley transport in monolayer MoS₂
📚 arXiv👤 Kamal Azaidaoui, Hocine Bahlouli, Clarence Cortes, David Laroze, Ahmed Jellal📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：单层MoS₂中，作者创新性地将椭圆偏振光与静电势垒结合，利用Floquet理论构建光重整化有效模型，实现自旋-谷输运的协同光场调控。该方案突破了传统静电调控的局限，首次证明同一器件可通过调节激光参数在
该工作研究单层MoS₂在单个静电势垒和均匀非共振椭圆偏振光辐照下的场控自旋-谷输运。基于含内禀自旋-轨道耦合的大质量狄拉克哈密顿量，利用高频Floquet展开获得激光重整化质量项的有效静态模型，通过旋量匹配求解散射问题并导出透射率的精确解析表达式。数值结果表明，光场可同时调控势垒内自旋-谷依赖的传播阈值和法布里-珀罗相位，产生可控的通/禁带；通过调节激光强度和偏振形状，同一结可在宽带谷滤波和共振选择模式间切换，且谷对比度在朗道尔电导中…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究单层MoS₂在单个静电势垒和均匀非共振椭圆偏振光辐照下的场控自旋-谷输运。基于含内禀自旋-轨道耦合的大质量狄拉克哈密顿量，利用高频Floquet展开获得激光重整化质量项的有效静态模型，通过旋量匹配求解散射问题并导出透射率的精确解析表达式。数值结果表明，光场可同时调控势垒内自旋-谷依赖的传播阈值和法布里-珀罗相位，产生可控的通/禁带；通过调节激光强度和偏振形状，同一结可在宽带谷滤波和共振选择模式间切换，且谷对比度在朗道尔电导中保持可见。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20790v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study field-controlled spin-valley transport in monolayer MoS₂ through a single electrostatic barrier and a uniform off-resonant elliptically polarized irradiation. Starting from the massive Dirac Hamiltonian with intrinsic spin-orbit coupling, we use a high-frequency Floquet expansion to obtain an effective static model with a laser-renormalized mass (gap) term. We solve the scattering problem by spinor matching and derive the exact analytic expression for the transmission. The numerical results show that the drive tunes both the spin-valley-dependent propagation threshold inside the barrier and the Fabry-Pérot phase, creating controllable pass/stop bands. By varying both the laser intensity (amplitude) and the polarization shape, we show that the same junction can be switched between broadband valley filtering and resonance-selective operation, and the valley contrast remains visible in the Landauer conductance. Our findings establish an efficient route for realizing optically reconfigurable valleytronic and spintronic functionalities in MoS₂.

37

缺碱K₁₋ₓCrTe₂（x≈0.3）单晶的面内铁磁性与临界动力学#

In-Plane Ferromagnetism and Critical Dynamics in Alkali-Deficient K₁₋ₓCrTe₂ (with x approx 0.3) Single Crystals
📚 arXiv👤 Catherine Witteveen, Felix Eder, Sara A. López-Paz, Vladimir Pomjakushin, Jonas A. Krieger, Zurab Guguchia, Harald O. Jeschke, Martin Månsson, Fabian O. von Rohr📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次合成缺碱K₁₋ₓCrTe₂单晶，发现其独特的三角棱柱配位结构诱导面内铁磁性，打破ACrX₂家族的面外反铁磁传统，揭示碱金属空位对自旋取向的调控机制，为二维磁体的磁各向异性与临界动力学研究提供
该工作报道缺碱K₁₋ₓCrTe₂（x≈0.3）单晶的合成与表征，其结晶于Cm空间群，具有三角棱柱配位的K⁺，区别于更化学计量比ACrX₂化合物的八面体环境。磁化测量显示在T_C=117 K处发生尖锐铁磁转变，并具有面内磁各向异性，得到密度泛函理论支持。中子衍射揭示层内和层间Cr自旋的铁磁排列，这与LiCrTe₂和NaCrTe₂的面外A型反铁磁性形成对比，但与CrTe₂相似。交流磁化率和μSR表明T_C以上存在短程序、以下存在动力学行为…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道缺碱K₁₋ₓCrTe₂（x≈0.3）单晶的合成与表征，其结晶于Cm空间群，具有三角棱柱配位的K⁺，区别于更化学计量比ACrX₂化合物的八面体环境。磁化测量显示在T_C=117 K处发生尖锐铁磁转变，并具有面内磁各向异性，得到密度泛函理论支持。中子衍射揭示层内和层间Cr自旋的铁磁排列，这与LiCrTe₂和NaCrTe₂的面外A型反铁磁性形成对比，但与CrTe₂相似。交流磁化率和μSR表明T_C以上存在短程序、以下存在动力学行为，为研究二维磁体中自旋取向和维度性提供了可调平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20972v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Layered chromium tellurides are model systems for studying low-dimensional magnetism in van der Waals materials. We report the synthesis and characterization of K₁₋ₓCrTe₂ single crystals (x approx 0.3), which crystallize in the Cm space group with trigonal prismatic K⁺ coordination, unlike the octahedral environments of more stoichiometric ACrX₂ compounds. Magnetization measurements show a sharp ferromagnetic transition at Tₘ̊ C=117 K and in-plane magnetic anisotropy, supported by density functional theory. Neutron diffraction reveals ferromagnetic alignment of Cr spins within and between layers. This contrasts with the out-of-plane A-type antiferromagnetism in LiCrTe₂ and NaCrTe₂, but resembles CrTe₂. These differences likely arise from changes in interlayer spacing, Cr oxidation state, or stacking. AC susceptibility and μSR indicate short-range order above Tₘ̊ C and dynamic behavior below. Overall, K₁₋ₓCrTe₂ provides a tunable platform for studying spin orientation and dimensionality in two-dimensional magnets.

38

电纺CFO-BCTSn纳米复合材料的多铁性及其磁电与磁场传感应用#

Multiferroic Properties of Electrospun CFO-BCTSn Nanocomposites for Magnetoelectric and Magnetic Field Sensing Applications
📚 arXiv👤 Youness Hadouch, Nayad Abdallah, Daoud Mezzane, Mbarek Amjoud, Voicu Dolocan, Khalid Hoummada, Nikola Novak, Anna Razumnaya, Brigita Rozic, Val Fisinger, Hana Ursic, Valentin Laguta, Zdravko Kutnjak, Mimoun El Marssi📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：采用溶胶-凝胶电纺法制备无铅CFO-BCTSn多铁复合纳米纤维，实现尖晶石-钙钛矿两相共存与显著磁电耦合，为纳米级磁电器件及高灵敏度磁场传感提供了新型环保材料平台。
该研究采用溶胶-凝胶电纺法制备多铁CFO-BCTSn复合纳米纤维。电子显微镜显示纤维直径为120-150 nm；X射线衍射、拉曼光谱和高分辨透射电镜证实尖晶石CFO相和钙钛矿BCTSn相共存且无可见次生相。磁滞回线测量展示纳米纤维的磁性行为，压电力显微镜确认其压电性；电学极化与未极化样品的磁滞回线差异证明磁电耦合。这些无铅复合纳米纤维在纳米尺度磁电器件和磁场传感应用中展现出潜力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究采用溶胶-凝胶电纺法制备多铁CFO-BCTSn复合纳米纤维。电子显微镜显示纤维直径为120-150 nm；X射线衍射、拉曼光谱和高分辨透射电镜证实尖晶石CFO相和钙钛矿BCTSn相共存且无可见次生相。磁滞回线测量展示纳米纤维的磁性行为，压电力显微镜确认其压电性；电学极化与未极化样品的磁滞回线差异证明磁电耦合。这些无铅复合纳米纤维在纳米尺度磁电器件和磁场传感应用中展现出潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20986v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multiferroic CFO-BCTSn composite nanofibers were synthesized using a sol-gel electrospinning method. Electron microscopy revealed well-defined fibers with diameters of 120-150 nm. Structural analyses using X-ray diffraction, Raman spectroscopy, and high-resolution transmission electron microscopy confirmed the coexistence of the spinel CFO phase and the perovskite BCTSn phase without detectable secondary phases. Magnetic hysteresis measurements demonstrated the magnetic behavior of the nanofibers, while piezoresponse force microscopy confirmed their piezoelectric properties. Magnetoelectric coupling was evidenced by differences between the magnetic hysteresis loops of electrically poled and unpoled samples. These lead-free composite nanofibers show potential for nanoscale magnetoelectric devices and magnetic field sensing applications.

39

用于磁子-光子耦合的附接开口谐振环腔#

Attached Split Ring Resonator Cavity for Magnon Photon Coupling
📚 arXiv👤 Aram Akoi, Liubov Ivzhenko, Maciej Krawczyk📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将附接开口谐振环腔与YIG集成，构建芯片级磁子-光子耦合平台。核心突破在于揭示几何形状（非磁体积）是调控耦合的关键因素，圆盘YIG因磁场重叠优化实现最强协同性（25.30）。该设计为低功
该工作提出基于附接开口谐振环（ASRR）与钇铁石榴石（YIG）结构集成的芯片级平面腔平台，在紧凑混合系统中实现强磁子-光子耦合。通过数值优化ASRR几何参数（环间距、间隙宽度、衬底厚度和介电常数），获得Q=190@5.48 GHz的品质因数，实现强微波磁场约束和降低的辐射损耗。优化腔体与三种YIG几何形状（全环、半环、圆盘）耦合：全环几何展现平衡性能（耦合强度115 MHz，协同性13.10），半环具有可比耦合强度108 MHz和略高…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出基于附接开口谐振环（ASRR）与钇铁石榴石（YIG）结构集成的芯片级平面腔平台，在紧凑混合系统中实现强磁子-光子耦合。通过数值优化ASRR几何参数（环间距、间隙宽度、衬底厚度和介电常数），获得Q=190@5.48 GHz的品质因数，实现强微波磁场约束和降低的辐射损耗。优化腔体与三种YIG几何形状（全环、半环、圆盘）耦合：全环几何展现平衡性能（耦合强度115 MHz，协同性13.10），半环具有可比耦合强度108 MHz和略高协同性13.50，而圆盘几何在较低偏置磁场下耦合且实现最强相互作用（135 MHz，25.30），归因于改善的微波磁场重叠。结果表明几何形状而非仅磁体积是调控耦合的关键因素。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21004v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a chip scale planar cavity platform based on an attached split ring resonator (ASRR) integrated with yttrium iron garnet (YIG) structures to achieve strong magnon photon coupling in a compact hybrid system. The ASRR geometry was numerically optimized by tuning inter ring spacing, gap width, substrate thickness, and permittivity, resulting in a quality factor of Q = 190 at 5.48 GHz, enabling strong microwave magnetic field confinement and reduced radiative losses. The optimized cavity was coupled to YIG elements of three geometries: full ring, half ring, and disk. Full electromagnetic simulations show that the full ring geometry exhibits balanced performance with coupling strength 115 MHz and cooperativity 13.10, while the half ring shows a comparable coupling strength of 108 MHz and slightly higher cooperativity 13.50, despite edge induced demagnetizing effects. In contrast, the disk geometry couples at lower bias magnetic fields and achieves the strongest interaction (135 MHz, 25.30), enabled by improved microwave magnetic field overlap. These results demonstrate that geometry, rather than magnetic volume alone, is a key design parameter for tailoring magnon photon coupling, providing a practical framework for lithography compatible, on chip hybrid magnonic and quantum devices.

40

标量手性海森堡三角晶格中斯格明子晶体SkX-2的性质#

Properties of the skyrmion crystal SkX-2 in the Heisenberg triangular lattice with scalar chirality
📚 arXiv👤 H. Bocquet, C. J. Ganahl, M. Scheurer, P. M. Derlet, A. M. Läuchli📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在标量手性海森堡模型中发现新型斯格明子晶体SkX-2，其核心创新在于突破传统单胞单电荷框架，实现双拓扑电荷构型，并在保持SO(3)对称性的短程相互作用模型中证明其本征稳定性。研究意义在于：为量子
该研究发现一种具有每单胞两个拓扑电荷且在倒空间铁磁点处无磁化的斯格明子晶体SkX-2，在具有短程相互作用的SO(3)对称模型中自然稳定，该模型由标量手性海森堡三角晶格实现。数值结果辅以理论分析，定量描述从铁磁基态到SkX-2的相变及拓扑电荷密度的演化。尽管有限温度下受Mermin-Wagner定理约束，SkX-2仍表现出与平移对称性破缺相关的一级相变和向浮动固体的连续相变，取决于模型参数控制的电荷密度。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究发现一种具有每单胞两个拓扑电荷且在倒空间铁磁点处无磁化的斯格明子晶体SkX-2，在具有短程相互作用的SO(3)对称模型中自然稳定，该模型由标量手性海森堡三角晶格实现。数值结果辅以理论分析，定量描述从铁磁基态到SkX-2的相变及拓扑电荷密度的演化。尽管有限温度下受Mermin-Wagner定理约束，SkX-2仍表现出与平移对称性破缺相关的一级相变和向浮动固体的连续相变，取决于模型参数控制的电荷密度。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21010v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Skyrmion crystals have been primarily discovered under a magnetic field for materials with non-centrosymmetric interactions. More recent developments have investigated the stability of skyrmion crystals in itinerant magnets without magnetic field. In this study, we find that a type of skyrmion crystal with two topological charges per unit cell and no magnetization at the ferromagnetic point in reciprocal space, SkX-2, is naturally stabilized in an SO(3)-symmetric model with short-range interactions realized by the Heisenberg model on the triangular lattice with scalar chirality. We complement our numerical results with a theoretical analysis that quantitatively describes the transition from the ferromagnetic ground state to the SkX-2 and the evolution of the topological charge density. Despite the constraints given by the Mermin-Wagner theorem at finite temperature, the SkX-2 exhibits both a first-order phase transition associated with translation symmetry breaking and a continuous transition to a floating solid, depending on the charge density controlled by the model parameters. Finally, the tetrahedral phase supported by an antiferromagnetic interaction in our model is found to host Z₂₋ᵥₒᵣₜᵢces at finite temperature, suggesting the existence of an additional vortex topological transition.

41

石墨烯中的自旋佩尔捷效应#

Spin Peltier effect in graphene
📚 arXiv👤 Xin Theng Lee, Xin Hu, Yuya Ominato, Masahiro Tatsuno, Takeo Kato, Mamoru Matsuo📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地揭示石墨烯/铁磁绝缘体异质结构中，外磁场诱导的朗道能级量子化及其交叉效应可显著增强自旋翻转散射，从而放大自旋佩尔捷响应。这为狄拉克材料自旋热电器件的设计提供了关键理论指导。
该工作理论上研究石墨烯/铁磁绝缘体（FI）异质结构中的自旋-佩尔捷效应。基于石墨烯/FI界面特征自旋翻转散射长度的微观形式体系，分析石墨烯中自旋积累如何导致结两侧温差。研究表明，在外磁场下石墨烯电子谱量子化为朗道能级，显著改变可用自旋翻转散射通道；特别是朗道能级间的交叉大幅增强自旋翻转散射振幅，导致自旋-佩尔捷响应的显著放大。该结果为结合狄拉克材料和磁性绝缘体的混合系统中自旋驱动热效应提供了理论框架。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作理论上研究石墨烯/铁磁绝缘体（FI）异质结构中的自旋-佩尔捷效应。基于石墨烯/FI界面特征自旋翻转散射长度的微观形式体系，分析石墨烯中自旋积累如何导致结两侧温差。研究表明，在外磁场下石墨烯电子谱量子化为朗道能级，显著改变可用自旋翻转散射通道；特别是朗道能级间的交叉大幅增强自旋翻转散射振幅，导致自旋-佩尔捷响应的显著放大。该结果为结合狄拉克材料和磁性绝缘体的混合系统中自旋驱动热效应提供了理论框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21087v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In this work, we theoretically investigate the spin-Peltier effect in a heterostructure composed of graphene and a ferromagnetic insulator (FI). Using a microscopic formalism based on the characteristic spin-flip scattering length at the graphene/FI interface, we analyze how spin accumulation in graphene gives rise to a temperature difference across the junction. We show that, in the presence of an external magnetic field, the electronic spectrum of graphene is quantized into Landau levels, which strongly modifies the available spin-flip scattering channels. In particular, crossings between Landau levels significantly enhance the spin-flip scattering amplitude, leading to a pronounced amplification of the spin-Peltier response. Our results suggest that measurements of the spin-induced temperature difference in graphene-FI heterostructures can serve as a sensitive probe of discrete electronic energy levels. More broadly, this work provides a theoretical framework for understanding spin-driven thermal effects in hybrid systems combining Dirac materials and magnetic insulators.

42

呼吸烧绿石尖晶石AgInCr₄S₈单晶的磁性#

Magnetism of single crystalline breathing pyrochlore spinel AgInCr4S8
📚 arXiv👤 Andrew F. May, Christopher M. Pasco, V. O. Garlea, Karolina Gornicka, Matthias D. Frontzek, Xiaoping Wang, Pyeongjae Park, Andrew D. Christianson📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在AgInCr₄S₈单晶中实现呼吸烧绿石晶格，揭示非公度螺旋磁有序及高温顺磁相中的强自旋关联。该体系为研究几何阻挫量子磁性与拓扑自旋激发提供了理想材料平台。
该工作通过化学气相输运生长AgInCr₄S₈单晶，X射线和中子衍射证实Ag/In的结晶有序化导致Cr³⁺形成呼吸烧绿石构型。在T_N≈9.6 K以下观察到长程反铁磁有序。比热数据显示9.5 K附近小的λ异常，估计的磁熵在3T_N时达到预期值的约1/3，表明顺磁相中存在显著短程序。单晶中子衍射证实传播矢量k=(0,0,δ)、δ=0.343（5 K）的非公度自旋结构；最小模型由Cr原子的铁磁层组成，磁矩位于层面内并在垂直方向调制形成沿k传…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过化学气相输运生长AgInCr₄S₈单晶，X射线和中子衍射证实Ag/In的结晶有序化导致Cr³⁺形成呼吸烧绿石构型。在T_N≈9.6 K以下观察到长程反铁磁有序。比热数据显示9.5 K附近小的λ异常，估计的磁熵在3T_N时达到预期值的约1/3，表明顺磁相中存在显著短程序。单晶中子衍射证实传播矢量k=(0,0,δ)、δ=0.343（5 K）的非公度自旋结构；最小模型由Cr原子的铁磁层组成，磁矩位于层面内并在垂直方向调制形成沿k传播的螺旋结构。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21122v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Single crystals of ȩAgInCr4S8 were grown by chemical vapor transport and crystallographic ordering of Ag/In that results in a breathing pyrochlore motif of Cr³⁺ was verified by x-ray and neutron diffraction. Long-range antiferromagnetic order is observed below a Néel temperature of Tₘₐₜₕᵣₘ N approx 9.6 K. The magnetic properties are characterized using ac and dc magnetization, specific heat capacity, and single crystal neutron diffraction measurements. The specific heat data are characterized by a small lambda anomaly near 9.5 K and the estimated magnetic entropy reaches approx frac13 of the expected value by 3Tₘₐₜₕᵣₘ N, suggesting significant short-range order in the paramagnetic phase. Single crystal neutron diffraction evidences an incommensurate spin structure with propagation vector textbfk = (0,0,δ) and δ = 0.343 at 5 K. The minimal model that accounts for the data consists of ferromagnetic layers of Cr atoms, with magnetic moments lying in the plane of the layers and modulating in the perpendicular direction to form a helical structure propagating along textbfk. This study represents a rare investigation of single crystals within the family of breathing pyrochlore materials.

43

多层3R-MoS₂铁电翻转的剪切模拉曼成像#

Shear-Mode Raman Imaging of Ferroelectric Switching in Multilayer 3R-MoS₂
📚 arXiv👤 Yulu Liu, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Xiaoxiang Xi📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将剪切模拉曼成像应用于滑移铁电体系，首次实现多层3R-MoS₂铁电翻转过程的原位、非侵入追踪，揭示层间畴壁可驻留于选定层对形成部分堆垛转变，并发现钉扎位点与边界手性取向对翻转动力学的关键
该工作利用剪切模拉曼成像追踪多层3R-MoS₂中的铁电翻转。单个薄片内机械分割区域独立响应并遵循不同路径；部分极化的终态表明畴壁可驻留在选定层对之间，产生部分堆垛转变。中间态的停留时间变化广泛，表明钉扎位点强烈影响动力学。二次谐波产生测量进一步揭示三种特征样品边界和畴壁取向，包括zigzag-armchair角平分线附近普遍的手性方向。这些结果为原型滑移铁电中畴壁介导翻转提供了直接、非侵入的视角，并确定钉扎和剥离产生的边界是调控其动力…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用剪切模拉曼成像追踪多层3R-MoS₂中的铁电翻转。单个薄片内机械分割区域独立响应并遵循不同路径；部分极化的终态表明畴壁可驻留在选定层对之间，产生部分堆垛转变。中间态的停留时间变化广泛，表明钉扎位点强烈影响动力学。二次谐波产生测量进一步揭示三种特征样品边界和畴壁取向，包括zigzag-armchair角平分线附近普遍的手性方向。这些结果为原型滑移铁电中畴壁介导翻转提供了直接、非侵入的视角，并确定钉扎和剥离产生的边界是调控其动力学的关键因素。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21210v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We use shear-mode Raman imaging to track ferroelectric switching in multilayer 3R-MoS₂. Within a single flake, mechanically segmented regions respond independently and follow distinct pathways. Partially polarized end states indicate that domain walls can reside between selected layer pairs, producing partial stacking transformations. The dwell time of intermediate states varies widely, indicating that pinning sites strongly influence the dynamics. Second-harmonic generation measurements further reveal three characteristic sample-boundary and domain-wall orientations, including a prevalent chiral direction near the zigzag-armchair bisector. These results provide a direct, noninvasive view of domain-wall-mediated switching in a prototypical sliding ferroelectric and identify pinning and exfoliation-created boundaries as key factors governing its dynamics.

44

MoTe₂/WSe₂莫尔双层中堆垛序依赖的电子性质#

Stacking-order-dependent electronic properties of MoTe2/WSe2 moiré bilayers
📚 arXiv👤 Zhongdong Han, Wenjin Zhao, Eegene Clara Chung, Chia-Hao Lee, Zui Tao, Zhengchao Xia, Yichi Zhang, Yiyu Xia, Jekwan Lee, Bowen Shen, Ariana Ray, Yu-Tsun Shao, Tingxin Li, Shengwei Jiang, Yihang Zeng, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, David Muller, Kin Fai Mak, Jie Shan📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作以扫描透射电子显微镜精准标定莫尔双层堆垛序，首次实现同一体系两种堆垛构型的系统对比实验，揭示了陈绝缘体、关联绝缘态及Kondo晶格等量子物态的堆垛敏感性，为理解转角过渡金属硫族化合物中的电子关联
该研究利用扫描透射电子显微镜校准了角度对齐MoTe₂/WSe₂双层的偏振分辨光学二次谐波，以区分不同堆垛序。通过直接对比两种堆垛序的输运、磁性与电子相图，澄清了陈绝缘体本质、半填充电场调控金属-绝缘体转变机制及Kondo晶格物理等关键问题。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用扫描透射电子显微镜校准了角度对齐MoTe₂/WSe₂双层的偏振分辨光学二次谐波，以区分不同堆垛序。通过直接对比两种堆垛序的输运、磁性与电子相图，澄清了陈绝缘体本质、半填充电场调控金属-绝缘体转变机制及Kondo晶格物理等关键问题。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21233v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Transition metal dichalcogenide (TMD) moiré bilayers have realized a wide range of strongly correlated and topological phenomena. The physics in these materials is often sensitive to the interlayer stacking order. Polarization-resolved optical second harmonic generation (SHG) is the most used technique for stacking order characterization but unverified for most heterobilayers. Here we calibrate the optical SHG for angle-aligned MoTe2/WSe2 bilayers by the scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM). We directly compare the transport and magnetic properties and the electronic phase diagram for two distinct stacking orders. With the calibrated stacking order assignment, we clarify the interpretation of earlier results, including the nature of the Chern insulator, mechanism of an electric-field-tuned metal-insulator transition at half band filling, and the Kondo lattice physics. Our work provides a consistent picture of the relation between the stacking order and the electronic properties of MoTe2/WSe2 moiré bilayers.

45

含动量混合Landau相互作用的广义Hatsugai-Kohmoto模型中的费米子凝聚#

Fermion condensation in a generalized Hatsugai-Kohmoto model with momentum-mixing Landau interactions
📚 arXiv👤 Jan Heinrich, Andreas Rückriegel, Peter Kopietz📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统HK模型的动量对角限制，引入Landau相互作用实现动量混合，首次在严格可解框架内实现费米子凝聚态；其Anderson赝自旋到广义Ising模型的映射为强关联电子系统的非微扰求解提供了新
该研究将Hatsugai-Kohmoto模型推广至包含动量混合Landau相互作用的情形，自洽平均场分析发现基态出现部分平能带，支持Khodel-Shaginyan提出的费米子凝聚图像。通过Anderson赝自旋表述将模型映射为广义Ising模型，并构造了具有唯一基态的可精确求解变体。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究将Hatsugai-Kohmoto模型推广至包含动量混合Landau相互作用的情形，自洽平均场分析发现基态出现部分平能带，支持Khodel-Shaginyan提出的费米子凝聚图像。通过Anderson赝自旋表述将模型映射为广义Ising模型，并构造了具有唯一基态的可精确求解变体。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21277v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The Hatsugai-Kohmoto (HK) model is an exactly solvable electronic lattice model where the interaction between electrons with opposite spin is diagonal in momentum space. We generalize the HK model by introducing momentum-mixing Landau interactions. Within a self-consistent mean-field analysis we find that the ground state of this model exhibits a partially flat energy band, in agreement with the fermion condensation scenario proposed by Khodel and Shaginyan [JETP Lett. 51, 553 (1990)]. Inspired by Andersons pseudospin formulation of BCS theory, we show that the HK model with Landau interactions can be mapped onto a generalized Ising model where each site of the reciprocal lattice hosts two Ising spins. In the pseudospin picture the emergence of a partially flat electronic band corresponds to the smoothing of a magnetic domain wall. Moreover, guided by the pseudospin picture, we propose an exactly solvable variant of the HK model which has a unique ground state for all densities.

46

交替磁性自旋劈裂的配体介导起源#

Ligand-mediated Origin of Altermagnetic Spin-Splitting
📚 arXiv👤 Luigi Camerano, Federico Bisti, Gianni Profeta📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破了传统认知，首次揭示交替磁性自旋劈裂的配体介导杂化机制，挑战了直接磁离子跃迁的既有模型。通过构建最小有效模型，建立了微观成键机制与宏观对称性判据的理论桥梁，为高效筛选新型交替磁材料提供了可计
该研究以g波交替磁体Co₁/₄NbSe₂为对象，结合第一性原理计算与Wannier哈密顿量工程，揭示了交替磁性自旋劈裂的微观成键机制。研究表明该劈裂源于配体介导的杂化而非直接磁离子跃迁，建立了最小模型与对称性指导的材料搜索之间的微观桥梁。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究以g波交替磁体Co₁/₄NbSe₂为对象，结合第一性原理计算与Wannier哈密顿量工程，揭示了交替磁性自旋劈裂的微观成键机制。研究表明该劈裂源于配体介导的杂化而非直接磁离子跃迁，建立了最小模型与对称性指导的材料搜索之间的微观桥梁。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21284v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets host spin-split electronic bands despite zero net magnetization, opening new routes for spintronics beyond conventional ferromagnets. Going beyond symmetry-based classifications, which specify allowed terms but not their hierarchy, here we use first-principles calculations and Wannier Hamiltonian engineering to uncover the microscopic bonding contributions of altermagnetic spin splitting in the g-wave altermagnet Co₁/₄NbSe₂. We show that the splitting is captured by a short-range tight-binding model, establishing its local origin. By selectively controlling hopping channels, we demonstrate that the dominant contribution arises not from direct magnetic-ion hopping, but from ligand-mediated hybridization that transfers anisotropy to itinerant states. This identifies ligand-assisted coupling as the key mechanism of altermagnetic spin splitting and provides a microscopic bridge between minimal models and symmetry guided first-principles material searches, enabling real-space design of altermagnetic functionality.

47

Bi³⁺离子掺杂对无铅BaTi₀.₈₉Sn₀.₁₁O₃低振动能量下压电催化降解性能的影响#

Role of Bi3+ ion substitution on the piezocatalytic degradation performance of lead-free BaTi0.89Sn0.11O3 at low vibrational energy
📚 arXiv👤 Salma Touili, Sara Ghazi, Mbarek Amjoud, Daoud Mezzane Hana Ursic, Zdravko Kutnjak, Bouchra Asbani, Mustapha Jouiad, And Mimoun El Marssi📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过Bi³⁺异价掺杂策略，在无铅铁电体中同时实现带隙窄化、晶粒细化和压电响应增强的协同优化，突破了低功率超声下压电催化效率受限的瓶颈，为设计环境友好型高效压电催化剂提供了新思路，对有机污染物降解
该研究将Bi³⁺掺入无铅铁电体BaTi₀.₈₉Sn₀.₁₁O₃，考察其在低功率超声振动下的压电催化降解性能。BTSn11-0.02Bi样品表现出最窄带隙、最小粒径、最高压电电流及最优的罗丹明B降解效率，证实了异价掺杂对增强压电催化活性的关键作用。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究将Bi³⁺掺入无铅铁电体BaTi₀.₈₉Sn₀.₁₁O₃，考察其在低功率超声振动下的压电催化降解性能。BTSn11-0.02Bi样品表现出最窄带隙、最小粒径、最高压电电流及最优的罗丹明B降解效率，证实了异价掺杂对增强压电催化活性的关键作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21285v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Harnessing low ultrasonic vibration energy to drive piezocatalytic reactions has attracted increasing attention in response to current environmental and energy challenges. In this study, we investigate the effect of heterovalent bismuth doping on the piezocatalytic degradation of Rhodamine B (RhB) under low-power ultrasonic excitation. Bismuth ions (Bi³⁺) were substituted into the lead-free ferroelectric BaTi0.89Sn0.11O₃, yielding BTSn11-xBi with x = 0, 0.02, and 0.04. The powders were synthesized by the sol-gel method as submicron cubes. The structural, morphological, optical, and piezocatalytic properties were strongly influenced by the Bi content. Compared with pristine BTSn11 and BTSn11-0.04Bi, the BTSn11-0.02Bi sample exhibited the lowest band gap (3.22 eV), the smallest particle size (283 nm), the highest piezoelectric current (approximately 8 microA cm⁻²), and the lowest coercive field required to obtain piezoresponse force microscopy hysteresis loops. As a result, BTSn11-0.02Bi showed the highest RhB degradation efficiency and the largest apparent kinetic rate constant, confirming its superior piezocatalytic performance. Total organic carbon measurements revealed significant mineralization of RhB. In addition, BTSn11-0.02Bi demonstrated good reusability and stability, maintaining high degradation efficiency over three consecutive cycles. These results highlight the potential of Bi-doped BTSn11 ferroelectric materials, particularly BTSn11-0.02Bi, as efficient piezocatalysts for environmental remediation.

48

磁性拓扑绝缘体多层中的设计量子态#

Designer Quantum States in Magnetic Topological Insulator Multilayers
📚 arXiv👤 Deyi Zhuo, Han Tay, Cui-Zu Chang📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该综述以"拓扑乐高"范式重构磁性拓扑绝缘体多层设计，通过原子层精度调控实现陈数可编程（C=1及高陈数量子反常霍尔态），为拓扑量子计算提供了电学可开关的鲁棒手性边缘通道平台。
该综述总结过去十年通过分子束外延设计磁性拓扑绝缘体多层的实验进展。将磁性掺杂与非掺杂TI层视为拓扑乐高积木，讨论如何利用层厚、磁性掺杂、异质结构架构和堆垛序列以原子层精度控制磁交换能隙、层间耦合和陈数C。涵盖C=1量子反常霍尔效应的实现、磁性调制掺杂三层中的高陈数量子反常霍尔态、工程化平台相变、介观器件及电学开关等进展。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该综述总结过去十年通过分子束外延设计磁性拓扑绝缘体多层的实验进展。将磁性掺杂与非掺杂TI层视为拓扑乐高积木，讨论如何利用层厚、磁性掺杂、异质结构架构和堆垛序列以原子层精度控制磁交换能隙、层间耦合和陈数C。涵盖C=1量子反常霍尔效应的实现、磁性调制掺杂三层中的高陈数量子反常霍尔态、工程化平台相变、介观器件及电学开关等进展。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21287v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic topological insulators (TIs) provide a highly tunable platform for engineering quantum states that emerge from the interplay between topology and magnetism. In this review article, we summarize experimental progress over the past decade in designing magnetic TI multilayers by molecular beam epitaxy (MBE). By treating magnetically doped and undoped TI layers as topological Legos, we discuss how layer thickness, magnetic doping, heterostructure architecture, and stacking sequence can be used to control magnetic exchange gaps, interlayer coupling, and the Chern number C with atomic-layer precision. We first briefly review the realization of the C = 1 quantum anomalous Hall (QAH) effect in uniformly Cr-doped (Bi,Sb)2Te3 films in 2013 and uniformly V-doped (Bi,Sb)2Te3 films in 2015. We then discuss how Cr-doped and undoped (Bi,Sb)2Te3 layers can be combined to realize the C = 1 QAH effect in magnetically modulation-doped trilayers, including its extension into the three-dimensional (3D) regime. Next, we review the development of high-C QAH states, engineered plateau phase transitions, mesoscopic QAH devices, and electrical switching of chiral edge-current chirality. Finally, we discuss the realizations of axion insulator and C = 1/2 parity anomaly states in asymmetric magnetic TI trilayers. These advances establish magnetic TI multilayers as a versatile materials platform for creating new designer quantum states, including synthetic Weyl semimetal and QAH metal phases, and for probing the topological magnetoelectric effect in thick axion insulators and 3D QAH insulators.

49

面向高效自旋-轨道力矩开关的磁性拓扑绝缘体三层设计#

Designing Magnetic Topological Insulator Trilayers for Highly-Efficient Spin-Orbit Torque Switching
📚 arXiv👤 Ling-Jie Zhou, Deyi Zhuo, Han Tay, Zi-Jie Yan, Pu Xiao, Xiaoda Liu, Bomin Zhang, Cui-Zu Chang📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地揭示SrTiO₃(111)衬底诱导的充电效应可在磁性拓扑绝缘体三层中产生层间非对称化学势，成为自旋-轨道力矩高效开关和高开关比的关键物理机制，为拓扑自旋电子器件的极性调控与性能优化提供了
该研究利用分子束外延在热处理SrTiO₃(111)衬底上合成系列层厚可控的磁性拓扑绝缘体三层结构。电输运测量揭示，自旋-轨道力矩驱动磁化反转及边缘电流手性转换受SrTiO₃(111)衬底诱导的充电效应调控，该效应在上下磁性TI层间产生非对称化学势排列。通过异质结构设计、栅压和面内磁场可调控开关极性与效率，确认化学势非对称性是高开关比的起源。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用分子束外延在热处理SrTiO₃(111)衬底上合成系列层厚可控的磁性拓扑绝缘体三层结构。电输运测量揭示，自旋-轨道力矩驱动磁化反转及边缘电流手性转换受SrTiO₃(111)衬底诱导的充电效应调控，该效应在上下磁性TI层间产生非对称化学势排列。通过异质结构设计、栅压和面内磁场可调控开关极性与效率，确认化学势非对称性是高开关比的起源。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21297v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Spin-orbit torque (SOT) enables efficient electrical control of magnetization, offering a pathway towards low-power spintronic devices. Magnetic topological insulators (TIs), with spin-momentum-locked surface states and intrinsic ferromagnetism, provide a unique platform for realizing SOT switching of edge current chirality in quantum anomalous Hall (QAH) insulators. In this work, we employ molecular beam epitaxy to synthesize a series of magnetic TI trilayers with controlled layer thicknesses on heat-treated SrTiO3(111) substrates. Electrical transport measurements reveal that SOT-driven magnetization reversal and the associated switching of edge current chirality are governed by the SrTiO3(111) substrate-induced charging effect, which generates an asymmetric chemical-potential alignment between the top and bottom magnetic TI layers. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the switching polarity and efficiency can be tuned through heterostructure design, gate voltage, and in-plane magnetic field, consistent with SOT symmetry. These findings identify chemical potential asymmetry as the origin of the large SOT switching ratio in magnetic TI trilayers and establish a route for electrical control of edge current chirality in QAH insulators. This work advances the understanding of SOT switching mechanism in magnetic topological materials and paves the way for next-generation, energy-efficient QAH-based logic and memory devices.

50

铁电KNbO₃纳米片的热驱动热催化析氢与染料降解#

Ferroelectric KNbO3 nanoplatelets for thermally driven pyrocatalytic hydrogen evolution and dye degradation
📚 arXiv👤 Salma Touili, Bouchra Asbani, Youness Hadouch, Mbarek Amjoud, Daoud Mezzane, Nejc Suban, Hana Ursic, Nitul S. Rajput, Zdravko Kutnjak, Brigita Rozic, Mustapha Jouiad, Mimoun El Marssi📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将铁电热释电效应引入低温（20–50°C）热催化体系，突破了传统光/电催化对能量输入形式的限制。KNbO₃纳米片利用温度波动驱动自发极化变化产生电荷，实现高效析氢与污染物降解，为低品位热
利用正交铁电铌酸钾（KNbO₃）纳米片实现高效热催化析氢和罗丹明B降解。在20–50°C热循环下，30次循环后产氢量达680 μmol g⁻¹；16次循环后RhB去除率达84%。优异性能归因于KNbO₃纳米片强自发极化和优异热释电性质促进的电荷产生与界面反应。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

利用正交铁电铌酸钾（KNbO₃）纳米片实现高效热催化析氢和罗丹明B降解。在20–50°C热循环下，30次循环后产氢量达680 μmol g⁻¹；16次循环后RhB去除率达84%。优异性能归因于KNbO₃纳米片强自发极化和优异热释电性质促进的电荷产生与界面反应。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21302v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Day- and night-induced thermal cycling offers a promising route for harvesting ambient thermal energy to drive sustainable hydrogen production and pollutant degradation. Pyroelectric materials enable this process by converting temperature fluctuations into surface charges capable of promoting catalytic water splitting and advanced oxidation reactions. In this work, we demonstrate efficient pyrocatalytic hydrogen evolution and Rhodamine B (RhB) degradation using orthorhombic ferroelectric Potassium niobate (KNbO₃₎ nanoplatelets (KN-np). Under thermal cycling between 20 and 50 ⁱ̧rcC, KN-np achieved a hydrogen yield of 680 μmol g⁻¹ after 30 thermal cycles, corresponding to an average hydrogen production rate of 22.67 μmol g⁻¹ per cycle. In addition, KN-np exhibited excellent pyrocatalytic activity toward RhB degradation, reaching 84% removal after only 16 thermal cycles with an apparent kinetic rate constant of 0.11 cycle⁻¹. The remarkable catalytic performance is attributed to the strong spontaneous polarization and excellent pyroelectric properties of the KNbO₃ nanoplatelets, which promote efficient charge generation and interfacial redox reactions. These findings highlight the potential of KNbO₃ nanostructures as efficient pyrocatalysts for clean hydrogen production and environmental remediation.

51

非常规磁性：对称性分类、混合宇称与无约束宇称类#

Unconventional Magnetism: Symmetry Classification, Hybrid-parity and Unconstrained-parity Classes
📚 arXiv👤 Xun-Jiang Luo, Dan Li, Rui-Chun Xiao, Ding-Fu Shao, Lei Li, Mingliang Tian, Yugui Yao📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：基于自旋纹理的表示理论，该工作构建了超越传统偶/奇宇称二分法的非常规磁性完整分类体系，首次预言混合宇称与无约束宇称两类全新磁物态，并确立混合宇称磁体的普适对称性判据，为探索新型自旋电子学材料与拓扑量子
基于自旋纹理的表示理论及其宇称性质，建立了非常规磁性的系统分类框架。超越已有的纯偶宇称（交错磁性）和奇宇称磁体，预言了混合宇称磁体（HPMs）和无约束宇称磁体（UPMs）两类新物态，并导出HPMs的三类普适对称性判据。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

基于自旋纹理的表示理论及其宇称性质，建立了非常规磁性的系统分类框架。超越已有的纯偶宇称（交错磁性）和奇宇称磁体，预言了混合宇称磁体（HPMs）和无约束宇称磁体（UPMs）两类新物态，并导出HPMs的三类普适对称性判据。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21336v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Unconventional magnetism has emerged as a transformative frontier in condensed matter physics. Such phases are characterized by substantial non-relativistic spin splitting (NSS) in symmetry-compensated magnets. They have been classified by the parity of their spin textures under momentum inversion, leading to the paradigms of altermagnets (even-parity) and odd-parity magnets. However, the full symmetry landscape remains largely unexplored. In this Letter, we present a systematic classification framework for unconventional magnetism based on the representation theory of the spin textures and the associated parity properties. Within this framework, we predict two previously unidentified classes beyond the established pure-parity categories: hybrid-parity magnets (HPMs) and unconstrained-parity magnets (UPMs), where the spin textures exhibit contrasting parities among their Cartesian components and the parity of the spin textures is ill-defined, respectively. We derive universal symmetry criteria that categorize HPMs into three distinct types. Importantly, by combining the spin splitting characteristics of altermagnets and odd-parity magnets, HPMs can enable the coexistence of the spin current and Edelstein effects. Taking FePO4 as an example, we perform first-principles calculations to demonstrate this coexistence. Finally, we discuss the potential applications of HPMs in spintronic devices. Our work provides a comprehensive symmetry classification of unconventional magnetism and establishes HPMs as a promising platform for multi-functional spintronics.

52

Pulse-Driven Reconfiguration of Fractional Polar Topology in Zr-Substituted Barium Titanate#

📚 arXiv👤 Florian Mayer📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示Zr掺杂钛酸钡中由"拓扑夸克"构成的分数极性拓扑织构，创新性地提出皮秒电脉冲局域重构纳米畴的方案，实现64态可编程多态存储，为超快非易失性拓扑存储器件奠定计算基础。
arXiv:2605.21368v1 发布类型：新 摘要：铁电体中的极性拓扑织构可以承载超越单一整数拓扑荷的内部结构。本文采用有效哈密顿量分子动力学模拟，研究此类内禀分数拓扑能否通过局域电激发在有序12.5% Zr掺杂钛酸钡中进行重构。沿极化轴的化学加倍稳定了一种耦合纳米畴织构，由交替的Q = -2反斯格明子片和Q = +4斯格明子片组成，其中局域拓扑电荷碎裂为六个-1/3和六个+2/3的局域贡献，本文将其记为拓扑夸克，彼此由类布洛赫…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2605.21368v1 发布类型：新
摘要：铁电体中的极性拓扑织构可以承载超越单一整数拓扑荷的内部结构。本文采用有效哈密顿量分子动力学模拟，研究此类内禀分数拓扑能否通过局域电激发在有序12.5% Zr掺杂钛酸钡中进行重构。沿极化轴的化学加倍稳定了一种耦合纳米畴织构，由交替的Q = -2反斯格明子片和Q = +4斯格明子片组成，其中局域拓扑电荷碎裂为六个-1/3和六个+2/3的局域贡献，本文将其记为拓扑夸克，彼此由类布洛赫点的奇异转换区隔开。对选定涡旋核柱施加皮秒级局域电场脉冲，可驱动2.6 nm纳米畴的内禀偶极织构发生重构。在二元脉冲掩码协议寻址六个涡旋核的情况下，在所选低温模拟方案中，全部64种掩码均导向不同的弛豫亚稳构型。开关计算在低温区进行，程序化状态在模拟时间尺度上至少1 ns的无场演化中保持稳定。所得构型既可按扇区分辨的拓扑指纹区分，也可按其实空间极化场区分。这些结果从计算上证明了如下概念：铁电纳米畴中的分数极性拓扑可通过超快电激发进行局域重构，并在理想化低温设定下用作多态构型自由度。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21368v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Polar topological textures in ferroelectrics can host internal structure beyond a single integer topological charge. Here, effective-Hamiltonian molecular-dynamics simulations are used to examine whether such internal fractional topology can be reconfigured by local electric excitation in ordered 12.5% Zr-substituted barium titanate. Chemical doubling along the polar axis stabilizes a coupled nanodomain texture consisting of alternating Q = -2 antiskyrmionic and Q = +4 skyrmionic slices, in which the local topological charge fragments into six -1/3 and six +2/3 localized contributions, denoted here as topological quarks, separated by Bloch-point-like singular conversion regions. Picosecond local electric-field pulses applied to selected vortex-core columns drive reconfiguration of the internal dipolar texture of a 2.6 nm nanodomain. Under a binary pulse-mask protocol addressing the six vortex cores, all 64 masks lead, within the chosen low-temperature simulation protocol, to distinct relaxed metastable configurations. The switching calculations are performed in a cryogenic regime, and the programmed states remain stable over at least 1 ns of field-free evolution on the simulation timescale. The resulting configurations are distinguishable both by sector-resolved topological fingerprints and by their real-space polarization fields. These results provide a computational proof of concept that fractional polar topology in a ferroelectric nanodomain can be locally reconfigured by ultrafast electric excitation and used as a multistate configurational degree of freedom in an idealized low-temperature setting.

53

激光激发超扩散磁振子流介导的超大超快自旋塞贝克效应#

Huge ultrafast spin Seebeck effect mediated by laser-excited superdiffusive magnon currents
📚 arXiv👤 Luca Mikadze, Peter M. Oppeneer, Markus Weißenhofer📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究建立首个纳入非热磁振子散射的第一性原理量子玻尔兹曼框架，揭示激光激发下超扩散磁振子输运机制，预言技术可及幅度的超快自旋塞贝克效应，为飞秒磁光实验提供直接理论对应，推动超快自旋电子学器件设计。
亚皮秒激光激发铁磁金属会引发电子、声子和磁振子的强非平衡动力学。作者构建了基于量子玻尔兹曼方程的第一性原理微观框架，纳入非热磁振子散射与输运，用于模拟bcc Fe薄膜的超快激光退磁过程。模型预言了一种超快自旋塞贝克效应——高速磁振子自旋流爆发达到技术相关幅度，并识别出从初始弹道输运到后续扩散态的超扩散输运机制。通过计算磁光克尔角将理论预言与实验可观测量连接。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

亚皮秒激光激发铁磁金属会引发电子、声子和磁振子的强非平衡动力学。作者构建了基于量子玻尔兹曼方程的第一性原理微观框架，纳入非热磁振子散射与输运，用于模拟bcc Fe薄膜的超快激光退磁过程。模型预言了一种超快自旋塞贝克效应——高速磁振子自旋流爆发达到技术相关幅度，并识别出从初始弹道输运到后续扩散态的超扩散输运机制。通过计算磁光克尔角将理论预言与实验可观测量连接。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21389v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Subpicosecond laser excitation of ferromagnetic metals induces strongly nonequilibrium dynamics involving scattering and transport of electrons, phonons, and magnons. Widely used theoretical approaches, such as the three-temperature model and diffusion equations, are ill-suited to capture these processes on ultrafast timescales. Here, we present an ab initio-parameterized microscopic framework that incorporates nonthermal magnon scattering and transport via the quantum Boltzmann equation. We apply this approach to simulate ultrafast laser-induced demagnetization in bcc Fe films. The model predicts an ultrafast spin Seebeck effect, characterized by a strong burst of fast-moving magnonic spin current reaching technologically relevant amplitudes. Furthermore, we identify a superdiffusive transport regime: a crossover from initially ballistic magnon transport to a diffusive regime at later times. To connect our theoretical predictions to experimentally accessible observables, we calculate the magneto-optical Kerr angles resulting from the predicted depth-resolved magnetization profiles. Our framework provides a route to describe ultrafast nonthermal magnon transport beyond diffusive models and will aid in the design and interpretation of time-resolved spin-transport experiments.

54

层状二维卤化物钙钛矿中的杂化非本征铁电性与莫尔超晶格诱导的激子量子化#

Hybrid Improper Ferroelectricity and Moiré Superlattices-induced Exciton Quantization in Layered 2D Halide Perovskite
📚 arXiv👤 Sanika S. Padelkar, Sharidya Rahman, Mattia Belotti, Naufan Nurrosyid, Craig Forsyth, Alasdair Mckay, Tam Nguyen, Thi Vu Mung, Lan Nguyen, Naeimeh Mozaffari, Alexandr N. Simonov, Aftab Alam, Jacek J. Jasieniak📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：首次揭示杂化非本征铁电性驱动莫尔超晶格形成的新机制，突破传统铁电理论框架；发现激子在莫尔周期势中的量子化现象，为二维钙钛矿在压电传感与量子光源领域的应用开辟新途径。
溶液生长的(PA)₂FAPb₂I₇单晶通过假merohedral孪晶形成意外莫尔超晶格，其驱动力为杂化非本征铁电性：两个初级区边界模式(X₂⁺和X₃⁻)与次级Γ₄⁻极化位移的三线性模式耦合同时破缺反演对称性，并使相邻层产生约5.17°旋转错配。该对称性破缺激活了二维钙钛矿中报道的最高压电系数之一(d₃₃≈20 pm/V)。莫尔超晶格经历热驱动公度-非公度转变，在123 K时形成周期性约束势将激子量子化为等间距光致发光阶梯，高温下转变为…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

溶液生长的(PA)₂FAPb₂I₇单晶通过假merohedral孪晶形成意外莫尔超晶格，其驱动力为杂化非本征铁电性：两个初级区边界模式(X₂⁺和X₃⁻)与次级Γ₄⁻极化位移的三线性模式耦合同时破缺反演对称性，并使相邻层产生约5.17°旋转错配。该对称性破缺激活了二维钙钛矿中报道的最高压电系数之一(d₃₃≈20 pm/V)。莫尔超晶格经历热驱动公度-非公度转变，在123 K时形成周期性约束势将激子量子化为等间距光致发光阶梯，高温下转变为展宽的非公度相。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21449v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: 2D Ruddlesden-Popper perovskites are compelling platforms for quantum-confined optoelectronics. However, polar order in iodide composition remains rare under ambient conditions, and the mechanistic origin of anomalous photoluminescence in this class of perovskite is still speculative. Here, we demonstrate that solution-grown (PA)₂FAPb₂I₇ single crystals develop an inadvertent moiré superlattice through pseudo-merohedral twinning, driven by hybrid improper ferroelectricity in which trilinear mode coupling between two primary zone-boundary modes (X₂⁺ and X₃⁻⁾ and a secondary Γ₄⁻ polar displacement simultaneously breaks inversion symmetry and imposes a ca. 5.17deg rotational misalignment between adjacent layers. This symmetry breaking activates one of the highest piezoelectric coefficients d₃₃ (ca. 20 pm/V) reported among 2D perovskites. This misalignment generates a moiré superlattice that undergoes a thermally driven commensurate-incommensurate transition, switching between a periodic confinement potential that quantizes excitons into an equidistant photoluminescence ladder at 123 K and a disordered incommensurate phase with broadened emission at 298 K. These emissions are attributed to moiré-confined excitons, resolving a longstanding debate on anomalous secondary photoluminescence in layered 2D perovskites and opening pathways to twistronics, photoferroelectrics and piezo-optoelectronic devices.

55

各向异性第二类外尔半金属中的反常霍尔效应#

Anomalous Hall effect in anisotropic type-II Weyl semimetals
📚 arXiv👤 R. Martínez von Dossow, A. Martín-Ruiz, Luis F. Urrutia📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次将CPT破缺电磁响应理论拓展至过倾斜的第二类外尔半金属区域，揭示轴子型反常霍尔效应在Lifshitz转变中的鲁棒性及其受口袋几何调控的非普适修正，为拓扑量子材料中关联输运现象的实验探测与调控
作者将倾斜各向异性外尔半金属中CPT破缺电磁响应的分析推广到过倾斜(第二类)区域，此时费米能级处电子和空穴口袋共存。从标准模型扩展的最小QED部门出发，匹配到晶格启发的含倾斜各向异性狄拉克哈密顿量，非微扰计算零温有限密度下的有效作用，并用包含费米海和费米面贡献的互补手征动理论验证。研究表明，CPT破缺的轴子型响应在I型到II型Lifshitz转变中保持有限，但获得倾斜和各向异性依赖的重整化以及受电子/空穴口袋几何支配的非普适截断敏感项。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

作者将倾斜各向异性外尔半金属中CPT破缺电磁响应的分析推广到过倾斜(第二类)区域，此时费米能级处电子和空穴口袋共存。从标准模型扩展的最小QED部门出发，匹配到晶格启发的含倾斜各向异性狄拉克哈密顿量，非微扰计算零温有限密度下的有效作用，并用包含费米海和费米面贡献的互补手征动理论验证。研究表明，CPT破缺的轴子型响应在I型到II型Lifshitz转变中保持有限，但获得倾斜和各向异性依赖的重整化以及受电子/空穴口袋几何支配的非普适截断敏感项。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19315v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We extend our previous analysis [Phys. Rev. D 109, 065005 (2024)] of CPT-odd electromagnetic response in tilted, anisotropic Weyl semimetals to the overtilted (type-II) regime, where electron and hole pockets coexist at the Fermi level. Starting from the minimal QED sector of the Standard-Model Extension matched to a lattice-motivated anisotropic Dirac Hamiltonian with tilt, we compute the zero-temperature finite-density effective action nonperturbatively from the vacuum polarization tensor, and corroborate the result using a complementary chiral kinetic theory formulation that consistently incorporates both Fermi-sea and Fermi-surface contributions. In the type-II regime the unbounded linear dispersion necessitates a physical ultraviolet regularization. Implementing a hard momentum cutoff tied to the lattice bandwidth, we show that the CPT-odd, axion-like response remains finite across the type-I to type-II Lifshitz transition, while acquiring tilt- and anisotropy-dependent renormalizations together with nonuniversal, cutoff-sensitive terms governed by the geometry of the electron and hole pockets. As a concrete application, we evaluate the anomalous Hall conductivity in the prototypical type-II Weyl semimetal WTe₂, using parameters extracted from first-principles calculations and experiments, and find that Fermi-sea and Fermi-surface contributions are comparable and partially cancel, yielding a finite and strongly anisotropic Hall response characteristic of the overtilted regime.

56

手性和Tellegen双各向同性散射体的普适磁电极限#

A Universal Magnetoelectric Limit for Chiral and Tellegen Bi-Isotropic Scatterers
📚 arXiv👤 Jorge Olmos-Trigo📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文突破性地从能量守恒出发，建立了双各向同性纳米粒子磁电耦合的普适上限理论，首次证明该极限对手性和Tellegen散射体一视同仁，为多极散射中的手性响应提供了统一度量框架，为设计极限性能的手性光学器件
作者揭示了任何双各向同性纳米粒子磁电耦合的普适上限，该上限仅源于能量守恒，与纳米粒子的具体材料性质和照明条件无关，且不依赖互易性——对互易(手性)和非互易(Tellegen)纳米粒子相同。进一步证明，任意光学尺寸球粒子的手性Mie系数在所有多极散射通道中均服从同一上限。该结果为双各向同性物体的磁电耦合引入了普适度量，在单粒子层面为手性和Tellegen光-物质相互作用设定了相同极限。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

作者揭示了任何双各向同性纳米粒子磁电耦合的普适上限，该上限仅源于能量守恒，与纳米粒子的具体材料性质和照明条件无关，且不依赖互易性——对互易(手性)和非互易(Tellegen)纳米粒子相同。进一步证明，任意光学尺寸球粒子的手性Mie系数在所有多极散射通道中均服从同一上限。该结果为双各向同性物体的磁电耦合引入了普适度量，在单粒子层面为手性和Tellegen光-物质相互作用设定了相同极限。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.21011v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We reveal the existence of a universal upper bound on the magnetoelectric coupling of any bi-isotropic nanoparticle. The bound arises solely from energy conservation, making it independent of the specific material properties of the nanoparticle and illumination conditions. Moreover, the bound does not rely on reciprocity, being identical for reciprocal (chiral) and non-reciprocal (Tellegen) nanoparticles. We further show that the chiral Mie coefficient of spherical particles of arbitrary optical size obeys the same bound across all multipolar scattering channels. Our results introduce a universal metric on the magnetoelectric coupling of bi-isotropic objects, setting identical limits on chiral and Tellegen light-matter interactions at the single particle level.

57

无磁场下的公度-非公度莫特转变：XXZ链中向列Luttinger液体的涌现#

Commensurate-incommensurate Mott transition without magnetic field: emergence of nematic Luttinger liquid in XXZ chain
📚 arXiv👤 Julien Fitouchi, Natalia Chepiga📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在无磁场条件下揭示了XXZ链中由挫折驱动的双级Pokrovsky-Talapov型公度-非公度转变，核心创新在于发现畴壁对凝聚可形成非公度向列Luttinger液体，拓展了量子磁性中拓扑激发
通过DMRG模拟研究具有竞争铁磁最近邻和反铁磁次近邻交换耦合的自旋-1/2链在强相互作用区的零磁化相图，发现两个相继的Pokrovsky-Talapov型公度-非公度转变。第一次转变对应磁子束缚对凝聚为c=2的临界相；第二次转变通过畴壁成对凝聚形成非公度四极（向列）Luttinger液体。挫折本身足以驱动连续公度-非公度转变。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

通过DMRG模拟研究具有竞争铁磁最近邻和反铁磁次近邻交换耦合的自旋-1/2链在强相互作用区的零磁化相图，发现两个相继的Pokrovsky-Talapov型公度-非公度转变。第一次转变对应磁子束缚对凝聚为c=2的临界相；第二次转变通过畴壁成对凝聚形成非公度四极（向列）Luttinger液体。挫折本身足以驱动连续公度-非公度转变。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.05988v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We investigate the zero-magnetization phase diagram of a spin-1/2 chain with competing ferromagnetic nearest-neighbor and antiferromagnetic next-nearest-neighbor exchange couplings in the strongly interacting regime. Using density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) simulations, we discover two successive commensurate-incommensurate transitions of the non-conformal Pokrovsky-Talapov universality class, occurring (even) at zero magnetic field. The first transition marks the condensation of bound pairs of magnons into a critical phase with central charge c=2, emerging from a gapped period-4 phase. At the second transition, an incommensurate quadrupolar (or nematic) Luttinger liquid forms out of a gapped phase separation state, via the pairwise condensation of domain walls. We argue that both transitions involve the same underlying incommensurate nematic Luttinger liquid, and that the c=2 phase can be understood as a coexistence of a conventional (single-magnon type) and quadrupolar (two-magnon type) Luttinger liquids. Our results demonstrate that frustration alone is sufficient to drive continuous commensurate-incommensurate transitions of Mott type and stabilise incommensurate quasi-long-range order without doping.

58

V型模型中Edelstein效应与磁电效应的形状依赖性#

Shape dependence of Edelstein and magnetoelectric effects in the V-shaped model
📚 arXiv👤 Shuhei Kanda, Satoru Hayami📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示V型一维链的几何形状可诱导有效自旋-轨道耦合，使非磁性Edelstein效应产生显著磁电响应，突破传统磁电效应需磁性材料限制。通过多极对称性分析建立选择定则，为设计新型非磁性磁电器件与拓扑量
理论研究V型一维链模型中磁电（ME）效应（包括非磁性Edelstein型和磁性起源）的形状依赖性与微观机制。Kubo公式数值计算显示非磁性驱动ME响应在顶角θ≈0.6π时最大。通过s轨道子空间低能有效哈密顿量，证明V型几何诱导的极性表现为有效自旋-轨道耦合。基于多极基表示，确定了ME张量的对称性选择定则。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

理论研究V型一维链模型中磁电（ME）效应（包括非磁性Edelstein型和磁性起源）的形状依赖性与微观机制。Kubo公式数值计算显示非磁性驱动ME响应在顶角θ≈0.6π时最大。通过s轨道子空间低能有效哈密顿量，证明V型几何诱导的极性表现为有效自旋-轨道耦合。基于多极基表示，确定了ME张量的对称性选择定则。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.14404v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We theoretically investigate the shape dependence and microscopic mechanism of the magnetoelectric (ME) effect, including both nonmagnetic (Edelstein-type) and magnetic origins, in a V-shaped one-dimensional chain model. Our goal is to establish a symmetry-based framework linking local geometry to ME responses. Numerical calculations based on the Kubo formula reveal that the nonmagnetic-driven ME response is maximized at an apex angle of θ approx 0.6π. To clarify its origin, we derive a low-energy effective Hamiltonian in the s-orbital subspace and demonstrate that the polarity induced by the V-shaped geometry manifests as an effective spin--orbit interaction. An analytical derivation of the Green's function shows that the geometric effect can be described as a T-matrix contribution associated with local symmetry breaking. This formulation provides a unified description of geometry-induced responses in terms of a scattering framework. Using a multipole-basis representation, we identify symmetry-based selection rules for the ME tensor and show that the coupling between the effective spin--orbit interaction and the orbital angular momentum generated across the apex plays an essential role. The resulting angular dependence, sinθsinθ/2, peaks at θ = 2tan⁻¹sqrt2 approx 0.608π, in good agreement with the numerical results. We also analyze a ferromagnetic V-shaped model including the Zeeman interaction and show that the magnetic-driven ME response originates from the spin magnetization induced by the coupling between the electric-field--driven charge-potential gradient and the Zeeman term. These results reveal distinct ME mechanisms depending on the presence or absence of time-reversal symmetry and provide a microscopic framework for geometry-induced multipole phenomena.

59

VX₃（X=Br, I）中三角畸变驱动的基态#

Trigonal Distortion Driven Ground States in VX3 (X = Br and I)
📚 arXiv👤 Chamini S. Pathiraja, Deniz Wong, Christian Schulz, Yi-De Chuang, Yu-Cheng Shao, Byron Freelon📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次通过RIXS精确测定VBr₃与VI₃的三角畸变参数符号相反，揭示同族卤化物中电子基态的反转机制（e'²_g vs e'¹_ga¹₁_g），为理解二维磁性材料中晶格-自旋耦合及拓扑物性调控提供
利用高分辨共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）结合配体场多重态计算，系统研究过渡金属卤化物VBr₃和VI₃的基态电子结构。RIXS谱揭示dd跃迁与电荷转移激发，精确确定晶体场分裂、三角畸变和Racah参数。三角畸变参数符号相反：VBr₃为-0.096 eV，VI₃为0.07 eV。团簇模型计算给出高自旋V³⁺（S=1）组态，VBr₃基态为e'²_g，VI₃为e'¹_ga¹₁_g。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

利用高分辨共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）结合配体场多重态计算，系统研究过渡金属卤化物VBr₃和VI₃的基态电子结构。RIXS谱揭示dd跃迁与电荷转移激发，精确确定晶体场分裂、三角畸变和Racah参数。三角畸变参数符号相反：VBr₃为-0.096 eV，VI₃为0.07 eV。团簇模型计算给出高自旋V³⁺（S=1）组态，VBr₃基态为e'²_g，VI₃为e'¹_ga¹₁_g。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.18168v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Transition-metal halides VX₃ (X = Br and I) have emerged as promising candidates for two dimensional spintronic and quantum applications due to their layer-dependent magnetism and tunable electronic states. However, experimental insights into their ground state electronic structures remain limited. Here, we present a comprehensive investigation of VX₃ using high resolution resonant inelastic x-ray scattering (RIXS) combined with ligand field multiplet calculations. The RIXS spectra reveal distinct dd and charge-transfer excitations, allowing precise determination of electronic structure parameters, including the crystal field splitting, trigonal distortion, and Racah parameters. The determined parameters showed clear variation, indicating an increase in covalency from Br to I. The trigonal distortion parameters Δ_D₃d were determined to be -0.096 eV in VBr₃ and 0.07 eV in VI₃, indicating a sign opposition between the two compounds, reflecting good agreement with experimental RIXS data. Cluster model calculations yield a high-spin V³⁺ (S = 1) configuration, with an e'²_g ground state in VBr₃ and an e'¹_ga¹₁g ground state in VI₃, consistent with trigonal elongation and compression, respectively. Our findings provide the most complete experimental determination of the low energy electronic structure in VX₃, offering valuable insights for designing 2D magnetic and spintronic materials based on vanadium halides.

60

IRSSG：自旋空间群开源软件包#

IRSSG: An Open-Source Software Package for Spin Space Groups
📚 arXiv👤 Sheng Zhang, Ziyin Song, Zhong Fang, Hongming Weng, Zhijun Wang📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：IRSSG是首个面向自旋空间群的开源计算工具，其创新在于将非晶体学点群与230个空间群统一为紧凑的国际符号体系，实现了磁性对称性的自动化识别与表示理论计算。该软件填补了磁振子、交错磁性及拓扑磁材料研究
开发用于自旋空间群（SSG）磁性系统研究的开源软件包IRSSG，基于DFT框架，支持VASP、Quantum ESPRESSO等接口Wannier90的程序。引入结合非晶体学点群与230个晶体学空间群的紧凑SSG国际符号体系。功能包括：识别SSG操作并确定国际符号、生成任意k点小群特征标表、计算SSG操作矩阵表示的迹并指定不可约共表示标签。该软件对磁振子、交错磁性、磁拓扑及高简并激发的研究至关重要。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

开发用于自旋空间群（SSG）磁性系统研究的开源软件包IRSSG，基于DFT框架，支持VASP、Quantum ESPRESSO等接口Wannier90的程序。引入结合非晶体学点群与230个晶体学空间群的紧凑SSG国际符号体系。功能包括：识别SSG操作并确定国际符号、生成任意k点小群特征标表、计算SSG操作矩阵表示的迹并指定不可约共表示标签。该软件对磁振子、交错磁性、磁拓扑及高简并激发的研究至关重要。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.21821v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present an open-source software package IRSSG for investigating magnetic systems with spin space groups (SSGs). The package works within the density functional theory (DFT) framework and requires wavefunctions from DFT codes, such as VASP, Quantum ESPRESSO, as well as any other code that has an interface to Wannier90. We introduce a set of compact SSG international symbols by combining non-crystallographic point groups with the 230 crystallographic space groups. The program first identifies all SSG operations and determines the SSG international symbol for a given magnetic system. It then generates the SSG character tables of little groups at any k point. Finally, it computes the traces of matrix representations of SSG operations and assigns irreducible corepresentation labels to magnetic energy bands. The program is not only timely but also essential for advancing research on the study of magnons, altermagnetism, magnetic topology, and novel high-degeneracy excitations in SSG systems.

61

有限变形下挠曲磁性的Cosserat微极与偶应力弹性模型#

Cosserat micropolar and couple-stress elasticity models of flexomagnetism at finite deformations
📚 arXiv👤 Adam Sky, David Codony, Stephan Rudykh, Andreas Zilian, Stéphane P. A. Bordas, Patrizio Neff📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：基于Cosserat微极理论构建有限变形挠曲磁性模型，以三阶张量微位错-磁化耦合替代传统四阶应变梯度耦合，显著降低材料常数需求；该框架为中心对称材料中的挠曲磁性研究提供了更简洁、物理更合理的连续介质描
基于Cosserat微极理论及其衍生的偶应力理论，建立有限变形的挠曲磁性几何非线性连续介质模型。通过Lifshitz不变量将微极模型的微位错张量与磁化矢量耦合，利用三阶张量耦合（微位错为二阶张量）替代传统四阶张量应变梯度-磁化耦合。模型允许中心对称材料仅需一个挠曲磁常数，立方对称材料需两个。给出标量与矢量磁势表述的支配方程，纳米梁数值结果验证了模型的物理合理性与计算可行性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

基于Cosserat微极理论及其衍生的偶应力理论，建立有限变形的挠曲磁性几何非线性连续介质模型。通过Lifshitz不变量将微极模型的微位错张量与磁化矢量耦合，利用三阶张量耦合（微位错为二阶张量）替代传统四阶张量应变梯度-磁化耦合。模型允许中心对称材料仅需一个挠曲磁常数，立方对称材料需两个。给出标量与矢量磁势表述的支配方程，纳米梁数值结果验证了模型的物理合理性与计算可行性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.22756v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We propose geometrically nonlinear (finite) continuum models of flexomagnetism based on the Cosserat micropolar and its descendent couple-stress theory. These models introduce the magneto-mechanical interaction by coupling the micro-dislocation tensor of the micropolar model with the magnetisation vector using a Lifshitz invariant. In contrast to conventional formulations that couple strain-gradients to the magnetisation using fourth-order tensors, our approach relies on third-order tensor couplings by virtue of the micro-dislocation being a second-order tensor. Consequently, the models permit centrosymmetric materials with a single new flexomagnetic constant, and more generally allow cubic-symmetric materials with two such constants. We postulate the flexomagnetic action-functionals and derive the corresponding governing equations using both scalar and vectorial magnetic potential formulations, and present numerical results for a nano-beam geometry, confirming the physical plausibility and computational feasibility of the models.

62

转角菱方石墨烯中的高Chern数轨道磁体家族#

Family of High-Chern-Number Orbital Magnets in Twisted Rhombohedral Graphene
📚 arXiv👤 Xirui Wang, L. Antonio Benítez, Vo Tien Phong, Wai In Chu, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Cyprian Lewandowski, Pablo Jarillo-Herrero📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在转角菱方石墨烯(1+n)体系中首次实现高Chern数轨道磁体家族，突破传统量子反常霍尔效应仅能实现C=1的限制。通过层数工程精确调控拓扑层级C=n，并首次展示高Chern数态的电学-磁学开关功
在转角单层-多层菱方石墨烯体系(1+n)（n=3,4,5）中发现高Chern数轨道磁体家族。磁输运测量显示在偏离摩尔界面极化时，每个摩尔单胞一个和三个电子处存在显著反常霍尔效应。Středa轨迹与量子化霍尔电阻揭示清晰的拓扑层级C=n。自洽平均场计算支持实验观测。通过翻转谷极化实现高Chern数态的电学和磁学开关，为通过层工程系统调控Chern数和拓扑提供了平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

在转角单层-多层菱方石墨烯体系(1+n)（n=3,4,5）中发现高Chern数轨道磁体家族。磁输运测量显示在偏离摩尔界面极化时，每个摩尔单胞一个和三个电子处存在显著反常霍尔效应。Středa轨迹与量子化霍尔电阻揭示清晰的拓扑层级C=n。自洽平均场计算支持实验观测。通过翻转谷极化实现高Chern数态的电学和磁学开关，为通过层工程系统调控Chern数和拓扑提供了平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.01087v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Realizing Chern insulators with Chern numbers greater than one remains a major goal in quantum materials research. Such platforms promise multichannel dissipationless chiral transport and access to correlated phases beyond the conventional C = 1 paradigm. Here, we discover a family of high-Chern-number orbital magnets in twisted monolayer-multilayer rhombohedral graphene, denoted (1+n) with n = 3, 4, and 5. Magnetotransport measurements show pronounced anomalous Hall effects at one and three electrons per moiré unit cell when they are polarized away from the moiré interface. Across the (1+n) systems, we observe a clear topological hierarchy C = n, revealed by the Středa trajectories and the quantized Hall resistance. Our experimental observations are supported by self-consistent mean-field calculations. Moreover, we realize both electrical and magnetic switching of the high-Chern-number states by flipping the valley polarization. Together, these results establish a tunable hierarchy of orbital Chern magnets in twisted rhombohedral graphene, offering systematic control of Chern number and topology through layer engineering in pristine graphene moiré systems.

63

Comment on "Instability of the ferromagnetic quantum critical point and symmetry of the ferromagnetic ground state in two-dimensional and three-dimensional electron gases with arbitrary spin-orbit splitting"#

📚 arXiv👤 D. Belitz, T. R. Kirkpatrick📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作针对非中心对称金属中量子铁磁相变级次问题的争议，通过严格考虑相互作用屏蔽效应，纠正了先前关于粒子-粒子通道软模不受自旋-轨道耦合影响的结论，确立了三维体系中量子临界点稳定存在的新判据，对拓扑磁性
arXiv:2601.19959v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：已知在无淬灭无序的金属量子铁磁体中，通常会经历一级量子相变，而非原先预期的量子临界点。这是由于底层费米液体中的软模导致长程关联。这些关联反过来使得自由能在平均场水平上即呈现对磁化强度的非解析依赖，从而产生涨落诱导的一级相变。Kirkpatrick与Belitz [Phys. Rev. Lett. **124**, 147201 (2020)]指出，一个显著的例外是具有强自旋-…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.19959v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：已知在无淬灭无序的金属量子铁磁体中，通常会经历一级量子相变，而非原先预期的量子临界点。这是由于底层费米液体中的软模导致长程关联。这些关联反过来使得自由能在平均场水平上即呈现对磁化强度的非解析依赖，从而产生涨落诱导的一级相变。Kirkpatrick与Belitz [Phys. Rev. Lett. **124**, 147201 (2020)]指出，一个显著的例外是具有强自旋-轨道相互作用的非中心对称金属。在这类材料中，自旋-轨道相互作用赋予相关软模以质量，从而抑制导致一级相变的机制。Miserev、Loss和Klinovaja [Phys. Rev. B **106**, 134417 (2022)]声称，若考虑粒子-粒子通道中的电子-电子相互作用，即2k_F散射过程，则上述结论不成立。他们认为该相互作用通道产生的软模不会被自旋-轨道相互作用赋予质量，并再次导致一级量子相变。在本Comment中，我们证明若恰当考虑相互作用的屏蔽效应，则该结论在三维磁体中并不正确。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.19959v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Metallic quantum ferromagnets in the absence of quenched disorder are known to generically undergo a first-order quantum phase transition, avoiding the quantum critical point that had originally been expected. This is due to soft modes in the underlying Fermi liquid that lead to long-ranged correlations. These correlations in turn yield a nonanalytic dependence of the free energy on the magnetization even at a mean-field level that results in a fluctuation-induced first-order transition. Kirkpatrick and Belitz [Phys. Rev. Lett. bf 124, 147201 (2020)] have pointed out that one notable exception are non-centrosymmetric metals with a strong spin-orbit interaction. In such materials the spin-orbit interaction gives the relevant soft modes a mass, which inhibits the mechanism leading to a first-order transition. Miserev, Loss, and Klinovaja [Phys. Rev. B bf 106, 134417 (2022)] have claimed that this conclusion does not hold if electron-electron interactions in the particle-particle channel, or 2kF scattering processes, are considered. They concluded that this interaction channel leads to soft modes that are not rendered massive by the spin-orbit interaction and again lead to a first-order quantum phase transition. In this Comment we show that this conclusion is not correct in three-dimensional magnets if the screening of the interaction is properly taken into account.

64

金属量子磁体中普适的长程序参量关联#

Generic Long-Range Order-Parameter Correlations in Metallic Quantum Magnets
📚 arXiv👤 T. R. Kirkpatrick, D. Belitz📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示金属量子磁体中序参量-传导电子耦合导致的普适长程关联机制，统一解释了多种磁有序体系的量子相变行为，为调控磁相变级数提供了理论框架，对探索新奇量子物态具有重要指导意义。
研究表明，在所有类型金属磁体中，序参量与传导电子的耦合导致零温下序参量 susceptibility 呈现长程关联。该结论适用于所有已知铁磁体类别，以及反铁磁体、自旋密度波系统、螺旋磁体、磁向列相和交错磁体。对于三维均匀磁化体系、磁向列相和交错磁体，长程关联通常使磁量子相变从二级变为一级；非中心对称强自旋-轨道耦合铁磁体仅在二维体系中改变相变级数。螺旋磁体、自旋波系统和Néel反铁磁体中，若序参量波矢足够大则效应更弱，平带系统除外。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究表明，在所有类型金属磁体中，序参量与传导电子的耦合导致零温下序参量 susceptibility 呈现长程关联。该结论适用于所有已知铁磁体类别，以及反铁磁体、自旋密度波系统、螺旋磁体、磁向列相和交错磁体。对于三维均匀磁化体系、磁向列相和交错磁体，长程关联通常使磁量子相变从二级变为一级；非中心对称强自旋-轨道耦合铁磁体仅在二维体系中改变相变级数。螺旋磁体、自旋波系统和Néel反铁磁体中，若序参量波矢足够大则效应更弱，平带系统除外。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.23554v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: It is shown that in all types of metallic magnets the coupling of the order parameter to the conduction electrons leads to an order-parameter susceptibility that is long-ranged at zero temperature. This is true for all known classes of ferromagnets, and also for antiferromagnets and spin-density wave systems, helimagnets, magnetic nematics, and altermagnets. The consequences for the magnetic quantum phase transition vary between different classes of magnets. In almost all 3-d systems with a homogeneous magnetization, as well as in magnetic nematics and in altermagnets, the long-ranged correlations generically modify the nature of the magnetic quantum phase transition from second order to first order. The only exception are non-centrosymmetric ferromagnets with a strong spin-orbit interaction, where the correlations change the order of the transition in 2-d systems, but not in 3-d ones. In helimagnets, spin-wave systems, and Neel antiferromagnets their effect is even weaker and does not change the order of the transition if the ordering wave number is sufficiently large, except in flat-band systems. In systems with quenched disorder the transition generically is of second order, but the correlations modify the critical behavior. These conclusions are reached by very simple considerations that are based entirely on the single-particle excitations in the nonmagnetic phase and their modifications by a field conjugate to the order parameter, augmented by renormalization-group considerations.

65

扩展Kitaev-Yao-Lee自旋-轨道模型中的热涨落与量子涨落#

Thermal and quantum fluctuations in extended Kitaev-Yao-Lee spin-orbital model
📚 arXiv👤 Jiefu Cen, Hae-Young Kee📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统Kitaev模型框架，首次将广义自旋波理论拓展至自旋-轨道耦合体系，创新性地揭示隐藏自由度驱动的涨落竞争机制。这一方法学进展为探索量子自旋液体等非常规物态的成因提供了理论新范式。
该工作研究扩展Kitaev-Yao-Lee自旋-轨道模型中向列相的起源与稳定性。作者采用经典蒙特卡洛模拟和适用于自旋-轨道模型的广义自旋波理论，揭示额外的自旋-轨道自由度引发强烈的热涨落与量子涨落，为理解无序相的出现提供了新视角。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究扩展Kitaev-Yao-Lee自旋-轨道模型中向列相的起源与稳定性。作者采用经典蒙特卡洛模拟和适用于自旋-轨道模型的广义自旋波理论，揭示额外的自旋-轨道自由度引发强烈的热涨落与量子涨落，为理解无序相的出现提供了新视角。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.08710v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Building upon the spin-1/2 Kitaev model on a honeycomb lattice, the Yao-Lee spin-orbital model provides exactly solvable quantum spin liquids with potentially better stability against perturbations due to the additional degree of freedom. Recently, the microscopic mechanism underlying the Yao-Lee interaction in honeycomb materials has been uncovered, leading to an extended Kitaev-Yao-Lee spin-orbital model when the celebrated Kugel-Khomskii interaction is included. Numerical studies of this model have identified various disordered phases, including a broad region of the nematic phase that is reminiscent of a spin-orbital liquid. Here, we investigate the origin and stability of this nematic phase via thermal and quantum fluctuations using classical Monte Carlo simulations and a generalized spin wave theory appropriate for the spin-orbital model. We demonstrate that the additional spin-orbital degree of freedom gives rise to strong thermal and quantum fluctuations in spin-orbital models, providing insight into the emergence of disordered phases.

66

平面腔中双层磁性薄膜的几何可控磁子-极化激元#

Geometry-controlled magnon-polaritons of double magnetic films in planar cavities
📚 arXiv👤 S. Solihin, Ahmad R. T. Nugraha, Muhammad Aziz Majidi📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统磁子-极化激元仅依赖磁体积的局限，揭示几何构型对耦合的调控机制：波腹/波节位置选择性增强或抑制耦合，弱对称破缺激活暗模分支。为可重构量子信息器件与自旋波拓扑态设计提供全新自由度。
该工作构建双层平面微波腔模型，推导双磁性薄膜的完整散射理论。研究表明磁子-光子耦合依赖于空间构型而非仅总磁体积：波腹兼容位置增强耦合，波节兼容位置抑制耦合；弱对称破缺可将暗模激活为额外分支。对于非零交换作用，简化多模理论预言奇数驻自旋波模式存在家族分辨的亮通道与暗通道。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作构建双层平面微波腔模型，推导双磁性薄膜的完整散射理论。研究表明磁子-光子耦合依赖于空间构型而非仅总磁体积：波腹兼容位置增强耦合，波节兼容位置抑制耦合；弱对称破缺可将暗模激活为额外分支。对于非零交换作用，简化多模理论预言奇数驻自旋波模式存在家族分辨的亮通道与暗通道。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.11690v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Planar cavity magnonics has been developed mainly for a single magnetic film, leaving multilayer behavior in spatially resolved cavity scattering largely unexplored. Here, we introduce a double layer planar cavity with two magnetic films embedded in the same microwave cavity to derive a full two-film scattering theory in the macrospin (J = 0) limit and recover the exact zero-gap half-thickness limit, thereby benchmarking the model against the known one-film result. We find that the double layer model actively enables geometry-controlled bright-channel enhancement, demonstrating that the magnon-photon coupling depends on spatial placement rather than just total magnetic volume. Antinode-compatible placements increase the coupling, while node-compatible placements suppress it. Weak symmetry breaking also transfers finite cavity weight to a mode dark in the symmetric limit, producing an additional branch without destroying the main avoided crossing. Finally, a reduced multimode theory for J≠ 0 predicts family-resolved bright and dark channels for odd standing-spin-wave modes.

67

基于HfZrO₂的TiO₂高性能铁电场效应晶体管用于神经形态计算#

High Performance TiO2 Ferroelectric Field Effect Transistors with HfZrO2 for Neuromorphic Computing
📚 arXiv👤 Chandan Samanta, Elia Palmese, Ziyu Ouyang, Tuofu Zhama, Robinson Pino, Yuping Zeng📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将HfZrO₂铁电介质与TiO₂沟道结合，通过栅极拓扑优化实现了超高开关比与超低关态泄漏的协同突破，为高能效神经形态计算提供了兼具非易失存储与突触模拟功能的器件平台，缓解了传统FeFET
该工作制备了采用HfZrO₂铁电介质层和底栅结构的TiO₂铁电场效应晶体管（FeFET），面向神经形态系统应用。通过改变铁电栅堆叠厚度制备了两组不同栅极拓扑的器件，并系统研究了源漏长度和栅长变化对器件性能的影响。器件实现了高达10⁷的开关比和小于10⁻¹² A的低泄漏关态电流，循环测试显示出高可靠性和稳定的存储窗口，存储窗口范围为3-8 V。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作制备了采用HfZrO₂铁电介质层和底栅结构的TiO₂铁电场效应晶体管（FeFET），面向神经形态系统应用。通过改变铁电栅堆叠厚度制备了两组不同栅极拓扑的器件，并系统研究了源漏长度和栅长变化对器件性能的影响。器件实现了高达10⁷的开关比和小于10⁻¹² A的低泄漏关态电流，循环测试显示出高可靠性和稳定的存储窗口，存储窗口范围为3-8 V。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20406v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: TiO2 ferroelectric field effect transistors (FeFETs) with HfZrO2 (HZO) ferroelectric dielectric layers and bottom gate topology are fabricated for applications in neuromorphic systems. Two sets of devices are fabricated with different gate topologies by varying the thickness of the ferroelectric gate stack. Different device architectures are studied by varying the source drain length (LSD) and gate length (LG). The devices have high on/off ratios up to 10⁷ with low leakage off currents <10⁻¹² A. Repeated cycle testing shows high reliability and a stable memory window. The devices have large memory windows ranging from 3 to 8 V.

68

交错磁性的对称性分类与二维IV型磁性的涌现#

Symmetry Classification of Altermagnetism and Emergence of Type-IV Magnetism in Two Dimensions
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 Mu Tian, Chaoxi Cui, Zeying Zhang, Jingyi Duan, Wanxiang Feng, and Run-Wu Zhang📅 2026-05-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破了传统三维交错磁性分类范式，建立了二维极限下的全新对称性分类框架，首次预言IV型交错磁性的存在，填补了低维量子磁性理论空白，为二维自旋电子学材料的功能化设计开辟了新方向。
二维交错磁性（AM）因其优异物理性质和广泛应用前景备受关注，但其分类在从三维降至二维时发生根本性范式转变。该工作系统研究了二维交错磁性的对称性分类框架，揭示了传统三维分类方案在低维极限下的失效机制，并预言了新型IV型磁性的存在。该研究为二维量子磁性材料的设计与物性调控提供了理论基础。

二维交错磁性（AM）因其优异物理性质和广泛应用前景备受关注，但其分类在从三维降至二维时发生根本性范式转变。该工作系统研究了二维交错磁性的对称性分类框架，揭示了传统三维分类方案在低维极限下的失效机制，并预言了新型IV型磁性的存在。该研究为二维量子磁性材料的设计与物性调控提供了理论基础。

Author(s): Mu Tian, Chaoxi Cui, Zeying Zhang, Jingyi Duan, Wanxiang Feng, and Run-Wu Zhang Two-dimensional (2D) magnetism, particularly 2D altermagnetism (AM), has attracted considerable interest due to its exceptional physical properties and broad application potential. However, the classification of AM undergoes a fundamental paradigm shift when transitioning from three-dimensional (3D)… [Phys. Rev. Lett. 136, 206701] Published Thu May 21, 2026

三层镍酸盐La₄Ni₃O₁₀中条纹序动力学的实空间成像#

Imaging stripe dynamics in trilayer nickelate La₄Ni₃O₁₀
📚 arXiv👤 Uladzislau Mikhailau, Luke Rhodes, Siri A. Berge, Matthias Hepting, Masahiko Isobe, Carolina A. Marques, Pascal Puphal, Peter Wahl📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在实空间原子尺度上直接捕捉三层镍酸盐条纹序的动态演化，创新性地利用非弹性隧穿电子诱导相位滑移作为探测手段，突破了传统静态表征的局限。这一方法学突破不仅证实镍酸盐与铜氧化物在关联电子物理上的深
该研究利用自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜，在三层镍酸盐La₄Ni₃O₁₀中直接观测到具有四单胞周期的条纹序，其特征与铜氧化物高度相似，并在费米能级附近打开约66 meV的近完全能隙。关键发现是，超过约20 meV阈值的隧穿电子可触发离散相位滑移，从而实现原子尺度的条纹动力学成像，揭示了镍酸盐中关联物理驱动的条纹序与铜氧化物的深刻相似性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜，在三层镍酸盐La₄Ni₃O₁₀中直接观测到具有四单胞周期的条纹序，其特征与铜氧化物高度相似，并在费米能级附近打开约66 meV的近完全能隙。关键发现是，超过约20 meV阈值的隧穿电子可触发离散相位滑移，从而实现原子尺度的条纹动力学成像，揭示了镍酸盐中关联物理驱动的条纹序与铜氧化物的深刻相似性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18954v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Since the discovery of high-temperature superconductivity in nickelate superconductors, it is an open question how closely the superconducting state resembles that of cuprate superconductors. One salient feature of the phase diagram of the high-temperature cuprate superconductors is stripe order. Despite their prevalence, real-space imaging has been limited to the charge sector. Here we use spin-polarised scanning tunnelling microscopy to visualize the local magnetic and charge distribution emerging due to a stripe order in the trilayer nickelate La₄Ni₃O₁₀. The stripe order exhibits a four unit cell periodicity, closely resembling that seen in cuprates, and opens a near-complete sim66meV gap at the Fermi level. Crucially, discrete phase slips can be triggered by tunneling electrons above a sim 20meV threshold, allowing imaging of stripe dynamics at the atomic scale. These results highlight the importance of correlation physics driving stripe-like orders in lanthanum nickelates with striking similarities to the cuprates.

70

蜂窝晶格J₁-J₂反铁磁XY模型中的磁相#

Magnetic phases in the J₁-J₂ antiferromagnetic XY model on the honeycomb lattice
📚 arXiv👤 I. V. Lukin, M. O. Luhanko, Yu. V. Slyusarenko, A. G. Sotnikov📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：发展含双位点单胞的角转移矩阵重整化群算法与无限螺旋投影纠缠对态拟设，精确绘制蜂窝晶格J₁-J₂反铁磁XY模型完整相图，澄清竞争序区域基态归属，为阻挫量子磁体及量子相变理论提供高精度数值基准。
该研究采用发展的角转移矩阵重整化群算法（含双位点单胞）及无限螺旋投影纠缠对态拟设，系统研究了蜂窝晶格J₁-J₂反铁磁XY模型的基态性质与相图。确定了Néel、Ising、共线及非公度螺旋相等主要相区及其相变边界；在竞争序区域，二聚化态能量系统性地高于共线相；共线相随J₂/J₁增大经二级相变转变为非公度螺旋相。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究采用发展的角转移矩阵重整化群算法（含双位点单胞）及无限螺旋投影纠缠对态拟设，系统研究了蜂窝晶格J₁-J₂反铁磁XY模型的基态性质与相图。确定了Néel、Ising、共线及非公度螺旋相等主要相区及其相变边界；在竞争序区域，二聚化态能量系统性地高于共线相；共线相随J₂/J₁增大经二级相变转变为非公度螺旋相。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18982v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study ground-state properties and phase diagram of the J₁-J₂ antiferromagnetic XY model on the honeycomb lattice by means of the developed corner transfer matrix renormalization group algorithm with the two-site unit cell and the infinite spiral projected entangled pair states ansatz. We identify the main phases: Néel, Ising, collinear, and incommensurate spiral phases, as well as the transitions between them, as functions of the ratio J₂/J₁. In the regime of competing types of ordering, we show that the energies of the dimerized states are systematically higher than the energies in the collinear phase. This collinear phase transforms to the incommensurate spiral phase through the second-order phase transition upon a further increase of J₂/J₁.

71

量子临界海森堡模型的解禁闭边界相变#

Deconfined Boundary Phase Transition of a Quantum Critical Heisenberg Model
📚 arXiv👤 Chengxiang Ding, Long Zhang📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在量子临界海森堡模型中实现解禁闭边界相变，突破传统Landau对称性破缺范式。通过设计边界多自旋相互作用，揭示反铁磁与价键固体序间的连续转变及共形场论描述的临界行为，为探索高维解禁闭量子相变
该研究通过大规模量子蒙特卡洛模拟，探究了(2+1)维量子临界海森堡模型附挂自旋链的边界相。引入边界多自旋Q项驱动了从反铁磁序到价键固体序的连续边界相变，定出临界点Qc=0.310(11)及临界指数ys=0.81(4)，以及反铁磁和价键固体序参量的标度维度Δs=0.660(15)和Δv=0.204(14)。

该研究通过大规模量子蒙特卡洛模拟，探究了(2+1)维量子临界海森堡模型附挂自旋链的边界相。引入边界多自旋Q项驱动了从反铁磁序到价键固体序的连续边界相变，定出临界点Qc=0.310(11)及临界指数ys=0.81(4)，以及反铁磁和价键固体序参量的标度维度Δs=0.660(15)和Δv=0.204(14)。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19011v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the boundary phases of a (2+1)-dimensional quantum critical Heisenberg model with a dangling spin chain. By introducing a multispin Q-term along the boundary, we drive a continuous boundary transition from an antiferromagnetic (AF) order to a valence-bond solid (VBS) order. Using large-scale quantum Monte Carlo simulations, we locate the critical point at Qc=0.310(11), and obtain the critical exponents at Qc, including yₛ=0.81(4) and the scaling dimensions of AF and VBS order parameters Δₛ=0.660(15) and Δᵥ=0.204(14). The weak long-range AF order for Q
