金属螺旋磁体MnGe的热容分析#

The analysis of heat capacity of MnGe metallic helimagnet
📚 arXiv👤 M. A. Anisimov, A. V. Bokov, A. V. Semeno, V. A. Sidorov, A. V. Tsvyashchenko📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将电阻率分解方法拓展至热容分析，实现了电子、声子与自旋涨落贡献的精准分离，突破了传统热容解析的模糊性。所确立的自旋涨落温度尺度为理解MnGe中拓扑自旋织构的热激发机制提供了关键参数，对螺
该工作基于同一晶体的电阻率分解结果，分析了金属螺旋磁体MnGe在零场下的热容。分析识别出电子贡献（γ̃≈7 mJ/mol·K²）、声子贡献（Θ_D≈350 K）以及由自旋涨落引起的附加项，后者在顺磁态和磁有序态的宽温区均存在但振幅显著低于声子成分。所得自旋涨落温度θₛf(MnGe)≈330 K与先前估计及多种实验结果一致，表明MnGe中自旋涨落至少存在至250-300 K。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作基于同一晶体的电阻率分解结果，分析了金属螺旋磁体MnGe在零场下的热容。分析识别出电子贡献（γ̃≈7 mJ/mol·K²）、声子贡献（Θ_D≈350 K）以及由自旋涨落引起的附加项，后者在顺磁态和磁有序态的宽温区均存在但振幅显著低于声子成分。所得自旋涨落温度θₛf(MnGe)≈330 K与先前估计及多种实验结果一致，表明MnGe中自旋涨落至少存在至250-300 K。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19088v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Zero-field heat capacity of metallic helimagnet MnGe was analyzed based on the results of resistivity decomposition published previously by our group for the same crystal. Current procedure allowed identifying along with (i) electronic (tildeγ approx 7 mJ/molḑotK²⁾ and (ii) phononic (Θ_D approx 350 K) components (iii) the additional term, caused by the presence of spin fluctuations (SFs). The last contribution was found to exist in a wide range of temperatures in both paramagnetic (PM) and magnetically ordered states. However, its amplitude appears to be significantly lower in comparison with phononic component. The obtained value of spin fluctuation temperature θₛf(MnGe) approx 330 K correlates well with previous estimations, as well as with results of various experiments, which predict the existence of SFs in MnGe at least up to 250 - 300 K.

73

插层过渡金属硫族化合物中g波交错磁性的电子与磁振子性质#

Electronic and Magnonic Properties of g-Wave Altermagnetism in Intercalated Transition Metal Dichalcogenides
📚 arXiv👤 Shuyi Li, Adrian Bahri, Chunjing Jia📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示插层过渡金属硫族化合物中g波交错磁性的微观起源——键依赖跳跃各向异性，阐明了电子能带节点结构与磁振子手性劈裂的材料特异性调控机制，并证实高阶量子涨落不破坏对称性保护的拓扑特征，为探索新型
该工作以Fe₁/₄NbS₂和V₁/₃NbS₂为候选交错磁性材料，结合有效紧束缚模型、自旋模型与第一性原理计算进行研究。g波电子自旋劈裂源于键依赖的跳跃各向异性，导致材料依赖的节点结构；磁振子色散中的手性劈裂受单离子各向异性控制，自旋沿易轴取向时呈现交错磁性样节点结构，而易面取向时该特征消失。超越线性自旋波理论，1/S修正的磁振子-磁振子相互作用保持了对称性和节点结构。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作以Fe₁/₄NbS₂和V₁/₃NbS₂为候选交错磁性材料，结合有效紧束缚模型、自旋模型与第一性原理计算进行研究。g波电子自旋劈裂源于键依赖的跳跃各向异性，导致材料依赖的节点结构；磁振子色散中的手性劈裂受单离子各向异性控制，自旋沿易轴取向时呈现交错磁性样节点结构，而易面取向时该特征消失。超越线性自旋波理论，1/S修正的磁振子-磁振子相互作用保持了对称性和节点结构。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19162v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnetism is a recently identified class of magnetic order characterized by unconventional momentum-dependent spin splitting in the absence of net magnetization, and understanding its electronic and magnetic properties is essential for revealing its fundamental physics and potential applications. In this work we investigate two intercalated transition-metal dichalcogenides, Fe₁/₄NbS₂ and V₁/₃NbS₂, as candidate altermagnetic materials by using effective tight-binding and spin models complemented by first-principles calculations. We show that the g-wave electronic spin splitting originates from bond-dependent hopping anisotropy, leading to material-dependent nodal structures. For the magnetic excitations, the emergence of chiral splitting in the magnon dispersion is controlled by single-ion anisotropy, which manifests as altermagnetic-like nodal structures when spins are oriented along an easy-axis. Conversely, this altermagnetic signature disappears when the spins are aligned in an easy-plane. Beyond linear spin-wave theory, we find that 1/S corrections from magnon--magnon interactions preserve the symmetry and nodal structure of the band splitting while generally reducing its magnitude, with strong antiferromagnetic exchange leading to a non-negligible renormalization of the chiral splitting. Our findings establish intercalated transition-metal dichalcogenides as promising platforms for understanding the interplay between crystal symmetry, non-relativistic spin splitting, and magnetic properties in altermagnets.

74

利用非局域光伏效应在二维磁体中调控隐藏量子度规响应#

Harnessing hidden quantum metric response in a 2D magnet via nonlocal photovoltaic effect
📚 arXiv👤 Yong Tan, Qian Hu, Rui-Chun Xiao, Hang Zhou, Yuqing Huang, Zelalem Abebe Bekele, Yongcheng Deng, Xuan Qian, Qikang Gan, Lei Wang, Yang Ji, Ding-Fu Shao, Lixia Zhao, Kaiyou Wang📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地提出"隐藏量子度规响应"概念，利用非局域光伏效应的空间分离技术破解中心对称系统的补偿难题，首次在二维磁体中实现量子几何实部的实验探测，并基于此开发出兼具可重构、非易失和概率性三重特性的新
该研究揭示量子度规（量子几何的实部）响应可在中心对称系统中以隐藏形式存在。通过在层状磁性半导体中采用非局域光伏方案，研究者空间分离相互补偿的光电流，成功探测到这种隐藏的量子度规响应，并在不同磁态及超薄极限下验证该效应。此外，基于量子度规响应实现了可重构、非易失和概率性光电探测，从根本上拓展了量子几何响应的研究范畴。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究揭示量子度规（量子几何的实部）响应可在中心对称系统中以隐藏形式存在。通过在层状磁性半导体中采用非局域光伏方案，研究者空间分离相互补偿的光电流，成功探测到这种隐藏的量子度规响应，并在不同磁态及超薄极限下验证该效应。此外，基于量子度规响应实现了可重构、非易失和概率性光电探测，从根本上拓展了量子几何响应的研究范畴。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19238v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The quantum geometry of Bloch wavefunctions underpins a wealth of emergent phenomena in quantum materials. Its imaginary part, the Berry curvature, has long been recognized as a key source for hallmark effects such as quantum Hall and topological phenomena, etc. The real part of quantum geometry, the quantum metric, has recently garnered considerable attention due to predictions of a range of unconventional nonlinear and nonequilibrium responses. Such responses usually vanish in centrosymmetric systems, largely restricting relevant studies to non-centrosymmetric materials. Here we challenge this convention by revealing that the vanished quantum metric response can survive in a hidden form. Using a non-local photovoltaic scheme in a layered magnetic semiconductor, we spatially separate mutually compensating photocurrents and thereby detect such hidden quantum metric response. We demonstrate this effect across distinct magnetic states and down to the ultrathin limit. Moreover, we realize reconfigurable, nonvolatile and probabilistic photodetection enabled by the quantum metric response. These results not only fundamentally expand the material landscape for quantum geometric physics, but also open new gateway to harvest the quantum geometric contributions for state-of-the-art nonvolatile reprogrammable sensing and computing applications.

75

EuAgAs中螺旋磁序驱动的高阶外尔节点#

Higher-order Weyl nodes driven by helical magnetic order in EuAgAs
📚 arXiv👤 Jian-Rui Soh, Ziming Zhu, Louis Withers, J. Alberto Rodríguez-Velamazán, Timur K. Kim, Oscar Fabelo, Anne Stunault, Daniil Yevtushynsky, Dharmalingam Prabhakaran, Shengyuan A. Yang, Andrew T. Boothroyd📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在螺旋磁序材料EuAgAs中证实高阶外尔节点的存在，突破了传统非共线磁结构产生外尔费米子的认知框架。螺旋磁序诱导的能带折叠效应为拓扑量子态的磁调控提供了新范式，对自旋电子学和拓扑器件设计具有
该研究通过中子衍射和共振弹性X射线散射，确定了六角磷化物EuAgAs在T_N1=12 K和T_N2=8 K的两个相继磁相变及略微不同的磁传播矢量。球面中子偏振测量揭示其基态为沿c轴排列、周期约为c晶格参数两倍的横向螺旋磁结构。第一性原理计算预测该螺旋相存在微妙的能带折叠效应及有效高阶外尔节点的出现，这些拓扑特征位于计算费米能级附近。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究通过中子衍射和共振弹性X射线散射，确定了六角磷化物EuAgAs在T_N1=12 K和T_N2=8 K的两个相继磁相变及略微不同的磁传播矢量。球面中子偏振测量揭示其基态为沿c轴排列、周期约为c晶格参数两倍的横向螺旋磁结构。第一性原理计算预测该螺旋相存在微妙的能带折叠效应及有效高阶外尔节点的出现，这些拓扑特征位于计算费米能级附近。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19347v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic topological semimetals provide a fertile ground for exploring how long-range magnetic order can alter electronic band structures and generate novel quasiparticles such as Weyl fermions. Here, we investigate the coupled magnetic and electronic structure of single-crystalline EuAgAs, a hexagonal pnictide whose magnetic ground state has remained elusive. Using neutron diffraction and resonant elastic X-ray scattering, we identify an unusual magnetic ordering sequence with two successive phase transitions at T_N1 = 12 K and T_N2 = 8 K. We observe two slightly different magnetic propagation vectors, one associated with T_N1 and the other with T_N2. Spherical neutron polarimetry reveals that the magnetic structure is a transverse helix aligned along the c axis with a period that is approximately twice the c lattice parameter. First-principles calculations for the helical phase predict subtle band folding effects and the emergence of effective higher-order Weyl nodes. These topological features appear near the calculated Fermi energy EF which, however, lies above the position of EF obtained from angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy so could not be probed in this study.

76

偶极守恒自旋链中的分形子约束与磁序#

Fractonic Constraints and Magnetic Order in a Dipole-Conserving Spin Chain
📚 arXiv👤 Prabhakar, Giuseppe De Tomasi, Soumya Bera📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示偶极守恒约束与伊辛相互作用竞争可诱导新型"偶极有序"量子相，其序参量定义于自旋对而非单自旋层面，为理解分形子动力学如何重塑磁相图提供了关键范例，对量子多体约束系统的可控物态设计具有指导意
该研究探讨了一维自旋链中偶极守恒（禁止孤立自旋激发的传播）与伊辛型相互作用（倾向于有序）之间的竞争。尽管存在动力学约束，系统仍稳定出反铁磁偶极有序基态，其有序发生在自旋对层面而非单个自旋。对于反铁磁伊辛相互作用，模型经历从偶极有序相到自旋反铁磁相的相变；对于铁磁伊辛相互作用，则出现反铁磁和铁磁两种偶极有序相，足够大的负相互作用强度下偶极有序相转变为常规自旋铁磁相。研究采用密度矩阵重整化群和大规模对角化表征这些相。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究探讨了一维自旋链中偶极守恒（禁止孤立自旋激发的传播）与伊辛型相互作用（倾向于有序）之间的竞争。尽管存在动力学约束，系统仍稳定出反铁磁偶极有序基态，其有序发生在自旋对层面而非单个自旋。对于反铁磁伊辛相互作用，模型经历从偶极有序相到自旋反铁磁相的相变；对于铁磁伊辛相互作用，则出现反铁磁和铁磁两种偶极有序相，足够大的负相互作用强度下偶极有序相转变为常规自旋铁磁相。研究采用密度矩阵重整化群和大规模对角化表征这些相。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19421v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This work investigates the competition between dipole conservation, which imposes strong dynamical constraints and prevents the propagation of isolated spin excitations, and Ising-type interactions that favor ordering. Specifically, we explore the ground state phase diagram of a one-dimensional spin chain in the presence of both fractonic constraints and interactions. Despite the kinetic constraints, the system stabilizes an antiferromagnetic dipole-ordered ground state, where the ordering occurs at the level of spin pairs rather than individual spins. At a large Ising interaction strength, the model undergoes a phase transition from a dipole-ordered phase to a spin antiferromagnetic phase. In contrast, for ferromagnetic Ising interactions, the model exhibits both antiferromagnetic and ferromagnetic dipole ordered phases. At sufficiently large negative interaction strength, the dipole ordered phase transitions to a ferromagnetic phase with conventional spin ferromagnetic order. To characterize these distinct phases, we employ density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) simulations alongside large-scale diagonalization. We analyze appropriate order parameters, along with features of the entanglement spectrum and dynamical spectral functions. In limiting cases, the observed transitions can be understood by mapping the dipole conserving model onto effective XXZ models in a restricted Hilbert space of composite spins.

77

压电-挠曲磁性纳米梁外部磁通密度的混合一维-二维有限元评估#

Evaluation of External Magnetic Flux Density in Piezo-Flexomagnetic Nanobeams Using a Hybrid 1D-2D Finite Element Framework
📚 arXiv👤 Lala Samprit Ray, Bishweshwar Babu📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地构建了1D-2D混合有限元框架，将Timoshenko梁模型与二维静磁场耦合，突破了传统方法仅关注结构内部的局限。核心发现是自由站立纳米梁在无压磁耦合时仍存在显著外部磁通，揭示了挠曲电效
该研究数值评估了压电-挠曲磁性纳米梁弯曲时在周围空气中产生的外部磁通密度。提出的耦合混合有限元框架结合一维Timoshenko梁模型与涵盖梁体及周围空气域的二维静磁问题，通过与磁隔离梁的解析解对比验证了公式。结果表明即使在无压磁耦合时，自由站立结构仍存在显著的外部磁通分布；系统敏感性分析进一步确定了对外部横向磁通密度影响最强的材料参数，为纳米尺度非接触磁弹性传感系统设计提供依据。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究数值评估了压电-挠曲磁性纳米梁弯曲时在周围空气中产生的外部磁通密度。提出的耦合混合有限元框架结合一维Timoshenko梁模型与涵盖梁体及周围空气域的二维静磁问题，通过与磁隔离梁的解析解对比验证了公式。结果表明即使在无压磁耦合时，自由站立结构仍存在显著的外部磁通分布；系统敏感性分析进一步确定了对外部横向磁通密度影响最强的材料参数，为纳米尺度非接触磁弹性传感系统设计提供依据。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19422v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This study numerically evaluates the external magnetic flux density generated in air by the bending of a piezo-flexomagnetic nanobeam. In several classes of non-contact sensors, the magnetic field induced in the surrounding medium is often more useful than the internal magnetic response. However, most theoretical studies on piezo-flexomagnetic nanostructures neglect the external magnetic domain. The proposed framework employs a coupled hybrid finite element formulation combining a 1D Timoshenko beam model with a 2D magnetostatic problem encompassing both the beam body and the surrounding air domain. The formulation is verified against analytical solutions of magnetically isolated piezo-flexomagnetic beams. The results demonstrate the presence of a significant external magnetic flux distribution in free-standing structures, even in the absence of piezomagnetic coupling. A systematic sensitivity analysis further identifies the material parameters most strongly influencing the external transverse magnetic flux density. These findings provide insight into the design of nanoscale non-contact magnetoelastic sensing systems.

78

零净磁化杂化磁体#

Zero-net-magnetization hybrid magnet
📚 arXiv👤 San-Dong Guo, Shi-Hao Zhang📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统全补偿磁体的对称性限制，创新性地提出"部分耦合"杂化磁体架构，通过异质结能带工程实现电子/空穴掺杂非对称调控，在保持零杂散场优势的同时引入太赫兹动力学响应，为超高密度超快自旋电子器件开辟
该工作提出零净磁化杂化磁体的新概念，其中磁原子通过空间反演对称性、旋转/镜面对称性或无对称关联实现部分耦合。杂化磁体可由PT反铁磁体、交错磁体或完全补偿亚铁磁体构成的异质结构建，研究重点为二类能带排列的异质结中电子掺杂与空穴掺杂的非对称行为。该体系兼具零杂散场和太赫兹动力学特性，具有超高密度与超快应用潜力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出零净磁化杂化磁体的新概念，其中磁原子通过空间反演对称性、旋转/镜面对称性或无对称关联实现部分耦合。杂化磁体可由PT反铁磁体、交错磁体或完全补偿亚铁磁体构成的异质结构建，研究重点为二类能带排列的异质结中电子掺杂与空穴掺杂的非对称行为。该体系兼具零杂散场和太赫兹动力学特性，具有超高密度与超快应用潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19445v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Zero-net-magnetization magnets possess ultradense and ultrafast application potential, benefiting from their intrinsic zero stray field and terahertz dynamics characteristics. Herein, we propose the concept of zero-net-magnetization hybrid magnet, in which magnetic atoms with opposite spin polarization are partially coupled via spatial inversion (P) symmetry, partially via rotation/mirror (C/M) symmetry or partially without any symmetry correlation. From a local perspective and neglecting the interactions between local regions, hybrid magnet can be regarded as being composed of PT-antiferromagnet (possessing the combined symmetry (PT) of P and time-reversal (T)), altermagnet, or fully compensated ferrimagnet. To realize hybrid magnet, we propose that such system can be constructed by forming heterojunction with three types of zero-net-magnetization magnetic monolayers. We mainly investigate the heterojunction composed of two kinds of zero-net-magnetization magnets, among which one type corresponds to fully compensated ferrimagnet. When heterojunction hybrid magnet exhibits a type-II band alignment, only one of electron doping and hole doping can induce a net magnetic moment, while the other hardly generates any net magnetization. Taking the heterojunction constructed by PT-antiferromagnet and fully compensated ferrimagnet as an example, we verify our proposal by means of the tight-binding (TB) model. Finally, taking the Cr₂C₂S₆/CrMoC₂S₆ heterojunction as an example, we perform first-principles calculations combined with electric field modulation to validate our TB model and theoretical proposal.

79

非绝热磁子动力学的非线性稳定化#

Nonlinear Stabilization of Non-Adiabatic Magnonic Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 A. M. Tishin📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将η算法拓展至非线性磁子体系，揭示频率失谐诱导的动态局域化机制可实现参量激发的有界稳定，突破了传统非绝热过程中能量向高阶模式泄漏的瓶颈。为YIG基超快低能耗磁子器件（开关能量~22 aJ
该工作基于η算法提出非线性磁子平台，用于纳米尺度铁氧体结构中的有界非绝热参量激发。以钴掺杂钇铁石榴石(YIG:Co)为模型体系，分析非线性频率失谐如何抑制参量增长并驱动系统进入动态局域化的低占据磁子态。数值验证表明有限调节器可抑制向高阶模式的泄漏，实验报道的超快开关吸收能量密度对应约22 aJ的开关能量。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作基于η算法提出非线性磁子平台，用于纳米尺度铁氧体结构中的有界非绝热参量激发。以钴掺杂钇铁石榴石(YIG:Co)为模型体系，分析非线性频率失谐如何抑制参量增长并驱动系统进入动态局域化的低占据磁子态。数值验证表明有限调节器可抑制向高阶模式的泄漏，实验报道的超快开关吸收能量密度对应约22 aJ的开关能量。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19647v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We propose a nonlinear magnonic platform for bounded non-adiabatic parametric excitation in nanoscale ferrite structures. The approach is based on the η-algorithm, where the non-adiabaticity parameter quantifies the strength of the parametric drive, while the nonlinear frequency regulator U represents the anharmonic spectral detuning of the medium. Using Co-doped yttrium iron garnet (YIG:Co) as a representative material system, we analyze how nonlinear detuning suppresses uncontrolled parametric growth and drives the system toward a dynamically localized low-occupancy magnonic state. Numerical verification in truncated Fock bases shows that a finite regulator U can suppress leakage into higher-order modes and preserve bounded dynamics under non-adiabatic excitation. The experimentally reported absorbed energy density for ultrafast switching in YIG:Co corresponds to an estimated switching energy of approximately 22 aJ for a 20x20x10 nm3 cell, providing a physically relevant scale for low-energy resonant state formation. We further discuss the role of magnetic damping, exchange-gap confinement, and phonon transparency in maintaining coherent magnonic dynamics over multiple operation cycles. These results suggest that nonlinear self-limited non-adiabatic dynamics in ferrite nanostructures may provide a physical basis for low-energy wave-based information processing.

80

交错磁体中可调谐声子驱动磁子自旋流#

Tunable Phonon-Driven Magnon Spin Currents in Altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Sofie Helene Ursin, Mathias Kläui, Kjetil M. D. Hals📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示交错磁体中声子-磁子耦合的动量选择性机制，发现d波对称自旋流及频率调控的全反转效应，突破了传统磁子器件调谐性受限的瓶颈，为太赫兹频段相干自旋电子学开辟了新路径。
该工作从微观理论出发研究二维交错磁体中声子诱导的磁子自旋流，推导了选择性声子激发产生的非平衡磁子分布。结果表明自旋流对声子动量呈现显著的d波对称性，且沿交错磁方向的自旋流可通过调节声子频率实现完全反转。该发现为高度可调谐的相干太赫兹磁子自旋流提供了新平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作从微观理论出发研究二维交错磁体中声子诱导的磁子自旋流，推导了选择性声子激发产生的非平衡磁子分布。结果表明自旋流对声子动量呈现显著的d波对称性，且沿交错磁方向的自旋流可通过调节声子频率实现完全反转。该发现为高度可调谐的相干太赫兹磁子自旋流提供了新平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19659v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets have recently attracted considerable interest due to their unique symmetry-governed spintronic properties. Here, we investigate phonon-induced magnon spin currents in a two-dimensional altermagnet. Starting from a microscopic theory of the coupled magnon-phonon system, we derive the nonequilibrium magnon distribution generated by selective phonon excitations. We show that the resulting spin currents exhibit a pronounced d-wave symmetry with respect to the phonon momentum. Moreover, the spin current along the altermagnetic directions can be completely reversed by tuning the phonon frequency. These findings establish altermagnets as promising platforms for realizing highly tunable, phonon-driven coherent terahertz magnon spin currents.

81

LaMnSi中宇称破缺反铁磁态的实现#

Realization of a parity-violating antiferromagnetic state in LaMnSi
📚 arXiv👤 Takuma Iwata, K. Shiraishi, T. Aoyama, D. Senba, T. Takeda, Y. Fujisawa, M. Nurmamat, K. Nakanishi, K. Yamagami, M. Arita, T. Yamada, Y. Yanagi, A. Kimura, H. Tanida, Kenta Kuroda📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在单晶LaMnSi中实验证实PT对称反铁磁态，创新性地将软X射线ARPES与偏振分辨SHG显微术相结合，实现了三维电子结构与非线性光学响应的关联表征。该工作为理解时间-空间反演联合对称性保护
该工作结合软X射线角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)和偏振分辨光学二次谐波产生(SHG)显微术研究候选宇称破缺反铁磁金属LaMnSi。软X射线ARPES解析的三维体带结构与反铁磁相密度泛函理论计算一致，SHG显微术检测到相反磁畴符号反转的非线性光学响应，实验证实了破缺P和T但保持PT联合对称性的特殊磁有序及其关联电子结构，为非互易和非线性响应的微观起源提供了关键证据。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合软X射线角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)和偏振分辨光学二次谐波产生(SHG)显微术研究候选宇称破缺反铁磁金属LaMnSi。软X射线ARPES解析的三维体带结构与反铁磁相密度泛函理论计算一致，SHG显微术检测到相反磁畴符号反转的非线性光学响应，实验证实了破缺P和T但保持PT联合对称性的特殊磁有序及其关联电子结构，为非互易和非线性响应的微观起源提供了关键证据。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19891v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Spontaneous symmetry breaking underlies functional electronic phenomena in quantum materials. Breaking space-inversion (P) or time-reversal (T) symmetry can generate spin-split electronic bands central to modern spintronics. By contrast, parity-violating antiferromagnetic (AFM) order breaks both P and T while preserving the combined PT symmetry, enabling spin-degenerate yet momentum-asymmetric electronic bands. This momentum asymmetry has been proposed as a microscopic origin of unconventional nonreciprocal and nonlinear responses but its experimental verification has remained challenging because it requires establishing both the symmetry-breaking magnetic order and the associated electronic structure. Here we combine soft x-ray angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) and polarization-resolved optical second-harmonic generation (SHG) microscopy to study LaMnSi, a candidate parity-violating AFM metal. Soft x-ray ARPES resolves the three-dimensional bulk band structures in agreement with density functional theory calculations for the AFM phase, whereas SHG microscopy detects sign-reversing nonlinear optical responses from opposite AFM domains that carry T-odd parity-violating order. Together, these results provide direct evidence for parity-violating AFM state in LaMnSi, establish LaMnSi as a parity-violating AFM metal, and identify this class of AFMs as a promising platform for symmetry-controlled nonreciprocal and nonlinear electronic responses.

82

易面铁磁体中椭圆磁子的扩散自旋与热输运效应#

Ellipticity effects on diffusive magnon spin and heat transport in easy-plane ferromagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Nicolas Vidal-Silva, Alejandro O. Leon📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统建立了椭圆磁子的输运理论框架，揭示磁各向异性取向对自旋/热输运的非对称调控规律——易轴与难轴磁体呈现相反的椭圆依赖性，为基于磁各向异性工程的热电自旋器件设计提供了理论指导。
该研究从含垂直磁各向异性的Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程出发，推导椭圆磁子的色散关系和磁子自旋，进而利用弛豫时间近似下的Boltzmann输运方程和微扰分析获得磁子自旋和热导率。计算表明，在三维和二维系统中，椭圆性对磁子输运系数的影响取决于易轴或难轴垂直于平面的磁体而分别增强或降低；而磁子热输运在易轴和难轴磁体中均被预测增强。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究从含垂直磁各向异性的Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程出发，推导椭圆磁子的色散关系和磁子自旋，进而利用弛豫时间近似下的Boltzmann输运方程和微扰分析获得磁子自旋和热导率。计算表明，在三维和二维系统中，椭圆性对磁子输运系数的影响取决于易轴或难轴垂直于平面的磁体而分别增强或降低；而磁子热输运在易轴和难轴磁体中均被预测增强。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19998v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: When a magnetic material hosts spin-wave excitations, or magnons, the local magnetization can rotate in circular or elliptical orbits, the latter arising naturally in the presence of magnetic anisotropies transverse to the equilibrium magnetization. This article investigates the diffusive transport of elliptical magnons in easy-plane ferromagnets. Our analysis starts with the derivation of the magnon dispersion relation and magnon spin from the Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert equation with a perpendicular magnetic anisotropy. Then, using the Boltzmann transport equation in the relaxation time approximation and perturbation analysis, the magnon-spin and magnon thermal conductivities are obtained, quantifying the magnon transport in the insulator. Our calculations demonstrate that, in both three- and two-dimensional systems, the effects of ellipticity on magnon transport coefficients result in an enhancement or a decrease, depending on whether magnets with a easy or hard perpendicular-to-plane axis are considered, respectively. On the other hand, our results predict an enhancement of the magnon heat transport for both easy- and hard-axis magnetic systems. Our study supports previous works on magnon ellipticity and makes a step towards clarifying its effect on magnon transport properties.

83

弛豫铁电体交流极化过程中的介观畴演化机制#

Mesoscale Domain Evolution Mechanism during Alternating Current (AC) Poling of Relaxor Ferroelectrics
📚 arXiv👤 Yuan-Jie Sun, Bo Wang, Long-Qing Chen📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过相场模拟揭示了弛豫铁电体PMN-PT单晶交流极化中畴壁间距比调控的介观演化规律，首次识别出力学边界条件依赖的畴壁消除阈值，为设计高稳定性铁电存储与换能器件提供了畴工程优化策略。
该工作采用相场模拟研究含71°和109°畴壁的菱方相Pb(Mg₁/₃Nb₂/₃)O₃-PbTiO₃单晶在准二维层状几何中的交流极化畴壁运动。模拟揭示极化反转过程中畴壁行为依赖于71°与109°畴壁的间距比：紧密排列的71°畴壁发生不可逆消除，而较宽间距的畴壁得以保留，109°畴壁则保持完整。该研究识别出依赖于力学边界条件的畴壁消除阈值比，并通过追踪畴壁轨迹阐明此行为机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用相场模拟研究含71°和109°畴壁的菱方相Pb(Mg₁/₃Nb₂/₃)O₃-PbTiO₃单晶在准二维层状几何中的交流极化畴壁运动。模拟揭示极化反转过程中畴壁行为依赖于71°与109°畴壁的间距比：紧密排列的71°畴壁发生不可逆消除，而较宽间距的畴壁得以保留，109°畴壁则保持完整。该研究识别出依赖于力学边界条件的畴壁消除阈值比，并通过追踪畴壁轨迹阐明此行为机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20011v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Ferroelectric domain variants that are energetically equivalent are expected to remain preserved during polarization reversal under a symmetry-preserving electric field. However, recent experiments on relaxor-ferroelectric crystals have revealed irreversible elimination of inclined domain walls during AC poling, while the underlying mesoscale mechanism remains unclear. Here, we investigate the domain-wall motion during AC poling of rhombohedral Pb(Mg₁/₃Nb₂/₃)O₃₋₋PbTiO₃ single crystals containing both 71ⁱ̧rc and 109ⁱ̧rc domain walls within a quasi-two-dimensional laminated geometry using phase-field simulations. The simulations reveal that the domain-wall behavior during polarization reversal depends on the spacing ratio between the 71ⁱ̧rc and 109ⁱ̧rc domain walls. Closely spaced 71ⁱ̧rc domain walls undergo irreversible elimination, whereas more widely separated walls are preserved, while the 109ⁱ̧rc domain walls remain intact. A threshold ratio for domain-wall elimination is identified and found to depend on the mechanical boundary conditions. By tracking the domain-wall trajectories during the switching process, we attribute this behavior to unsynchronized motion of neighboring 71ⁱ̧rc domain walls arising from long-range elastic interactions when the walls become strongly coupled. This collective motion breaks the symmetry between energetically equivalent domain variants and leads to irreversible domain-wall elimination during polarization reversal. These findings provide mechanistic insight into collective domain-wall evolution during polarization reversal and suggest that proximity-driven symmetry breaking may provide a mesoscale mechanism for domain engineering in ferroelectric materials with high domain-wall densities.

84

反铁磁金属中动力学受阻一级相变的可调磁输运#

Tunable magnetotransport through kinetically hindered first-order phase transitions in an antiferromagnetic metal
📚 arXiv👤 Jaime M. Moya, Scott B. Lee, Sudipta Chatterjee, Nitish Mathur, Grigorii Skorupskii, Connor J. Pollak, Leslie M. Schoop📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究的核心创新在于利用动力学受阻一级相变的本征滞后特性，通过调控冷却磁场实现磁玻璃态中两相比例的连续可控，进而获得多级电阻态。其意义在于为神经形态计算提供了一种无需复杂微纳加工、仅依靠相变动力学受阻
该研究展示非中心对称反铁磁金属CeCoGe₃通过动力学受阻一级磁相变实现可控多级电阻态。在磁场中冷却穿过动力学受阻的一级相变产生高低温磁相共存的磁玻璃态，两相比例可由冷却磁场调控，而电阻直接敏感于该比例。实验证实CeCoGe₃支持稳定的多级电阻态，为神经形态计算等存储技术识别出动力学受阻一级相变这一有前景的实现途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究展示非中心对称反铁磁金属CeCoGe₃通过动力学受阻一级磁相变实现可控多级电阻态。在磁场中冷却穿过动力学受阻的一级相变产生高低温磁相共存的磁玻璃态，两相比例可由冷却磁场调控，而电阻直接敏感于该比例。实验证实CeCoGe₃支持稳定的多级电阻态，为神经形态计算等存储技术识别出动力学受阻一级相变这一有前景的实现途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20020v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Controllable multilevel resistance states are of interest for memory technologies like neuromorphic computing, but robust materials platforms toward such behavior remain limited. Here, we show that the non-centrosymmetric antiferromagnetic metal CeCoGe₃ suggests one such route through a kinetically hindered first-order magnetic transition. Cooling through the kinetically hindered first-order transition in an applied magnetic field produces a magnetic glass state in which high- and low-temperature magnetic phases coexist. The relative fraction of these phases can be controlled by the applied field in which the sample is cooled, and the electrical resistance is directly sensitive to that fraction. As a result, it is demonstrated that CeCoGe₃ supports stable multilevel resistive states. These results identify kinetically hindered first-order phase transitions as a promising route towards controllable multilevel magnetoresistive states.

85

外电场下电子鲁棒性铁磁应变CrSiSe₃单层的自旋响应性质#

Spin Response Properties in Electronically Robust Ferromagnetic Strained CrSiSe₃ Monolayer under External Electric Fields
📚 arXiv👤 S. Solihin, Ahmad R. T. Nugraha, Muhammad Aziz Majidi📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究的核心创新在于揭示了应变铁磁CrSiSe₃单层中电荷属性与自旋自由度对外电场的迥异响应：电荷输运与拓扑性质保持 exceptional 鲁棒性，而自旋自由度高度可调。这一"电荷-自旋解耦"特性为
该研究采用第一性原理计算研究应变工程铁磁CrSiSe₃单层在面外电场下的电子、拓扑、磁子和磁光性质。发现该材料的电荷本征属性（包括间接带隙、电荷Berry曲率、光电导率和磁光Kerr效应谱）对高达0.3 V/Å的外场表现出 exceptional 鲁棒性；而自旋自由度则呈现高度敏感的可调性。静电门控显著调制自旋Berry类曲率，驱动自旋Hall电导率的非单调增强；外场通过改变微观Heisenberg交换相互作用有效调控集体磁子激发。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究采用第一性原理计算研究应变工程铁磁CrSiSe₃单层在面外电场下的电子、拓扑、磁子和磁光性质。发现该材料的电荷本征属性（包括间接带隙、电荷Berry曲率、光电导率和磁光Kerr效应谱）对高达0.3 V/Å的外场表现出 exceptional 鲁棒性；而自旋自由度则呈现高度敏感的可调性。静电门控显著调制自旋Berry类曲率，驱动自旋Hall电导率的非单调增强；外场通过改变微观Heisenberg交换相互作用有效调控集体磁子激发。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20021v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Integrating two-dimensional van der Waals magnets into field-effect spintronic devices requires robust charge stability and tunable spin responses. In this study, we investigate the electronic, topological, magnonic, and magneto-optical properties of the strain-engineered ferromagnetic CrSiSe₃ monolayer under out-of-plane external electric fields by using first-principles calculations. We find that for this material, the intrinsic charge sector, including the indirect band gap, charge Berry curvature, optical conductivities, and magneto-optical Kerr effect spectra, exhibits exceptional robustness against applied fields up to 0.3 V/Å. Conversely, the spin degrees of freedom demonstrate highly sensitive tunability. Electrostatic gating significantly modulates the spin Berry-like curvature, driving a non-monotonic enhancement in the spin Hall conductivity. Furthermore, external fields effectively tune collective magnon excitations by modifying microscopic Heisenberg exchange interactions. Such coexistence of robust charge immunity and flexible spin manipulation establishes the strained CrSiSe₃ monolayer as a promising platform for stable spintronic devices.

86

磁性受挫GeNi₂O₄与GeCo₂O₄尖晶石中的涡旋序#

Vortex order in magnetic frustrated GeNi₂O₄ and GeCo₂O₄ spinels
📚 arXiv👤 K. Beauvois, J. Robert, M. Songvilay, J. Ollivier, B. Fåk, E. Ressouche, N. Qureshi, R. Ballou, S. Petit, S. Lenne, P. Manuel, S. DeBrion, P. Strobel, V. Simonet📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在GeNi₂O₄与GeCo₂O₄尖晶石中揭示2-k涡旋磁序的稳定性，阐明磁各向异性对受挫体系中多k自旋纹理演化的调控机制，为设计新型拓扑磁结构材料提供理论依据。
该研究基于GeB₂O₄(B=Co, Ni)家族交换相互作用相图的探索，利用非弹性中子散射测量和单晶中子衍射数据的联合建模，表明这些化合物中可稳定化2-k磁结构。这导致短周期自旋涡旋晶体，即由磁各向异性诱导的各向同性自旋3-k Bloch点结构的变体。该工作为受挫反铁磁体中多k自旋纹理的形成及其各向异性依赖演化提供了合理化解释。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究基于GeB₂O₄(B=Co, Ni)家族交换相互作用相图的探索，利用非弹性中子散射测量和单晶中子衍射数据的联合建模，表明这些化合物中可稳定化2-k磁结构。这导致短周期自旋涡旋晶体，即由磁各向异性诱导的各向同性自旋3-k Bloch点结构的变体。该工作为受挫反铁磁体中多k自旋纹理的形成及其各向异性依赖演化提供了合理化解释。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20029v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In the search for new spin textures based on singular magnetic objects like Bloch-points or vortices, spinel compounds emerge as an interesting playground due to the interplay between magnetic anisotropy and complex interactions that extend well beyond first neighbors on a pyrochlore lattice. Based on an exploration of the exchange interaction phase diagrams of members of the GeB₂O₄ family with B=Co and Ni, we show, using simultaneous modeling of inelastic neutron scattering measurements and single-crystal neutron diffraction data, that a 2-k magnetic structure may be stabilized in these compounds. This leads to a short period spin vortex crystal, a variant induced by the magnetic anisotropy of the 3-k Bloch-point structure predicted for isotropic spins. Our study rationalizes the formation of these multi-k spin textures in frustrated antiferromagnets, as well as their anisotropy-dependent evolution.

87

层状反铁磁体中的相干太赫兹磁子-声子三波混频#

Coherent terahertz magnon-phonon three-wave mixing in a layered antiferromagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Liangyue Li, Na Wu, Zhengwang Lin, Zefen Li, Lixin Liu, Emil Vinas Boström, Yuan Wan, Xinbo Wang, Jianlin Luo, Fucai Liu, Angel Rubio, Qi Zhang📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在层状反铁磁体FePS₃中实现相干磁子-声子三波混频的实验观测，突破传统线性光谱局限，揭示了磁性与晶格自由度间的非线性纠缠机制，为太赫兹量子调控及磁-声子混合量子器件提供了全新物理平台。
该研究利用双太赫兹泵浦-光探测光谱学，在层状反铁磁绝缘体FePS₃中直接观测到相干磁子-声子三波混频。分辨出反铁磁磁子的二阶和三阶非线性响应，并在二维相干光谱中识别出包括磁子与声子之间确定的和频与差频产生在内的全套非线性耦合。这些结果为利用相干非线性纠缠磁性和振动激发、开拓太赫兹频段的量子控制和混合量子技术奠定基础。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用双太赫兹泵浦-光探测光谱学，在层状反铁磁绝缘体FePS₃中直接观测到相干磁子-声子三波混频。分辨出反铁磁磁子的二阶和三阶非线性响应，并在二维相干光谱中识别出包括磁子与声子之间确定的和频与差频产生在内的全套非线性耦合。这些结果为利用相干非线性纠缠磁性和振动激发、开拓太赫兹频段的量子控制和混合量子技术奠定基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20067v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The coherent nonlinear dynamics between collective excitations, such as magnons and phonons, drive emergent phenomena in quantum materials, yet their direct observation remains a central challenge. Here, using double-terahertz-pump optical-probe spectroscopy, we report the direct observation of coherent magnon-phonon three-wave mixing in the layered antiferromagnetic insulator FePS₃. We resolve both second- and third-order nonlinear responses of antiferromagnetic magnons and identify a suite of nonlinear couplings in two-dimensional (2D) coherent spectra, including definitive sum- and difference-frequency generation between magnons and phonons. These results lay the groundwork for exploiting coherent nonlinearities to entangle magnetic and vibrational excitations, opening avenues for quantum control and hybrid quantum technologies in the terahertz regime.

88

Ag(111)上单层Bi(1-x)Sb(x)合金通过等电子替代增强自旋极化#

Spin polarization enhancement in a single-layer Bi(1-x)Sb(x) alloy on Ag(111) via isovalent substitution
📚 arXiv👤 Javier D. Fuhr, Polina M. Sheverdyaeva, Paolo Moras, J. Esteban Gayone, Hugo Ascolani📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地利用等电子Sb替代Bi，在保持晶体结构不变的前提下，通过打破空间反演对称性实现能带自旋分裂的显著增强。这一策略为无需强自旋-轨道耦合材料即可调控自旋极化提供了新途径，对低维自旋电子器件设
该研究结合角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)和密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，研究室温下Ag(111)上Bi和Sb共吸附形成的单层Bi(1-x)Sb(x)合金的电子结构。该合金具有矩形3×√3结构，每单胞含四个原子(总覆盖度2/3 ML)，缺乏长程化学有序。DFT计算表明Sb掺入在固定晶体学框架内诱导电子势的面内和面外不对称性，导致覆盖层能带的显著自旋分裂和自旋极化；尽管与衬底相互作用部分削弱这些效应，其仍保持显著。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究结合角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)和密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，研究室温下Ag(111)上Bi和Sb共吸附形成的单层Bi(1-x)Sb(x)合金的电子结构。该合金具有矩形3×√3结构，每单胞含四个原子(总覆盖度2/3 ML)，缺乏长程化学有序。DFT计算表明Sb掺入在固定晶体学框架内诱导电子势的面内和面外不对称性，导致覆盖层能带的显著自旋分裂和自旋极化；尽管与衬底相互作用部分削弱这些效应，其仍保持显著。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20095v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Co-adsorption of Bi and Sb on Ag(111) at room temperature yields a single-layer Bi(1-x)Sb(x) alloy with a rectangular 3xsqrt(3) structure containing four atoms per unit cell (2/3 ML total coverage) and lacking long-range chemical order. We present an electronic structure study of this system combining angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) and density functional theory (DFT) calculations. To investigate the effect of inversion symmetry breaking induced by substituting a heavier atom (Bi) with a lighter isoelectronic one (Sb) within a fixed crystallographic framework, we focused on a Bi-rich composition. ARPES measurements reveal four surface-state bands, in good agreement with DFT calculations based on a rectangular four-atom overlayer unit cell. DFT calculations further show that Sb incorporation induces both in-plane and out-of-plane asymmetries in the electronic potential, leading to sizable spin splitting and spin polarization of the overlayer bands. Although these effects are partially reduced by interaction with the substrate, they remain significant. Our work illustrates, through a concrete model system, a general principle: incorporating a lighter isovalent element can significantly enhance spin polarization, potentially offering a useful design guideline for understanding and engineering Rashba-related systems.

89

Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐中自旋密度波序的巡游本质#

Itinerant Nature of Spin-Density-Wave Order in Ruddlesden-Popper Nickelates
📚 arXiv👤 Jiong Mei, Tianyang Xie, Kun Jiang📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统局域磁矩图像，揭示Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐中自旋密度波源于巡游电子的镜反对带间嵌套，统一解释双层与三层体系的磁激发谱，并为理解关联电子体系中自旋-电荷交织序提供新范式。
该研究为La₃Ni₂O₇和La₄Ni₃O₁₀的自旋密度波(SDW)序和磁激发建立统一的巡游描述。核心要素是NiO₂块体的多层镜像结构，将低能电子态组织为镜像偶和镜像奇 sector。主导的镜反对带间嵌套驱动镜像选择性巡游SDW不稳定性，其集体模式自然复现实验观测的自旋波状谱。在La₄Ni₃O₁₀中，SDW进一步诱导次级镜像偶电荷密度波，产生交织的自旋和电荷纹理。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究为La₃Ni₂O₇和La₄Ni₃O₁₀的自旋密度波(SDW)序和磁激发建立统一的巡游描述。核心要素是NiO₂块体的多层镜像结构，将低能电子态组织为镜像偶和镜像奇 sector。主导的镜反对带间嵌套驱动镜像选择性巡游SDW不稳定性，其集体模式自然复现实验观测的自旋波状谱。在La₄Ni₃O₁₀中，SDW进一步诱导次级镜像偶电荷密度波，产生交织的自旋和电荷纹理。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20148v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The nature of magnetism in layered Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates remains a central open question, particularly in light of recent observations of spin-wave-like magnetic excitations in metallic multilayer compounds. Here, we develop a unified itinerant description of spin-density-wave (SDW) order and magnetic excitations in La₃Ni₂O₇ and La₄Ni₃O₁₀. The essential ingredient is the multilayer mirror structure of the NiO₂ blocks, which organizes the low-energy electronic states into mirror-even and mirror-odd sectors. We show that dominant interband nesting between mirror-opposite bands drives a mirror-selective itinerant SDW instability, whose collective modes naturally reproduce the experimentally observed spin-wave-like spectra. In La₄Ni₃O₁₀, the SDW further induces a secondary mirror-even charge density wave, yielding intertwined spin and charge textures. Our results demonstrate that magnetism in multilayer nickelates is fundamentally itinerant rather than local-moment in origin, and establish mirror-selective interband SDW order as a unifying organizing principle for magnetic correlations in these systems.

90

周期变形Kitaev蜂窝模型的能带结构与拓扑性质#

Band Structure and topology of a periodically deformed Kitaev honeycomb model
📚 arXiv👤 Abdullah AlJishi, Ali AlSwaid, Moayad Ekhwan, Hocine Bahlouli, Raditya Weda Bomantara, Michael Vogl📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将莫尔物理中的周期变形引入Kitaev蜂窝模型，揭示布里渊区重构与磁场协同诱导非平庸拓扑的新机制，为量子自旋液体材料的设计与拓扑量子计算平台构建提供理论指导。
该工作研究周期变形与磁场对Kitaev蜂窝模型的联合效应。作者先给出未变形基态模型的简化解析解，再引入类似莫尔物理的周期六方对称变形，发现变形导致布里渊区缩小并在边界产生新能隙，暗示拓扑相变可能；进一步施加磁场破坏时间反演对称性后，在特定参数条件下可实现非平庸拓扑。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究周期变形与磁场对Kitaev蜂窝模型的联合效应。作者先给出未变形基态模型的简化解析解，再引入类似莫尔物理的周期六方对称变形，发现变形导致布里渊区缩小并在边界产生新能隙，暗示拓扑相变可能；进一步施加磁场破坏时间反演对称性后，在特定参数条件下可实现非平庸拓扑。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20181v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Motivated by the growing interest in spin liquids and topological phases, as well as the rise of deformation engineering, we study the combined effects of deformation and magnetic fields on the honeycomb Kitaev model. The Kitaev model, as one of the prototypical and exactly solvable spin liquid-hosting models, serves as a simple platform that demonstrates the rich physics one can expect at the intersection of deformation physics and quantum spin liquids. Our work builds on a simplified solution to the undeformed base model that we present. This simplified solution allows for a straightforward extension of our analysis to the deformed case. After incorporating periodic deformations into the Kitaev model (chosen for its similarity to moiré physics), we investigate the effects of a hexagonally symmetric deformation on the band structure. We find that deformation leads to a smaller Brillouin zone with new band gaps at the edges, indicating the potential for topological transitions. Finally, we introduce a magnetic field to break time-reversal symmetry and thereby allow for non-trivial topology. We find that, under specific parameter conditions, the magnetic field leads to multiple band-gap closings and openings. An investigation into topological properties reveals nontrivial Chern numbers and a plethora of topological transitions. Our results suggest possible thermal Hall or Nernst-type responses. We also suggest a potential bulk measurement approach for he Chern numbers and possible path to physical realization. Most importantly, our results serve as a demonstration of the rich phenomenology that can arise due to the interplay between deformation and spin-liquid physics.

91

Floquet工程化二维反铁磁Cr₂CH₂中的奇宇称交错磁性高阶拓扑#

Floquet-Engineered Odd-Parity Altermagnetic Higher-Order Topology in a Two-Dimensional Antiferromagnet Cr₂CH₂
📚 arXiv👤 Xiaorong Zou, Hyeon Suk Shin, Baibiao Huang, Yanmei Zang, Ying Dai, Chengwang Niu, Chang-Jong Kang, Chang Woo Myung📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次将Floquet工程与交错磁性相结合，在二维反铁磁体系中实现光控奇宇称高阶拓扑相变，突破了静态材料拓扑态的固定对称性限制，为超快光磁调控拓扑量子器件提供了新范式。
该工作证明圆偏振光可在Cr₂CH₂单层中实现奇宇称交错磁性高阶拓扑绝缘体相。平衡态下该材料为受C₃旋转对称性保护的二维反铁磁高阶拓扑绝缘体；在圆偏振光驱动下，系统形成由特定对称性控制的f波交错磁态，尽管能带经历显著Floquet重整化，C₃保护的角态在宽驱动强度范围内保持稳健，随光强增加逐渐演变为交错磁性半金属态。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作证明圆偏振光可在Cr₂CH₂单层中实现奇宇称交错磁性高阶拓扑绝缘体相。平衡态下该材料为受C₃旋转对称性保护的二维反铁磁高阶拓扑绝缘体；在圆偏振光驱动下，系统形成由特定对称性控制的f波交错磁态，尽管能带经历显著Floquet重整化，C₃保护的角态在宽驱动强度范围内保持稳健，随光强增加逐渐演变为交错磁性半金属态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19184v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Periodic driving provides a platform to dynamically tailor quantum states of matter, yet its impact on symmetry-protected topological phases remains incompletely understood. Here, we demonstrate that periodic driving enables the realization of an odd-parity altermagnetic (AM) higher-order topological insulator (HOTI) phase in the Cr₂CH₂ monolayer. In equilibrium, Cr₂CH₂ is a 2D antiferromagnetic (AFM) HOTI protected by mathcal C₃ rotational symmetry, characterized by a symmetry indicator ḩi⁽³⁾ = -2,1 and robust corner states. Under circularly polarized light (CPL), the system develops a f-wave altermagnetic state governed by the symmetry [C₂||øverline3₀₀₁] with odd-parity spin splitting. Despite substantial Floquet-induced band renormalization, the mathcal C₃₋ₚᵣₒₜₑcted corner states remain intact over a broad range of driving strengths, highlighting the altermagnetic higher-order topology under Floquet driving. As the light intensity increases, the system gradually evolves into an altermagnetic semimetallic state. These results establish a direct connection between magnetism and topology in a periodically driven AFM system, offering a route toward the control of coupled spin and topological transport.

92

前生命磁铁矿实现手性-磁性表面反馈#

Prebiotic magnetite enables chirality-magnetic surface feedback
📚 arXiv👤 Jose A. P. M. Devienne, Ziwei Liu, Clancy Z. Jiang, Nicholas J. Tosca, Thomas Ginnis, Dimitar D. Sasselov, Richard J. Harrison, S. Furkan Ozturk📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地将前生命地球化学与手性诱导自旋选择性效应结合，揭示天然磁铁矿的涡旋磁畴态可通过交换耦合实现手性信息的不可逆存储与放大，为解释生物同手性起源提供了无需精细纳米加工的天然矿物机制，拓展了CI
该工作探索前生命条件下形成的磁铁矿的磁学性质及其在手性诱导自旋选择性效应中的作用。通过两种地球化学合理路径合成的磁铁矿颗粒以单涡旋和多涡旋磁畴态为主，与先前CISS实验常用的纳米薄膜衬底显著不同；三维微磁模拟表明单畴和涡旋态颗粒与自旋极化的同手性化合物相互作用时发生不可逆的交换驱动再磁化，为存储和放大手性失衡提供稳健机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作探索前生命条件下形成的磁铁矿的磁学性质及其在手性诱导自旋选择性效应中的作用。通过两种地球化学合理路径合成的磁铁矿颗粒以单涡旋和多涡旋磁畴态为主，与先前CISS实验常用的纳米薄膜衬底显著不同；三维微磁模拟表明单畴和涡旋态颗粒与自旋极化的同手性化合物相互作用时发生不可逆的交换驱动再磁化，为存储和放大手性失衡提供稳健机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.19387v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The emergence of biomolecular homochirality requires both an initial symmetry-breaking event and a mechanism to amplify and preserve a chiral imbalance. Magnetic minerals have been shown to function as chiral agents through the chiral-induced spin selectivity (CISS) effect and may have enabled homochirality on early Earth, yet the magnetic properties of magnetite formed under realistic prebiotic conditions remain unexplored. Here we show that magnetite synthesized through two geochemically plausible pathways - UV-driven photo-oxidation and nitrite-mediated oxidation of Fe(II) - produces particles dominated by single-vortex and multi-vortex magnetic domain states. Magnetic measurements and electron microscopy confirm that these populations differ markedly from the nano-fabricated thin-film substrates conventionally used in previous CISS experiments. Using 3D micromagnetic simulations, we demonstrate that single-domain and vortex-state grains undergo irreversible, exchange-driven re-magnetization when interacting with spin-polarized homochiral compounds. This magnetic irreversibility provides a robust mechanism for storing and reinforcing weak chiral bias, suggesting that prebiotic magnetite could have contributed to the emergence and stabilization of persistent chiral bias on the early Earth.

93

Kitaev自旋液体在拉曼活性光学声子Fano线型中的印记#

Footprints of the Kitaev spin liquid in the Fano lineshapes of the Raman active optical phonons
📚 arXiv👤 Kexin Feng, Swetlana Swarup, Natalia B. Perkins📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作建立Kitaev自旋液体与声子耦合的拉曼光谱理论框架，核心创新在于揭示Fano线型温度演化中的双crossover特征及其磁场响应，为实验上直接探测Majorana费米子与Z₂规范通量等分数化激
该工作发展Kitaev自旋-声子耦合体系中拉曼光谱的理论描述，证明其可提供自旋液体相分数化激发的可观测量子特征。基于D₃d对称性构建声子模式与耦合哈密顿量，系统计算拉曼强度，发现自旋-声子耦合重整化声子传播子并产生显著Fano线型；该线型的温度演化呈现两个 crossover，低温 crossover 表现出明显的磁场依赖性，从而识别出Majorana费米子与Z₂规范通量编码于Fano线型中的可观测效应。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发展Kitaev自旋-声子耦合体系中拉曼光谱的理论描述，证明其可提供自旋液体相分数化激发的可观测量子特征。基于D₃d对称性构建声子模式与耦合哈密顿量，系统计算拉曼强度，发现自旋-声子耦合重整化声子传播子并产生显著Fano线型；该线型的温度演化呈现两个 crossover，低温 crossover 表现出明显的磁场依赖性，从而识别出Majorana费米子与Z₂规范通量编码于Fano线型中的可观测效应。

English Abstract

arXiv:2108.08878v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We develop a theoretical description of the Raman spectroscopy in the spin-phonon coupled Kitaev system and show that it can provide intriguing observable signatures of fractionalized excitations characteristic of the underlying spin liquid phase. In particular, we obtain the explicit form of the phonon modes and construct the coupling Hamiltonians based on D₃d symmetry. We then systematically compute the Raman intensity and show that the spin-phonon coupling renormalizes phonon propagators and generates the salient Fano linshape. We find that the temperature evolution of the Fano lineshape displays two crossovers, and the low temperature crossover shows pronounced magnetic field dependence. We thus identify the observable effect of the Majorana fermions and the Z₂ gauge fluxes encoded in the Fano lineshape. Our results explain several phonon Raman scattering experiments in the candidate material α-RuCl₃.

94

氧化锌中的深能级自旋缺陷用于高保真单次读出#

Deep Spin Defects in Zinc Oxide for High-Fidelity Single-Shot Readout
📚 arXiv👤 Shimin Zhang, Taejoon Park, Erik Perez, Kejun Li, Xingyi Wang, Masoud Mansouri, Yanyong Wang, Jorge D Vega Bazantes, Ruiqi Zhang, Jianwei Sun, Kai-Mei C. Fu, Hosung Seo, Yuan Ping📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次理论预言ZnO中Mo_Zn-V_O复合体可作为新型自旋量子比特，其核心创新在于兼具强自旋-轨道耦合与无Jahn-Teller畸变的独特电子结构，突破了传统色心对低温强磁场的依赖，实现了室温宽
该工作通过第一性原理计算预测ZnO中钼-空位复合体Mo_Zn-V_O具有可光学寻址自旋量子比特的关键特征：自旋三重态基态、可见光区高量子产率光学跃迁及异常小的Huang-Rhys因子。考虑核自旋与杂质自旋浴后获得约4 ms的自旋相干时间，顺磁杂质浓度阈值为0.035 ppm；强自旋-轨道耦合与无Jahn-Teller畸变支持在升温和宽磁场范围内实现自旋选择性系间窜越与高保真单次读出，为宽禁带氧化物量子比特开辟新方向。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过第一性原理计算预测ZnO中钼-空位复合体Mo_Zn-V_O具有可光学寻址自旋量子比特的关键特征：自旋三重态基态、可见光区高量子产率光学跃迁及异常小的Huang-Rhys因子。考虑核自旋与杂质自旋浴后获得约4 ms的自旋相干时间，顺磁杂质浓度阈值为0.035 ppm；强自旋-轨道耦合与无Jahn-Teller畸变支持在升温和宽磁场范围内实现自旋选择性系间窜越与高保真单次读出，为宽禁带氧化物量子比特开辟新方向。

English Abstract

arXiv:2502.00551v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Wide-bandgap oxides such as ZnO are favorable hosts for spin defect qubits due to their dilute nuclear spin background and potential for ultra-high purity. Yet, a deep-level defect qubit with robust optical and spin properties has not been identified in this material. Here, using first-principles calculations, we predict that the molybdenum-vacancy complex, Mo_Zn-V_O, exhibits the essential characteristics of an optically addressable spin qubit: a spin-triplet ground state, visible-range optical transitions with high quantum yield, and an unusually small Huang-Rhys factor (~5, compared to 10-30 in known ZnO defects). We further find long spin coherence times (T₂ ~ 4 ms) when both nuclear and impurity spin baths are considered, with paramagnetic impurities setting a threshold concentration of 0.035 ppm. Importantly, the combination of strong spin-orbit coupling and the absence of Jahn-Teller distortion supports spin-selective intersystem crossing and high-fidelity single-shot readout at elevated temperatures and across wide magnetic field ranges. By identifying ZnO as a host for deep-level defect qubits, our work points toward a pathway to scalable, integrable oxide-based quantum technologies and broadens the material foundation for solid-state quantum information science.

95

A位有序SmBaMn₂O₆中的低能激发#

Low energy excitations in A-site ordered SmBaMn2O6
📚 arXiv👤 Mirian Garcia Fernandez, Abhishek Nag, Stefano Agrestini, Sahil Tippireddy, Dirk Backes, Urs Staub, Taka-hisa Arima, Kejin Zhou📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次利用高能量分辨软X射线RIXS技术直接探测半掺杂锰氧化物中的轨道激发，突破了传统手段对轨道序微观机制的研究瓶颈，为理解强关联体系中轨道-自旋耦合及新奇量子物性提供了关键实验工具。
该工作利用软X射线共振非弹性散射(RIXS)研究半掺杂A位有序锰氧化物SmBaMn₂O₆中的低能激发，聚焦于轨道序及其与自旋系统的耦合。软X射线RIXS技术的能量分辨率和通量提升为直接探测锰酸盐中的轨道激发提供了新途径，有助于揭示轨道序的微观起源及其相关的奇异物性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用软X射线共振非弹性散射(RIXS)研究半掺杂A位有序锰氧化物SmBaMn₂O₆中的低能激发，聚焦于轨道序及其与自旋系统的耦合。软X射线RIXS技术的能量分辨率和通量提升为直接探测锰酸盐中的轨道激发提供了新途径，有助于揭示轨道序的微观起源及其相关的奇异物性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.23383v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The electron in a solid can be considered a bound state of the three independent, fundamental degrees of freedom creating quasi-particles: spinons, carrying the electron spin; plasmons carrying the collective charge mode and orbitons carrying its orbital degree of freedom. These fundamental degrees of freedom could form ordering states in which dynamics or collective motions could occurr and manifest as low-energy excitations. The exotic properties that appear in the materials exhibiting these electronic orderings are associated with these low-energy excitations. Although the orbital order (OO) and its coupling to the spin system creates very interesting phenomena, the microscopic origin of OO has been much less explored than other electronic properties as it is very difficult to directly access experimental information from OO. Due to the recent improvement in energy resolution and flux, soft x-ray resonant inelastic scattering (RIXS) allows for a re-examination of orbital excitations in manganites. Here, we present a study of low energy excitations in half doped A-site ordered SmBaMn₂O₆ through a combination of RIXS and soft x-ray resonant elastic scattering (REXS) measurements. The obtained experimental data confirm the OO at q = (0.25, 0.25, 0) and find various low energy excitations below 200 meV. while several excitations can be assigned to be of magnetic and phononic origin, a group of excitations between 80 and 200 meV show a temperature dependence distinctively following that of the OO making them possible candidates for orbital excitations.

96

塞曼场下无序螺旋超导边缘的自旋响应#

Spin responses of a disordered helical superconducting edge under Zeeman field
📚 arXiv👤 Zeinab Bakhshipour, Mir Vahid Hosseini📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统揭示塞曼场对无序螺旋超导边缘的调控机制：通过解析与数值结合，发现塞曼场可定向调控超导-无序竞争，在吸引区增强能隙、排斥区稳定杂质效应，并预言自旋电导标度行为的反常变化，为拓扑量子计算中马
该工作解析和数值研究无序对二维拓扑绝缘体螺旋边缘态在塞曼场和超导共存下的影响。采用玻色化和重整化群分析，发现塞曼场调控超导与无序的竞争：在吸引区增强超导能隙，在排斥区通过延长无序相关区来稳定杂质效应。无序还引起横密度波关联的对数抑制和超导配对关联的正对数修正，直接改变自旋电导的标度行为。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作解析和数值研究无序对二维拓扑绝缘体螺旋边缘态在塞曼场和超导共存下的影响。采用玻色化和重整化群分析，发现塞曼场调控超导与无序的竞争：在吸引区增强超导能隙，在排斥区通过延长无序相关区来稳定杂质效应。无序还引起横密度波关联的对数抑制和超导配对关联的正对数修正，直接改变自旋电导的标度行为。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.04263v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We investigate analytically and numerically the effects of disorder on the helical edge of the 2D topological insulator in the presence of the Zeeman field and superconductivity. Employing bosonization and a renormalization-group analysis, we study how impurity potentials modify charge- and spin-density wave correlations as well as superconducting pair correlations. Our results reveal that the Zeeman field controls the competition: in the attractive regime, it amplifies the superconducting gap, while in the repulsive regime, it stabilizes impurity effects by keeping the system longer in the relevant regime for disorder. We also find that disorder induces logarithmic suppression of transverse density-wave correlations, while at the same time introducing positive logarithmic corrections that enhance superconducting pair correlations and contribute to their stability. These effects directly modify the scaling of spin conductance, providing experimentally accessible signatures of the interplay between disorder and superconductivity in topological edge channels.

97

中心对称共线反铁磁体中的d波表面交错磁性#

d-wave Surface Altermagnetism in Centrosymmetric Collinear Antiferromagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Ersoy Sasioglu, Ingrid Mertig, Samir Lounis📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地揭示表面交错磁性的隐藏对称性判据：除表面反演破缺外，还需破坏交换子晶格的反对称幺正对称性。这为设计新型反铁磁自旋电子器件提供了材料筛选原则，并解释了MnPt等体系的反直觉简并行为。
该工作结合对称性分析与第一性原理计算，研究中心对称共线反铁磁体表面反演对称破缺诱导的d波自旋劈裂（表面交错磁性）。证明表面反演破缺是必要非充分条件：仅当表面不存在交换两个反铁磁耦合子晶格的反对称幺正对称性时，表面交错磁性才出现。该机制在V₃Al和BaMn₂Sb₂中实现，但与MnPt中保留的平移-时间反演对称性(tT)形成对比，后者尽管反演破缺仍保持自旋简并。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合对称性分析与第一性原理计算，研究中心对称共线反铁磁体表面反演对称破缺诱导的d波自旋劈裂（表面交错磁性）。证明表面反演破缺是必要非充分条件：仅当表面不存在交换两个反铁磁耦合子晶格的反对称幺正对称性时，表面交错磁性才出现。该机制在V₃Al和BaMn₂Sb₂中实现，但与MnPt中保留的平移-时间反演对称性(tT)形成对比，后者尽管反演破缺仍保持自旋简并。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.08790v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Broken inversion symmetry at the surfaces of centrosymmetric collinear antiferromagnets lifts combined inversion and time-reversal symmetry (PT) and can, in principle, enable nonrelativistic d-wave spin splitting, termed surface altermagnetism. Combining symmetry analysis with first-principles calculations, we show that surface inversion breaking, while necessary, is not sufficient for this effect. Surface altermagnetism emerges only when no antiunitary symmetry survives at the surface that exchanges the two antiferromagnetically coupled surface sublattices and enforces spin degeneracy. We demonstrate this mechanism explicitly for the centrosymmetric G-type antiferromagnets V₃Al and BaMn₂Sb₂, and contrast it with MnPt, where a sublattice-exchanging symmetry survives at the surface in the form of translation-time-reversal symmetry (tT), thereby preserving spin degeneracy despite broken inversion symmetry. The mechanism is shown to apply across multiple classes of centrosymmetric antiferromagnets and remains robust against spin-orbit coupling, although relativistic spin mixing in heavier-element compounds may reduce the observable spin polarization. These results establish a symmetry-based route toward realizing robust nonrelativistic momentum-dependent spin polarization at antiferromagnetic surfaces and interfaces.

98

可编程偶极自旋冰的量子相干 regime#

Quantum-Coherent Regime of Programmable Dipolar Spin Ice
📚 arXiv👤 Krzysztof Giergiel, Piotr Surówka📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在超导量子退火器上实现可编程偶极自旋冰的量子相干调控，突破传统人工自旋冰的经典极限。通过400+顶点晶格上的量子比特-自旋映射与工程化扩展耦合，揭示磁单极子在涌现规范场中的超扩散动力学，为量
该工作利用超导量子比特量子退火器实现可编程偶极方自旋冰模型，探索人工自旋冰此前未触及的量子相干 regime。通过格点自旋与物理量子比特的一一映射及工程化扩展耦合，在400多个顶点的阻挫晶格上实现有效偶极相互作用。调节横向场涨落探测狄拉克弦缺陷和相互作用磁单极子等离子体的实时动力学，观测到超扩散单极子输运（标度指数介于经典扩散与弹道运动之间），表明涌现规范流形内的相干传播。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用超导量子比特量子退火器实现可编程偶极方自旋冰模型，探索人工自旋冰此前未触及的量子相干 regime。通过格点自旋与物理量子比特的一一映射及工程化扩展耦合，在400多个顶点的阻挫晶格上实现有效偶极相互作用。调节横向场涨落探测狄拉克弦缺陷和相互作用磁单极子等离子体的实时动力学，观测到超扩散单极子输运（标度指数介于经典扩散与弹道运动之间），表明涌现规范流形内的相干传播。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.28125v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Frustrated spin-ice systems support emergent gauge fields and fractionalized quasiparticles that act as magnetic monopoles. Although artificial platforms have enabled their direct visualization, access to their quantum-coherent dynamics has remained limited. Here we realize a programmable dipolar square spin-ice model using a superconducting-qubit quantum annealer, providing access to a previously unexplored quantum-coherent regime of artificial spin ice. By implementing a direct one-to-one mapping between lattice spins and physical qubits, together with engineered extended couplings, we realize effective dipolar interactions on frustrated lattices comprising more than 400 vertices. Tuning transverse-field fluctuations enables us to probe the real-time dynamics of Dirac-string defects and interacting monopole plasmas. We observe super-diffusive monopole transport, with scaling exponents intermediate between classical diffusion and ballistic motion, indicating dynamics beyond classical stochastic relaxation and consistent with coherent propagation within an emergent gauge manifold. These results establish programmable quantum spin ice as a scalable platform for investigating fractionalized excitations and emergent gauge dynamics in engineered quantum matter.

99

XCr₂Y₂O (X=K, Rb, Cs; Y=S, Se, Te)家族中的鲁棒d波交错磁性#

Robust d-wave altermagnetism in XCr₂Y₂O (X=K, Rb, Cs; Y=S, Se, Te) family
📚 arXiv👤 San-Dong Guo📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在金属体系中实现无需载流子掺杂的应变诱导净磁矩，通过直接压磁效应打破时间反演对称性，为区分C型与G型反铁磁构型提供了纯力学表征手段，拓展了交错磁性的实验识别策略。
该工作预测实验合成的RbCr₂Se₂O为鲁棒d波交错磁性金属，其C型与G型反铁磁构型能量差大，且不依赖于电子关联强度和范德华相互作用。施加面内单轴应变可通过直接压磁效应产生净总磁矩，这与半导体通常需要额外载流子掺杂不同。该策略可用于区分G型反铁磁构型（单轴应变下总磁矩保持为零），为实验确认反铁磁构型提供了途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作预测实验合成的RbCr₂Se₂O为鲁棒d波交错磁性金属，其C型与G型反铁磁构型能量差大，且不依赖于电子关联强度和范德华相互作用。施加面内单轴应变可通过直接压磁效应产生净总磁矩，这与半导体通常需要额外载流子掺杂不同。该策略可用于区分G型反铁磁构型（单轴应变下总磁矩保持为零），为实验确认反铁磁构型提供了途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.00412v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The KV₂Se₂O, mathrmRb₁₋δV₂Te₂O and mathrmCs₁₋δV₂Te₂O are experimentally confirmed to adopt either C-type or G-type antiferromagnetic configuration, corresponding to apparent or hidden altermagnetism. However, their nearly degenerate energies lead to inconsistent experimental assignments between the two antiferromagnetic configurations. Here, we predict that the experimentally synthesized RbCr₂Se₂O is a robust d-wave altermagnetic metal, since the energy difference between C-type and G-type configurations is large, which is independent of electron correlation strength and van der Waals interaction. Upon applying in-plane uniaxial strain, RbCr₂Se₂O can generate a net total magnetic moment via a direct piezomagnetic effect, which is distinct from semiconductor that typically requires carrier doping in addition to strain. This provides an experimental strategy for distinguishing the G-type antiferromagnetic configuration, in which the total magnetic moment remains zero under uniaxial strain. Our work presents an isostructural d-wave altermagnetic RbCr₂Se₂O analogous to KV₂Se₂O, mathrmRb₁₋δV₂Te₂O and mathrmCs₁₋δV₂Te₂O, which can facilitate further experimental verification. Furthermore, these results are universal across materials of this family XCr₂Y₂O (X=K, Rb, Cs; Y=S, Se, Te), thus expanding the family of altermagnets.

100

超越Purcell效应：利用自旋噪声超表面调控纯量子退相位#

Beyond the Purcell Effect: Controlling Pure Quantum Dephasing with Spin Noise Metasurfaces
📚 arXiv👤 Wenbo Sun, Shoaib Mahmud, Wei Zhang, Runwei Zhou, Pronoy Das, Dan Jiao, Zubin Jacob📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统Purcell工程局限，首创自旋噪声超表面技术，在远离共振的低频段（~MHz）实现对量子比特纯退相位的宽带调控，为固态量子系统的退相干控制提供了全新纳米光子学方案，对量子计算和量子传感具
该工作提出了一种纳米光子学方法以调控量子比特的纯退相位动力学。与在量子比特共振频率处修饰光子环境的Purcell工程不同，研究开发了超亚波长自旋噪声超表面，用于对远离原子/自旋共振的低频（~MHz）光子环境进行高效宽带控制。利用光刻定义的CoFeB超表面和金刚石浅层氮空位中心进行了实验验证，观察到不同自旋噪声超表面附近NV中心纯退相位动力学的改变，而非自发发射的修正。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出了一种纳米光子学方法以调控量子比特的纯退相位动力学。与在量子比特共振频率处修饰光子环境的Purcell工程不同，研究开发了超亚波长自旋噪声超表面，用于对远离原子/自旋共振的低频（~MHz）光子环境进行高效宽带控制。利用光刻定义的CoFeB超表面和金刚石浅层氮空位中心进行了实验验证，观察到不同自旋噪声超表面附近NV中心纯退相位动力学的改变，而非自发发射的修正。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20180v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: One central theme in quantum photonics is tailoring the interactions between atoms/spins and their electromagnetic (EM) environments. Considerable effort has focused on engineering spontaneous emission by shaping EM environments, known as the Purcell effect. However, photonic environment control of pure dephasing, which is a complementary paradigm of non-unitary atom/spin couplings with EM environments, remains largely unexplored. Here, we introduce a nanophotonic approach to modify qubit pure dephasing dynamics. Unlike Purcell engineering that tailors photonic environments at qubit resonance frequencies (typically optical/near-infrared), we develop ultra-subwavelength spin noise metasurfaces for efficient broadband control of low-frequency (e.g., simMHz) photonic environments far off-resonant with atoms/spins for dephasing engineering. We experimentally demonstrate our approach using lithographically defined CoFeB metasurfaces and shallow nitrogen-vacancy (NV) centers in diamond. Instead of modified spontaneous emission, we observe modified NV pure dephasing dynamics near different spin noise metasurfaces. We further isolate metasurface-controlled dephasing from other dephasing mechanisms (e.g., spin bath) by measuring the NV ensemble dephasing noise spectrum with dynamical decoupling spectral decomposition techniques. Our results establish a new frontier in engineering quantum light-matter interactions with nanophotonic structures.

101

二维XY模型中的有限温度自旋扩散#

Finite-temperature spin diffusion in the two-dimensional XY model
📚 arXiv👤 Erik Fitzner, Byungjin Lee, Junhyeok Hur, Minseok Kim, Benedikt Schneider, Jae-yoon Choi, Björn Sbierski📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次将动力学高温展开理论与光晶格量子模拟相结合，定量验证了二维XY模型的有限温度自旋扩散行为，突破了低维量子磁体输运研究的维度限制，为强关联体系的非平衡动力学及量子模拟精度树立了新基准。
该研究通过理论-实验结合量化方格量子自旋-1/2 XY模型的有限温度自旋扩散。理论方面采用新近发展的动力学高温展开方法捕捉流体动力学区域的长时空尺度；实验方面利用光晶格硬核玻色子量子模拟器获得数据。自旋扩散常数的优异吻合标志着一维以上自旋输运及量子模拟平台定量验证的突破，并为动态自旋电导率或各向异性诱导可积性破缺的未来实验提供理论预测。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究通过理论-实验结合量化方格量子自旋-1/2 XY模型的有限温度自旋扩散。理论方面采用新近发展的动力学高温展开方法捕捉流体动力学区域的长时空尺度；实验方面利用光晶格硬核玻色子量子模拟器获得数据。自旋扩散常数的优异吻合标志着一维以上自旋输运及量子模拟平台定量验证的突破，并为动态自旋电导率或各向异性诱导可积性破缺的未来实验提供理论预测。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.20124v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a combined theory-experiment study to quantify spin diffusion in the square lattice quantum spin-1/2 XY model at finite temperature. On the theory side, we leverage a recently developed dynamical high-temperature expansion method to faithfully capture the long spatiotemporal scales of the hydrodynamic regime. Experimental results are obtained from an optical lattice hard-core boson quantum simulator. The excellent agreement of spin diffusion constants marks a breakthrough in spin-transport beyond one dimension and for the quantitative validation of state-of-the-art quantum simulation platforms. We also provide theory predictions for future experiments on dynamic spin conductivity or anisotropy-induced integrability breaking.

102

具有界面Rashba自旋-轨道耦合的全金属侧向结中约瑟夫森二极管效应的磁手性各向异性#

Magnetochiral Anisotropy in Josephson Diode Effect of All-Metallic Lateral Junctions with Interfacial Rashba Spin-Orbit Coupling
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 Maximilian Mangold, Lorenz Bauriedl, Johanna Berger, Chang Yu-Cheng, Thomas N. G. Meier, Matthias Kronseder, Pertti Hakonen, Christian H. Back, Christoph Strunk, and Dhavala Suri📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：在全金属扩散型约瑟夫森结中，首次利用界面Rashba自旋-轨道耦合实现面内磁场驱动的约瑟夫森二极管效应，突破传统超导量子器件需外加强磁场或复杂结构的限制；揭示的磁手性各向异性为无耗散、非互易超导电子学
该研究在全金属扩散型约瑟夫森结（Fe/Pt与Cu/Pt弱连接Nb电极）中，利用界面Rashba自旋-轨道耦合实现面内磁场下的约瑟夫森二极管效应，并揭示其磁手性各向异性特征。

Domain-Wall-Mediated Polarization Switching in Ferroelectric AlScN: Strain Relief and Field-Dependent Dynamics
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 Xiangyu Zheng, Charles Paillard, Dawei Wang, Peng Chen, Hong Jian Zhao, Yu Xie, and Laurent Bellaiche📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在原子尺度揭示AlScN高矫顽场下独特的畴壁介导极化翻转机制，发现应变释放与电场强度协同调控畴壁动力学行为，突破了传统成核-生长模型的认知框架，为设计高可靠性、低功耗铁电存储器件提供关键微观
该研究通过原子尺度模拟揭示钪掺杂氮化铝（AlScN）高矫顽场下极化翻转的畴壁介导机制，阐明应变释放与电场依赖的动力学过程，为调控其铁电开关特性提供微观依据。

多层3R-MoS₂中铁电翻转的剪切模拉曼成像#

Shear-Mode Raman Imaging of Ferroelectric Switching in Multilayer 3R−MoS₂
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 Yulu Liu, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, and Xiaoxiang Xi📅 2026-05-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首创剪切模拉曼成像技术，实现多层3R-MoS₂铁电翻转的原位追踪，揭示层依赖的畴动力学及层间畴壁构型，为二维铁电存储的多态调控与层分辨器件设计提供新思路。
该工作利用剪切模拉曼成像追踪多层3R-MoS₂中的铁电翻转。发现单一样品内机械分割区域独立响应并遵循不同路径；部分极化的终态表明畴壁可存在于选定层之间，揭示了层状材料中铁电畴动力学的层依赖特性。

非线性欧姆电磁响应#

Nonlinear Ohmic electromagnetic response
📚 arXiv👤 Anwei Zhang, Zheng Cai, C. M. Wang📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次将非线性欧姆响应分解为Drude型与几何内禀项，揭示全对称化量子度规矩极的核心作用；预言的能带几何诱导双线性磁电效应为窄带隙高速材料的新型非线性输运探测提供了理论框架。
该工作基于Matsubara格林函数形式体系，系统研究了二次谐波产生与双线性磁电效应中的非线性欧姆响应。研究表明光学非线性欧姆电导率包含非线性Drude型部分和由全对称化归一化量子度规矩极决定的内禀项，并预测了双线性磁电响应中由能带几何诱导的新型内禀欧姆电导率。通过二维Dirac模型，该工作证明这种几何诱导的非线性欧姆响应可在高费米速度、窄带隙材料中观测到。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作基于Matsubara格林函数形式体系，系统研究了二次谐波产生与双线性磁电效应中的非线性欧姆响应。研究表明光学非线性欧姆电导率包含非线性Drude型部分和由全对称化归一化量子度规矩极决定的内禀项，并预测了双线性磁电响应中由能带几何诱导的新型内禀欧姆电导率。通过二维Dirac模型，该工作证明这种几何诱导的非线性欧姆响应可在高费米速度、窄带隙材料中观测到。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16367v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We systematically investigate nonlinear Ohmic responses in second-harmonic generation and bilinear magnetoelectric effects within the Matsubara Green's function formalism. The optical nonlinear Ohmic conductivity is shown to consist of a nonlinear Drude-like part and an intrinsic term determined by the fully symmetrized normalized quantum metric dipole. Notably, we predict a previously unrecognized intrinsic Ohmic conductivity arising from band geometry in the bilinear magnetoelectric response, which exhibits transverse behavior similar to its optical counterpart. Using a two-dimensional Dirac model, we demonstrate that this geometrically induced nonlinear Ohmic response is observable in materials with high Fermi velocity and narrow band gaps. Our work provides a systematic quantum field-theoretic framework for describing nonlinear Ohmic transport in condensed matter systems.

106

CrPS₄中关联驱动的自旋重取向：竞争各向异性通道机制#

Correlation-Driven Spin Reorientation via Competing Anisotropy Channels in CrPS4
📚 arXiv👤 Raju Baral, Harald O. Jeschke, Igor I. Mazin, Jue Liu, David Mandrus, Stuart Calder📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示准一维范德华反铁磁体CrPS₄中自旋重取向的关联驱动本质，创新性地运用mPDF技术直接观测局域自旋关联，并发现单离子与交换各向异性两种竞争通道的差异重整化机制。这一成果为理解低维量子磁性
该工作利用磁对分布函数(mPDF)分析，在准一维范德华反铁磁体CrPS₄中识别出温度诱导自旋重取向的关联驱动机制。mPDF解析了局域自旋方向，显示铁磁链内关联在奈尔温度以上仍持续存在。结合DFT导出的自旋哈密顿量，研究揭示了单离子各向异性与交换各向异性两种竞争通道的差异重整化效应：单离子各向异性保持局域性，而交换各向异性随位间关联衰减被重整化，从而旋转有效易轴并解释有序态的倾斜行为。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用磁对分布函数(mPDF)分析，在准一维范德华反铁磁体CrPS₄中识别出温度诱导自旋重取向的关联驱动机制。mPDF解析了局域自旋方向，显示铁磁链内关联在奈尔温度以上仍持续存在。结合DFT导出的自旋哈密顿量，研究揭示了单离子各向异性与交换各向异性两种竞争通道的差异重整化效应：单离子各向异性保持局域性，而交换各向异性随位间关联衰减被重整化，从而旋转有效易轴并解释有序态的倾斜行为。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16541v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We identify a correlation-driven mechanism for the temperature-induced spin reorientation in the quasi-one-dimensional van der Waals antiferromagnet CrPS4. Magnetic pair distribution function (mPDF) analysis resolves the local spin direction and shows that ferromagnetic intrachain correlations persist far above TN. Combining these correlations with a DFT-derived spin Hamiltonian reveals competing single-ion and exchange-anisotropy channels, with single-ion anisotropy remaining local while exchange anisotropy is renormalized as intersite correlations decay. This differential renormalization rotates the effective easy axis and captures the ordered-state canting. Above TN, the continued rotation beyond the model prediction delineates the limits of the dominant-chain approximation. These results establish mPDF-derived correlations as direct inputs to microscopic Hamiltonians and show how low-dimensional correlations can control magnetic anisotropy.

107

周期驱动单分子磁体晶体管中的贝里相位#

Berry-phase in a periodically driven single molecule magnet transistor
📚 arXiv👤 Gabriel Gonzalez📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在周期驱动单分子磁体晶体管中揭示贝里相位干涉效应，发现交流栅压诱导的零透射共振随横向磁场周期性振荡，为固态体系中几何相位调控电子输运提供了新机制，对拓扑量子器件设计具有重要启发。
该工作研究了局域横向磁场和交流驱动栅压下单分子磁体晶体管的电子输运性质。利用Floquet理论和Landauer形式体系计算电导随电子能量和横向磁场的变化，发现周期势导致零透射共振，这些共振因与两条量子隧穿路径相关的贝里相位干涉而随横向磁场振荡。研究表明，特定能量的入射电子可在电导-横向磁场关系中观测到这种贝里相位振荡。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了局域横向磁场和交流驱动栅压下单分子磁体晶体管的电子输运性质。利用Floquet理论和Landauer形式体系计算电导随电子能量和横向磁场的变化，发现周期势导致零透射共振，这些共振因与两条量子隧穿路径相关的贝里相位干涉而随横向磁场振荡。研究表明，特定能量的入射电子可在电导-横向磁场关系中观测到这种贝里相位振荡。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16635v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We consider the electron transport through a single molecule magnet transistor in the presence of a local transverse magnetic field and ac-driven gate voltage. We calculate the conductance as a function of the electron energy and transverse magnetic field by using the Floquet and Landauer formalism. We show that the time periodic potential causes zero transmission resonances that oscillate as a function of the transverse magnetic field due to the Berry phase interference associated with two quantum tunneling paths. We find that these Berry phase oscillations can be detected in the conductance as a function of the transverse magnetic field for an incoming electron with a specific energy.

108

反铁磁畴壁动力学诱导的涌现阻抗#

Emergent impedance due to antiferromagnetic domain wall dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Yuta Yamane, Jotaro J. Nakane, Yasufumi Araki, Jun'ichi Ieda📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次将涌现阻抗理论拓展至反铁磁体系，揭示子晶格磁化倾斜这一反铁磁独有自由度贡献的新机制，与平移运动形成竞争，为亚共振区阻抗调控提供新维度，有望推动高频反铁磁自旋电子学器件设计。
该工作理论上研究了反铁磁畴壁动力学诱导的涌现阻抗。此前该效应已在螺旋磁体中被预言和观测，源于自旋转移力矩与自旋动力势的联合作用。作者建立了交流电流下反铁磁畴壁电响应的形式理论，得到涌现阻抗的解析表达式。研究发现两种动力学模式分别贡献：畴壁中心平移运动产生正比于速度的项（类似螺旋磁体）；反铁磁畴壁特有的子晶格磁化倾斜时间依赖性贡献则反比于反铁磁交换耦合常数。两种贡献的竞争决定了亚共振频率下涌现阻抗虚部的符号与大小。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作理论上研究了反铁磁畴壁动力学诱导的涌现阻抗。此前该效应已在螺旋磁体中被预言和观测，源于自旋转移力矩与自旋动力势的联合作用。作者建立了交流电流下反铁磁畴壁电响应的形式理论，得到涌现阻抗的解析表达式。研究发现两种动力学模式分别贡献：畴壁中心平移运动产生正比于速度的项（类似螺旋磁体）；反铁磁畴壁特有的子晶格磁化倾斜时间依赖性贡献则反比于反铁磁交换耦合常数。两种贡献的竞争决定了亚共振频率下涌现阻抗虚部的符号与大小。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16778v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We theoretically investigate emergent impedance induced by domain-wall dynamics in antiferromagnets. Emergent impedance, arising from a combined action of spin-transfer torque and spinmotive force, was previously predicted and observed in spiral magnets. Here we develop a formalism for the electrical response of an antiferromagnetic domain wall under ac currents, and obtain analytical expressions for the resulting emergent impedance. We find that two dynamical modes play separate roles in the emergent impedance: Translational motion of the domain-wall center generates a contribution proportional to its velocity, analogous to that arising from the corresponding motion of a spiral magnet. Another contribution, unique to antiferromagnetic domain walls, originates from the time-dependent canting of the sublattice magnetizations localized within the moving domain wall, whose magnitude is inversely proportional to the antiferromagnetic exchange coupling constant. The competition between these two distinct contributions determines the sign and magnitude of the imaginary part of the emergent impedance at sub-resonant frequencies. Our results provide a fundamental insight into electron transport in antiferromagnets, and open avenues for novel antiferromagnet-based spintronics devices.

109

磁系统中轨道与自旋角动量耦合动力学的相对论理论#

Relativistic theory for coupled orbital and spin angular momentum dynamics in magnetic systems
📚 arXiv👤 Subhadip Santra, Ritwik Mondal, Marco Berritta, Peter M. Oppeneer📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文首次从相对论量子力学框架出发，系统建立了磁系统中自旋-轨道角动量耦合的完整动力学理论，突破了传统仅关注自旋的局限。该理论为理解光场驱动下超快磁动力学、轨道矩效应及新型自旋电子学器件设计提供了严格的
该工作发展了描述磁系统电子角动量（含自旋S与轨道L）动力学的完整相对论理论。从电磁场中的相对论Dirac-Kohn-Sham哈密顿量出发，通过幺正变换构建扩展Pauli哈密顿量，进而推导轨道与自旋角动量的耦合动力学方程。研究首先证明总角动量J=S+L在无自旋极化Kohn-Sham交换场时守恒，但在电磁场（如激光、THz场）作用下不再守恒；其次，在原子自旋与轨道矩的磁系统中，采用原子海森堡近似推导了角动量动力学的耦合运动方程。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发展了描述磁系统电子角动量（含自旋S与轨道L）动力学的完整相对论理论。从电磁场中的相对论Dirac-Kohn-Sham哈密顿量出发，通过幺正变换构建扩展Pauli哈密顿量，进而推导轨道与自旋角动量的耦合动力学方程。研究首先证明总角动量J=S+L在无自旋极化Kohn-Sham交换场时守恒，但在电磁场（如激光、THz场）作用下不再守恒；其次，在原子自旋与轨道矩的磁系统中，采用原子海森堡近似推导了角动量动力学的耦合运动方程。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16830v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop a complete relativistic theory to describe the dynamics of electronic angular momentum including both spin (S) and orbital (L) contributions in magnetic systems. We start with the relativistic Dirac-Kohn-Sham Hamiltonian under the influence of an electromagnetic field and apply a unitary transformation to formulate the extended Pauli Hamiltonian. Using the transformed semirelativistic Hamiltonian, we derive the angular momentum dynamics for the orbital and spin angular momenta. Thereby, we formulate the coupled dynamics of orbital and spin moments consistent with the relativistic Dirac framework. Considering especially the conservation of the total angular momentum, J = S +L, we show first that J is conserved in the absence of a spin-polarized Kohn-Sham exchange field, but is no longer conserved under the application of an electromagnetic field, e.g., laser pulse, THz field, etc. Second, considering magnetic systems with atomic spin and orbital momenta, we derive the coupled equations of motion of angular momenta dynamics whilst making the atomistic Heisenberg approximation for the exchange interaction. Our results suggest that, under these assumptions, the total angular momentum remains conserved, even with electromagnetic field, but atomic spin and orbital angular momenta individually are not conserved.

110

镍基异质结构反常霍尔效应的界面工程#

Interface engineering of the anomalous Hall effect in Ni-based heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Mainak Ghosh, Kusampal Yadav, Kalyan sarkar, Kousik Das, Devajyoti Mukherjee, Sayantika Bhowal📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统应变调控框架，揭示界面Rashba自旋-轨道耦合是镍基异质结构反常霍尔效应的主导机制，并首次实现电场连续调控，为低功耗自旋电子器件提供了全新调控范式。
该工作结合实验与第一性原理理论，展示了镍基外延薄膜异质结构中反常霍尔效应的界面工程调控。在(001)取向的LaAlO₃、SrTiO₃和MgO单晶衬底上生长的铁磁Ni薄膜分别承受0.3%、0.6%和0.8%的双轴拉伸应变，室温霍尔输运测量显示反常霍尔电导率存在显著的衬底依赖性调制。计算表明应变 alone 无法解释实验趋势，界面反演对称性破缺诱导的Rashba自旋-轨道相互作用才是调控反常霍尔电导率的关键机制。基于此理解，研究进一步理论…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合实验与第一性原理理论，展示了镍基外延薄膜异质结构中反常霍尔效应的界面工程调控。在(001)取向的LaAlO₃、SrTiO₃和MgO单晶衬底上生长的铁磁Ni薄膜分别承受0.3%、0.6%和0.8%的双轴拉伸应变，室温霍尔输运测量显示反常霍尔电导率存在显著的衬底依赖性调制。计算表明应变 alone 无法解释实验趋势，界面反演对称性破缺诱导的Rashba自旋-轨道相互作用才是调控反常霍尔电导率的关键机制。基于此理解，研究进一步理论和实验证明了外电场可连续调控反常霍尔电导率。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16936v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Using a combined experimental and first-principles theoretical approach, we demonstrate interface engineering of the anomalous Hall effect in Ni-based epitaxial thin-film heterostructures. Ferromagnetic Ni thin films are grown on (001)-oriented single-crystal LaAlO₃, SrTiO₃, and MgO substrates, which impose different biaxial tensile strains of 0.3%, 0.6%, and 0.8%, respectively. Our room-temperature Hall transport measurements reveal a pronounced substrate-dependent modulation of the anomalous Hall conductivity. Interestingly, our calculations show that strain alone cannot account for the experimentally observed trends. Instead, we identify interfacial inversion-symmetry breaking, which induces Rashba spin-orbit interaction, as the key mechanism governing the anomalous Hall conductivity across different interfaces. Building on this understanding, we further demonstrate both theoretically and experimentally that the anomalous Hall conductivity can be continuously tuned by an external electric field. These findings establish the critical role of substrate-induced interfacial effects in controlling the anomalous Hall effect in engineered heterostructures and provide a viable pathway toward electrically tunable room-temperature spintronic devices.

111

基于磁电耦合在多铁异质结构中实现可重构磁振子逻辑#

Reprogrammable magnonic logic in a multiferroic heterostructure via magnetoelectric coupling
📚 arXiv👤 Ping Che, Amr Abdelsamie, Ádám Papp, Sali Salama, André Thiaville, Romain Lebrun, Stéphane Fusil, Vincent Garcia, Aymeric Vecchiola, Karim Bouzehouane, Manuel Bibes, Agnès Barthélémy, Jean-Paul Adam, Vladislav Demidov, Paolo Bortolotti, Abdelmadjid Anane, Isabella Boventer📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将铁电畴工程与磁振子学融合，突破传统磁振子器件调谐方式单一、能耗高的瓶颈，首次实现电学可重构、非易失的磁振子波导与色散调控，为低功耗、可编程磁振子计算芯片提供了全新物理平台与器件范式。
该工作利用BiFeO3/La0.67Sr0.33MnO3多铁薄膜异质结构，通过BiFeO3的铁电畴工程实现La0.67Sr0.33MnO3磁振子色散的确定性调控，频率偏移达约150 MHz，并支持可重构波导。微聚焦布里渊光散射直接成像了电学定义的磁振子波导和空间可编程色散，该方法具有非易失性和可逆性优势。结合逆向设计模拟，该平台可执行先进磁振子运算。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用BiFeO3/La0.67Sr0.33MnO3多铁薄膜异质结构，通过BiFeO3的铁电畴工程实现La0.67Sr0.33MnO3磁振子色散的确定性调控，频率偏移达约150 MHz，并支持可重构波导。微聚焦布里渊光散射直接成像了电学定义的磁振子波导和空间可编程色散，该方法具有非易失性和可逆性优势。结合逆向设计模拟，该平台可执行先进磁振子运算。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16946v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The realization of fully reconfigurable, voltage-controlled, and programmable on-chip magnonic devices is essential to fully harness the potential of spin waves for signal processing, logic and neuromorphic computing. Yet, existing demonstrations of electrical tuning of magnonic responses are either volatile, current-driven and thus energy-inefficient, or rely on local strain modification limiting their scalability for wafer-scale integration. Here, we address this challenge using a BiFeO3/La0.67Sr0.33MnO3 multiferroic thin film heterostructure. We show that ferroelectric domain engineering in BiFeO3 enables deterministic tuning of the magnon dispersion of La0.67Sr0.33MnO3, producing frequency shifts up to sim 150 MHz and allowing reconfigurable waveguiding. Micro-focused Brillouin light scattering directly images these effects, revealing electrically defined magnonic waveguides and spatially programmable dispersion. Compared to conventional approaches, this method provides non-volatile and reversible control. Furthermore, using an inverse-design simulation code, we demonstrate the capability of our platform to perform advanced magnonic functions such as frequency demultiplexing. Our results open a new avenue for using magnetoelectric heterostructures for magnonic logic, with further applicability to reservoir and neuromorphic computing and AI driven magnonic devices.

112

重度过掺杂区Fe掺杂Bi-2201铜氧化物中的非公度反铁磁序#

Incommensurate Antiferromagnetic Order in the Fe-substituted Bi-2201 Cuprate in the Heavily Overdoped Regime
📚 arXiv👤 Y. Komiyama, Y. Ikeda, T. Taniguchi, T. J. Williams, M. Matsuda, S. Asai, T. Masuda, H. Kuwahara, H. Kuroe, T. Kawamata, I. Watanabe, M. Fujita, T. Adachi📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：在重度过掺杂Bi-2201铜氧化物中发现Fe诱导的非公度反铁磁序，突破传统相图认知，揭示超导穹顶外仍存在稳定磁关联，为理解高温超导与磁性相互作用机制提供新视角。
弹性中子散射实验在5% Fe掺杂的非超导重度过掺杂Bi-2201铜氧化物中观察到非公度反铁磁峰，非公度值δ~0.21与过掺杂区Fe掺杂Bi-2201的观测结果相当。过掺杂与重度过掺杂区的磁关联长度相近，表明Fe可能在重度过掺杂区诱导并稳定非公度反铁磁序，暗示相图中超导穹顶之外存在稳健的反铁磁关联。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

弹性中子散射实验在5% Fe掺杂的非超导重度过掺杂Bi-2201铜氧化物中观察到非公度反铁磁峰，非公度值δ~0.21与过掺杂区Fe掺杂Bi-2201的观测结果相当。过掺杂与重度过掺杂区的磁关联长度相近，表明Fe可能在重度过掺杂区诱导并稳定非公度反铁磁序，暗示相图中超导穹顶之外存在稳健的反铁磁关联。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16988v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Elastic neutron scattering experiments showed incommensurate antiferromagnetic peaks in 5% Fe-substituted Bi-2201 cuprate in the non-superconducting heavily overdoped regime. The incommensurability delta~0.21 is comparable to that observed in Fe-substituted Bi-2201 in the overdoped regime. [Hiraka et al., Phys. Rev. B 81, 144501 (2010).] The magnetic correlation length is comparable between the overdoped and non-superconducting heavily overdoped regimes. It is plausible that incommensurate antiferromagnetic order is induced and stabilized by Fe in the heavily overdoped regime, which suggests a robust antiferromagnetic correlation beyond the superconducting dome in the phase diagram.

113

超流自旋霍尔效应启发的纳米柱约瑟夫森二极管#

Supercurrent spin Hall effect enabled nanopillar Josephson diodes
📚 arXiv👤 Debashree Nayak, Dimple Rani, Prasanjit Samal, Kartik Senapati📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地利用重金属Pt内禀自旋轨道耦合诱导超流自旋霍尔效应，无需传统Rashba结构或外磁场即可实现非互易约瑟夫森输运，在液氦温区以上获得17%磁场可调二极管效率，为低能耗超导量子器件及拓扑量子
该工作提出利用重金属约瑟夫森势垒中内禀自旋轨道耦合通过超流自旋霍尔效应诱导非互易性，区别于传统依赖Rashba自旋轨道耦合和外磁场的方案。通过测量Nb-Pt-Nb纳米柱结系列，在液氦温度以上实现了高达17%的可磁场调控约瑟夫森二极管效率。Pt势垒中超流自旋霍尔效应产生的非平衡自旋分离是高效非互易性的关键，类似于正常自旋霍尔效应。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出利用重金属约瑟夫森势垒中内禀自旋轨道耦合通过超流自旋霍尔效应诱导非互易性，区别于传统依赖Rashba自旋轨道耦合和外磁场的方案。通过测量Nb-Pt-Nb纳米柱结系列，在液氦温度以上实现了高达17%的可磁场调控约瑟夫森二极管效率。Pt势垒中超流自旋霍尔效应产生的非平衡自旋分离是高效非互易性的关键，类似于正常自旋霍尔效应。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17066v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In the recent years it has been possible to achieve diode-like, non-reciprocal current-voltage response in Josephson junctions, despite the intrinsic symmetry of the Josephson effect itself. This is typically achieved by incorporating Rashba spin-orbit coupling into the Josephson junction as a strong inversion symmetry breaking component, and external magnetic field as a tuneable time-reversal symmetry breaking component. However, the efficiencies of the external field tuneable Josephson-diodes have remained limited to less than 10 %, often measured below 100 mK temperature. In this work we take a new approach where non-reciprocity is induced by intrinsic SOC in a heavy metal Josephson barrier via the predicted supercurrent spin-Hall effect. By measuring a series of Nb-Pt-Nb nanopillar junctions we demonstrated field tuneable Josephson diode efficiencies as high as 17%, measured above liquid Helium temperature. This was possible by the realization of a net non-equilibrium spin segregation in the Pt barrier, due to the supercurrent spin-Hall effect in the Pt barrier, analogous to the normal spin-Hall effect. As the direction of the induced spin moment is determined by the bias current, an external magnetic field causes the associated phases to add with opposite signs for opposite current directions, resulting in a nonreciprocal supercurrent across the junction.

114

绝缘体中普适热极化效应的观测#

Observation of universal thermopolarization effect in insulators
📚 arXiv👤 Shuichi Iwakiri, Yasumitsu Miyata, Takao Mori📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地揭示了绝缘体中普适的热极化机制：温度梯度通过热膨胀-应变梯度-挠曲电效应的非传统路径诱导电极化，其标度规律具有预测性。该发现统一了晶体、非晶及聚合物体系的热电响应描述，为柔性热电器件和能
该工作证明温度梯度可通过热力学路径在宽范围绝缘体中产生电极化（热极化），区别于导体Seebeck效应和极性绝缘体热释电的传统机制。热膨胀产生的应变梯度通过挠曲电效应诱导极化，在晶体、聚合物和非晶系统（MgO、Al₂O₃、MnO、云母、PET、PEN、聚酰亚胺、钠钙玻璃）中均检测到热致极化。响应幅度与热膨胀系数呈稳健标度关系，有限元模拟复现该行为。减薄样品厚度和利用结构不稳定性（玻璃化和反铁磁相变）可增强响应，后者实现超过一个数量级的提…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作证明温度梯度可通过热力学路径在宽范围绝缘体中产生电极化（热极化），区别于导体Seebeck效应和极性绝缘体热释电的传统机制。热膨胀产生的应变梯度通过挠曲电效应诱导极化，在晶体、聚合物和非晶系统（MgO、Al₂O₃、MnO、云母、PET、PEN、聚酰亚胺、钠钙玻璃）中均检测到热致极化。响应幅度与热膨胀系数呈稳健标度关系，有限元模拟复现该行为。减薄样品厚度和利用结构不稳定性（玻璃化和反铁磁相变）可增强响应，后者实现超过一个数量级的提升。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17224v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Heat-to-charge conversion has traditionally been realized via the Seebeck effect in conductors and pyroelectricity in polar insulators.
