Here, we demonstrate that temperature gradients generate electrical polarization, namely thermopolarization, in a wide range of insulators through a thermomechanical pathway. We identify a mechanism where thermal expansion under a temperature gradient produces strain gradients that induce polarization via the flexoelectric effect. Using a device with an on-chip heater, we detect the heat-induced polarization in crystalline, polymeric, and amorphous systems, including MgO, Al₂O₃, MnO, mica, PET, PEN, polyimide, and soda-lime glass. The magnitude of the response exhibits a robust scaling with the coefficient of thermal expansion, which is reproduced by finite-element simulations. Furthermore, we identify two routes to enhance the response: reducing the sample thickness and exploiting structural instabilities such as glass and antiferromagnetic phase transitions, where more than an order-of-magnitude enhancement is observed. These results establish a symmetry-independent route for heat-to-charge conversion in insulators and provide a device-compatible platform for electrically probing lattice responses, with potential for enhancement in nanoscale systems such as two-dimensional materials.

115

QRQIR²型耦合非线性声子学中的频率重整化及其效应#

Frequency renormalization and its effects in nonlinear phononics with Q_RQIR²-type coupling
📚 arXiv👤 Yijie Zeng📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次解析推导QRQIR²型耦合双声子系统的非线性动力学，发现红外模频率重整化导致拉曼整流饱和效应，并揭示简并IR模与QR耦合可诱导动态磁化，拓展了非线性声子学中动态多铁性的实现机制，为强场光控量
该工作采用微扰方法研究QRQIR²型最低阶耦合的双声子系统，解析获得声子位移和频率。红外活性模的频率重整化使拉曼模整流在高泵浦场下饱和；对于简并IR模与QR(QIR,x²−QIR,y²)耦合，椭圆或线偏振超短中红外脉冲共振泵浦时IR模频率分裂，同时实现拉曼整流和磁化。结果揭示了第一性原理计算未捕捉的非线性声子学动力学效应，将动态多铁性扩展至QR(QIR,x²−QIR,y²)耦合系统，强泵浦下的幅度饱和激发克服该非线性效应的未来研究。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用微扰方法研究QRQIR²型最低阶耦合的双声子系统，解析获得声子位移和频率。红外活性模的频率重整化使拉曼模整流在高泵浦场下饱和；对于简并IR模与QR(QIR,x²−QIR,y²)耦合，椭圆或线偏振超短中红外脉冲共振泵浦时IR模频率分裂，同时实现拉曼整流和磁化。结果揭示了第一性原理计算未捕捉的非线性声子学动力学效应，将动态多铁性扩展至QR(QIR,x²−QIR,y²)耦合系统，强泵浦下的幅度饱和激发克服该非线性效应的未来研究。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17241v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A two-phonon system with lowest-order coupling of form Q_RQIR² is studied by perturbation method, and analytic results for both phonon displacements and frequencies are obtained. The frequency renormalization of infrared (IR) active mode brings the rectification of Raman mode to saturate at high pump field. For degenerate IR mode with coupling of form Q_R(QIR,ₓ²⁻QIR,y²⁾, the frequency of IR mode will split when resonantly pumped by elliptically or linearly polarized ultrashort mid-IR pulse, realizing Raman rectification and magnetization simultaneously. Our results reveal a dynamical effect of nonlinear phononics not captured by first-principles calculation, extend the dynamical multiferroicity to systems with coupling Q_R(QIR,ₓ²⁻QIR,y²⁾, and the method can be readily applied to higher-order couplings. The amplitude saturation under strong pump field stimulates future researches to overcome this nonlinear effect.

116

转角WSe₂中莫特量子自旋霍尔绝缘体的观测#

Observation of a Mott quantum spin Hall insulator in twisted WSe2
📚 arXiv👤 Yifei Jin, Yaqi Ma, Aoqian Zhang, Nan Zhang, Ulf Lampe, Ivana Wong, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Tze Kin Cheung, Ning Wang, Kaifei Kang📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在转角WSe₂的莫特绝缘态中实现量子自旋霍尔效应，突破传统QSH体系对弱关联的依赖，证明强关联与拓扑边缘态可共存，为关联拓扑量子物态的电控研究开辟新路径。
该研究在2.29°转角WSe₂器件的第二莫尔能带半填充处，于磁场稳定的莫特绝缘态中观测到量子自旋霍尔（QSH）边缘输运。该态表现出与第一莫尔价带全填充单粒子QSH态相同的电阻平台，表明存在相同数量的螺旋边缘通道。电输运测量显示近量子化电阻，对垂直电场、面外磁场及5 K以下温度不敏感；非局域输运和强负面内磁导进一步证实螺旋边缘导电。温度依赖霍尔测量揭示约10 K的特征温度尺度（对应约1 meV能量尺度），证明自旋守恒的QSH边缘态可在强…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在2.29°转角WSe₂器件的第二莫尔能带半填充处，于磁场稳定的莫特绝缘态中观测到量子自旋霍尔（QSH）边缘输运。该态表现出与第一莫尔价带全填充单粒子QSH态相同的电阻平台，表明存在相同数量的螺旋边缘通道。电输运测量显示近量子化电阻，对垂直电场、面外磁场及5 K以下温度不敏感；非局域输运和强负面内磁导进一步证实螺旋边缘导电。温度依赖霍尔测量揭示约10 K的特征温度尺度（对应约1 meV能量尺度），证明自旋守恒的QSH边缘态可在强关联体系中持续存在。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17335v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Quantum spin Hall (QSH) insulators and Mott insulators are conventionally regarded as distinct insulating phases, arising from band topology and strong Coulomb interactions, respectively. Here, we report the observation of QSH edge transport in a magnetic-field-stabilized Mott insulating state at half filling of the second moire band in a 2.29 degree twisted WSe2 device. This state exhibits a resistance plateau identical to that of the single-particle QSH state at full filling of the first moire valence band, indicating the same number of helical edge channels. Electrical transport measurements reveal nearly quantized resistance that is insensitive to vertical electric field, out-of-plane magnetic field, and temperature below 5 K. Pronounced nonlocal transport and strong negative in-plane magnetoconductance further support helical edge conduction, establishing robust edge transport in the strongly correlated regime. Temperature-dependent Hall measurements reveal a characteristic temperature scale of approximately 10 K, corresponding to an energy scale of about 1 meV. Our results demonstrate that spin-conserved QSH edge states can persist in a half filled, strongly correlated insulating phase and under external magnetic field, opening a route toward interaction-resilient topological transport in moire quantum materials.

117

正方、三角和笼目晶格上S=1/2反铁磁体的比热与磁化率#

Specific heat and susceptibility of S=1/2 antiferromagnets on square, triangular, and kagome lattices
📚 arXiv👤 Chisa Hotta📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将正弦平方形变方法应用于量子自旋液体候选体系的热力学研究，突破了传统有限尺寸计算的瓶颈。核心发现是三角与笼目晶格虽同属高度阻挫系统，其低能激发谱却呈现本质差异：前者表现为比热肩峰，后者出
该工作采用正弦平方形变（SSD）方法研究二维晶格自旋-1/2反铁磁体的温度依赖热力学性质。SSD通过在哈密顿量上施加实空间包络函数使边界处能量尺度平滑趋于零，其量子本征态在系统中心呈现体相行为，可在小尺寸计算中有效模拟热力学极限。计算得到三角和笼目晶格反铁磁体在低温比热中呈现肩峰或明显双峰结构；笼目晶格情形在最低温区磁化率显著增强。与正方晶格和一维情形的直接比较揭示，尽管两种阻挫系统均保留大量熵，其低能激发性质存在显著差异。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用正弦平方形变（SSD）方法研究二维晶格自旋-1/2反铁磁体的温度依赖热力学性质。SSD通过在哈密顿量上施加实空间包络函数使边界处能量尺度平滑趋于零，其量子本征态在系统中心呈现体相行为，可在小尺寸计算中有效模拟热力学极限。计算得到三角和笼目晶格反铁磁体在低温比热中呈现肩峰或明显双峰结构；笼目晶格情形在最低温区磁化率显著增强。与正方晶格和一维情形的直接比较揭示，尽管两种阻挫系统均保留大量熵，其低能激发性质存在显著差异。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17420v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study the temperature dependence of the thermodynamic properties of spin-1/2 antiferromagnets on two-dimensional lattices. Our analysis employs the sine-square deformation (SSD), in which a real-space envelope function is applied to the Hamiltonian so that the local energy scale is smoothly reduced to zero at the system boundaries. The quantum eigenstates of the SSD Hamiltonian exhibit bulk-like behavior near the system center, effectively mimicking the thermodynamic limit even in small finite-size calculations. Using these fictitious bulk states, we compute the energy density, specific heat, and magnetic susceptibility as functions of temperature. We find that both the triangular- and kagome-lattice antiferromagnets show either a shoulder or a pronounced double-peak structure in the low-temperature specific heat, whereas the kagome case particularly shows a strong enhancement of magnetic susceptibility down to the lowest temperature range. These direct comparisons, together with the square-lattice and one-dimensional cases, reveal that although both frustrated systems retain a substantial amount of entropy, the low-energy excitations below ~ 0.5J of the kagome lattice are predominantly governed by the magnetic excited states, whereas not much for the triangular lattice.

118

几何驱动的非线性轨道磁电效应#

Geometry-Driven Nonlinear Orbital Magnetoelectric Effect
📚 arXiv👤 Jinxiong Jia, Zhenhua Qiao, Jian Wang📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破中心对称材料中线性轨道磁电效应的禁戒限制，揭示几何驱动的非线性响应机制，通过厄米联络结构调控内禀/外禀贡献，建立基于弛豫时间的实验判别方案，将候选材料从非中心对称体系拓展至更广泛的二维中心对
该研究提出一种非线性轨道磁电效应，可在中心对称材料中产生二次方依赖的轨道磁化，而线性轨道磁电效应在此类材料中被严格禁止。利用扩展半经典形式推导了规范不变的微观理论，分离内禀和外禀贡献并建立其与弛豫时间的不同依赖关系，提供实验判别依据。二维系统中非线性响应对面外旋转对称性的约束远弱于线性效应，大幅扩展了材料平台。微观上主导贡献受厄米联络结构控制，效应量级估计处于现有磁光克尔测量灵敏度范围内。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究提出一种非线性轨道磁电效应，可在中心对称材料中产生二次方依赖的轨道磁化，而线性轨道磁电效应在此类材料中被严格禁止。利用扩展半经典形式推导了规范不变的微观理论，分离内禀和外禀贡献并建立其与弛豫时间的不同依赖关系，提供实验判别依据。二维系统中非线性响应对面外旋转对称性的约束远弱于线性效应，大幅扩展了材料平台。微观上主导贡献受厄米联络结构控制，效应量级估计处于现有磁光克尔测量灵敏度范围内。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17462v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We propose a nonlinear orbital magnetoelectric effect, which generates orbital magnetization quadratically in centrosymmetric materials where the linear orbital magnetoelectric effect is strictly forbidden. Using extended semiclassical formulation, we derive a gauge-invariant microscopic theory that separates intrinsic and extrinsic contributions and establishes their distinct dependence on the relaxation time, providing an experimental discriminator. In two-dimensional systems the nonlinear response is far less constrained by out-of-plane rotational symmetries than the linear orbital magnetoelectric effect, substantially enlarging the materials platform. Microscopically, the dominant contributions are governed by a Hermitian-connection structure. Finally, we estimate that the magnitude of the nonlinear orbital magnetoelectric effect lies within the sensitivity of state-of-the-art magneto-optical Kerr measurements.

119

部分近藤屏蔽解开稀土四硼化物之谜#

Partial Kondo Screening Solves the Mystery of Rare Earth Tetraborides
📚 arXiv👤 Soumyaranjan Dash, Sanjeev Kumar📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地提出"部分近藤屏蔽"机制，揭示阻挫近藤晶格中动能、近藤耦合与磁阻挫的竞争可稳定多重分数磁化平台，为稀土四硼化物长期存在的变磁性及反常磁输运谜题提供统一解释，并为探索关联电子新材料相开辟新
该研究提出新机制解释稀土四硼化物中观测到的多重磁化平台。通过对Shastry-Sutherland晶格上近藤晶格模型的混合与半经典蒙特卡洛模拟，发现1/6、2/9、1/4、1/3、1/2、2/3和3/4饱和磁化处的稳健磁化平台。多数平台态处于部分近藤屏蔽态，源于动能、近藤耦合与磁阻挫三者复杂竞争的磁场调控。ErB₄和TmB₄中异常磁输运在此机制下获得出乎意料的简单解释。该工作为RB₄中变磁性及反常磁输运的长期谜题提供了简洁解决方案，并…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究提出新机制解释稀土四硼化物中观测到的多重磁化平台。通过对Shastry-Sutherland晶格上近藤晶格模型的混合与半经典蒙特卡洛模拟，发现1/6、2/9、1/4、1/3、1/2、2/3和3/4饱和磁化处的稳健磁化平台。多数平台态处于部分近藤屏蔽态，源于动能、近藤耦合与磁阻挫三者复杂竞争的磁场调控。ErB₄和TmB₄中异常磁输运在此机制下获得出乎意料的简单解释。该工作为RB₄中变磁性及反常磁输运的长期谜题提供了简洁解决方案，并为阻挫近藤晶格中预测和发现新关联相引入了新机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17469v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We invoke a new mechanism to account for multiple magnetization plateaus observed in rare-earth tetraborides. Using a combination of hybrid and semiclassical Monte Carlo simulations of the Kondo lattice model (KLM) on the Shastry-Sutherland lattice (SSL), we find robust magnetization plateaus at fractions 1/6, 2/9, 1/4, 1/3, 1/2, 2/3 and 3/4 of the saturation magnetization. We find that most of the plateau states are partially Kondo screened and emerge from the field-tuning of a complex three-way competition between the kinetic energy, the Kondo coupling, and the magnetic frustration. Most remarkably, the unusual magneto-transport reported in ErB₄ and TmB₄ admits an unexpectedly simple explanation within our mechanism. This work not only provides an elegant and simple solution to the long-standing puzzle of metamagnetism and anomalous magnetotransport in RB₄, but also introduces a novel mechanism to predict and discover new correlated phases in frustrated Kondo lattices.

120

双层NbOX₂（X=Cl, Br, I）光催化水分解应用的第一性原理比较研究#

A comparative first-principles investigation of bilayer NbOX2 (X=Cl, Br, I) for Photocatalytic water splitting applications
📚 arXiv👤 Laku Dorjee Tamang, Shivraj Gurung, Bhanu Chettri, Nguyen Thanh Tien, Le Huu Nghia, Darwin Barayang Putungan, Ranjit Thapa, Kailash Chandra Bhamu, Dibya Prakash Rai📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作系统比较了双层NbOX₂（X=Cl, Br, I）的堆垛偏好与光催化特性，首次揭示卤素调控带隙及价带顶位置的规律，发现其高载流子迁移率与强各向异性传输可促进电荷分离，为设计新型二维光催化水分解材
该工作采用密度泛函理论（DFT）研究二维同质双层NbOX₂（X=Cl, Br, I）的结构、电子、光学和光催化性质。结构上NbOCl₂和NbOBr₂倾向AC堆垛，NbOI₂倾向AB堆垛；所有双层均具有动力学、热学和力学稳定性。电子结构分析显示带隙随X从Cl到I递减，价带顶位置沿高对称点上移。所有体系具有高载流子迁移率和各向异性载流子传输特性，有利于电荷有效分离。这些材料在光催化水分解方面展现出与BiOI和PtSe₂相似的潜力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用密度泛函理论（DFT）研究二维同质双层NbOX₂（X=Cl, Br, I）的结构、电子、光学和光催化性质。结构上NbOCl₂和NbOBr₂倾向AC堆垛，NbOI₂倾向AB堆垛；所有双层均具有动力学、热学和力学稳定性。电子结构分析显示带隙随X从Cl到I递减，价带顶位置沿高对称点上移。所有体系具有高载流子迁移率和各向异性载流子传输特性，有利于电荷有效分离。这些材料在光催化水分解方面展现出与BiOI和PtSe₂相似的潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17616v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Motivated by our previous work on bulk NbOX2 , where we have reported its high 1dielectric polarisation and finite piezoelectric response, this work extends to its 2D homo bilayer system to explore its potential for photocatalytic water splitting. Herein, density functional theory (DFT) were employed in probing the structural, electronic, optical, and photocatalytic properties of 2D homo bilayer NbOX2 (X = Cl, Br, and I). Our results show that structurally, NbOCl2 and NbOBr2 prefer AC bilayer stacking,while AB stacking was preferred by NbOI2 . All the considered bilayers are dynamically, thermally, and mechanically stable. From the analysis of electronic structure we have found a decreasing trend in the energy band gap as X goes down the group from Cl to I, with the position of the valence band maximum shifting upward along the high symmetry points. In terms of carrier mobility, all 2D bilayer systems possess high carrier mobility comparable to known 2D materials. It also exhibits an anisotropic carrier transfer property by which charge carriers are separated efficiently. These materials show similar trends to BiOI and PtSe2 , in which photocatalytic efficiency was increased by forming the multiple layers. The materials under investigation are suitable for photocatalytic water splitting under visible and ultraviolet regions with absorption coefficients of 105 cm-1.

121

p波磁体中超导对称性的竞争与共存#

Competition and coexistence of superconducting symmetries in p-wave magnets
📚 arXiv👤 J. E. C. Carmelo, I. R. Pimentel, P. D. Sacramento📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次系统揭示p波磁体中磁螺旋结构对超导对称性的选择性调控机制，发现中等磁耦合可诱导s波向混合自旋三重态pₓ波的转变，而等自旋p_y波具有全耦合鲁棒性。这一理论框架为探索磁性-超导异质结中拓扑超导
该工作采用自洽Bogoliubov-de-Gennes方法研究正方晶格p波磁体模型中非传统磁性与超导的相互作用。分析自旋单态s波与自旋三重态p波配对在x方向螺旋磁结构（y方向重复）下的配对振幅、竞争与共存。发现磁螺旋选择性稳定不同配对对称性：中等磁耦合增强混合自旋pₓ波配对，等自旋p_y波配对对所有耦合强度均鲁棒。多序参量同时考虑时存在共存与竞争区域。增大磁耦合驱动两次量子相变：首次从主导s波到与s波共存的混合自旋三重态pₓ波；第二次…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用自洽Bogoliubov-de-Gennes方法研究正方晶格p波磁体模型中非传统磁性与超导的相互作用。分析自旋单态s波与自旋三重态p波配对在x方向螺旋磁结构（y方向重复）下的配对振幅、竞争与共存。发现磁螺旋选择性稳定不同配对对称性：中等磁耦合增强混合自旋pₓ波配对，等自旋p_y波配对对所有耦合强度均鲁棒。多序参量同时考虑时存在共存与竞争区域。增大磁耦合驱动两次量子相变：首次从主导s波到与s波共存的混合自旋三重态pₓ波；第二次从S_z=0的s波与混合自旋p波共存到主导等自旋p_y波配对。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17649v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the interplay between unconventional magnetism and superconductivity in a model of a p-wave magnet on a square lattice. Using a self-consistent Bogoliubov-de-Gennes approach, we analyze the pairing amplitudes, competition, and coexistence of spin-singlet s-wave and spin-triplet p-wave pairings in the presence of a magnetic texture with a helical structure along the x direction that is repeated in the y direction. We find that the magnetic helix selectively stabilizes different pairing symmetries depending on its orientation and strength. In particular, mixed-spin pₓ₋wave pairing is enhanced at intermediate magnetic couplings and equal-spin p_y-wave pairing is robust and insensitive to all coupling intensities. When the multiple order parameters are simultaneously considered, we find regimes of coexistence and competition. Increasing the magnetic coupling drives two quantum phase transitions. The first from dominant spin-singlet s-wave to mixed-spin triplet pₓ₋wave pairings in a regime of coexistence. The second from spin-singlet s-wave and mixed-spin triplet p-wave pairings with total spin projection S_z=0 to dominant equal-spin triplet p_y-wave pairings with S_z=±1 in a regime of mutually exclusive superconducting phases. Our results demonstrate that p-wave magnetic order does not merely diminish spin-singlet s-wave superconductivity but can actively promote and stabilize spin-triplet p-wave pairing, both intrinsically and in proximity to spin-singlet s-wave superconductors. These findings highlight unconventional magnets as promising materials for realizing robust triplet superconductivity.

122

高阶拓扑绝缘体中铁电极化调控的轨道霍尔电导：d1T相单层MoS₂#

Ferroelectric polarization controlled orbital Hall conductivity in a higher-order topological insulator: d1T-phase monolayer MoS₂
📚 arXiv👤 Yingjie Hu, Heng Gao, Wei Ren📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在单一材料中实现铁电性与高阶拓扑性的共存，揭示铁电极化可翻转轨道霍尔电导符号，为构建电场可重构的轨道电子学器件开辟新途径。
该工作预测单层d1T相过渡金属硫族化合物MoS₂是一种兼具铁电特性的高阶拓扑绝缘体，明确展示了非平庸拓扑指标及带隙内具有量子化分数电荷的角态特征。研究发现该体系能隙内存在非零轨道霍尔电导平台，可作为识别高阶拓扑系统的标志；更重要的是，铁电极化方向能够调控轨道霍尔电导σᴼᴴˣ的正负号，为实现外电场可控的轨道电子学提供了理论基础和材料候选。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作预测单层d1T相过渡金属硫族化合物MoS₂是一种兼具铁电特性的高阶拓扑绝缘体，明确展示了非平庸拓扑指标及带隙内具有量子化分数电荷的角态特征。研究发现该体系能隙内存在非零轨道霍尔电导平台，可作为识别高阶拓扑系统的标志；更重要的是，铁电极化方向能够调控轨道霍尔电导σᴼᴴˣ的正负号，为实现外电场可控的轨道电子学提供了理论基础和材料候选。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17722v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The higher-order topological insulator is an extended concept of the conventional topological insulator, which obeys the generalization of the standard bulk-boundary correspondence. In our paper, we predict the monolayer d1T-phase transition metal dichalcogenide MoS₂ to be a higher-order topological insulator, while also possessing intriguing ferroelectric characteristics. We explicitly demonstrate the nontrivial topological index and reveal the hallmark corner states with quantized fractional charge within the bulk band gap. Second, we show the existence of a nonzero orbital Hall conductivity plateau within the energy gap which is a signature to identify higher-order topology system. Additionally, we investigate the relationship between the ferroelectricity and the orbital Hall conductivity of d1T MoS₂ and find that the direction of ferroelectric polarization can modulate the positive and negative values of the orbital Hall conductivity σₘ̊OH^x. Our findings provide the theory and material candidate for ferroelectricity tunable orbital Hall effect which is promising to realize the external electric field controllable orbitronics.

123

蜂窝状反铁磁体MnPS₃热导率中的反常行为#

Anomalies in the thermal conductivity of honeycomb antiferromagnet MnPS₃
📚 arXiv👤 Jian Yan, Hiromu Okamoto, Hiroki Yoshida, Hikaru Takeda, Xuan Luo, Yuping Sun, Jun-ichi Yamaura, Minoru Yamashita📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在反铁磁绝缘体极低温区发现热霍尔电导符号反转与纵向热导多重谷值，揭示磁子贝里曲率随磁场的非平庸重分布，为拓扑磁性材料中贝里曲率的实验探测提供了全新热输运手段。
该研究在奈尔温度T_N=78 K的蜂窝状反铁磁体MnPS₃中，于极低温度区（<0.01T_N）发现了热霍尔电导场依赖关系中的符号反转现象，同时纵向热导率出现多重谷值结构。这些反常行为被归因于磁子能带中贝里曲率的重新分布，表明热霍尔测量在探测磁性绝缘体贝里曲率分布方面具有独特优势；高温区（>0.1T_N）则观测到线性声子霍尔效应及自旋翻转转变相关的峰值。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在奈尔温度T_N=78 K的蜂窝状反铁磁体MnPS₃中，于极低温度区（<0.01T_N）发现了热霍尔电导场依赖关系中的符号反转现象，同时纵向热导率出现多重谷值结构。这些反常行为被归因于磁子能带中贝里曲率的重新分布，表明热霍尔测量在探测磁性绝缘体贝里曲率分布方面具有独特优势；高温区（>0.1T_N）则观测到线性声子霍尔效应及自旋翻转转变相关的峰值。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17785v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Intrinsic two-dimensional magnets serve as a good platform to explore collective, charge-neutral and low-energy excitations. Distinguishing the crucial role of them in experimental aspect remains a challenge for decades. Here, we study the thermal transport in honeycomb antiferromagnet MnPS₃ with T_N=78 K down to very low temperatures (<0.01T_N). At high temperatures (>0.1T_N), the field dependence of the thermal Hall conductivity exhibits a linear phonon Hall effect and a peak associated with the spin-flop transition due to a strong spin-lattice coupling, well reproducing the previous report (Phys. Rev. B 110, 165147 (2024)). Notably, below 2 K, we find that the field dependence of the thermal Hall conductivity exhibits sign reversals within the spin-flop phase, at which the field dependence of the longitudinal thermal conductivity also shows multiple valleys. We suggest that these anomalies are caused by the redistribution of Berry curvature in magnon bands, demonstrating the superior performance of the thermal Hall measurements to detect the Berry curvature distributions in magnetic insulators.

124

磁性纳米结构中几何对称性与尺寸依赖的斯格明子相变#

Geometric symmetry and size-dependent skyrmion phase transitions in magnetic nanostructures
📚 arXiv👤 J. Y. Wang, C. X. Zhao, Y. F. Duan, H. M. Dong📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示了纳米结构几何对称性对斯格明子拓扑相变的决定性作用，核心创新在于发现旋转对称性可诱导丰富的多级拓扑转变，而对称性破缺反而能拓展斯格明子的稳定参数窗口。这一发现为通过微纳结构设计实现斯格明子态
该研究系统探讨了几何对称性、尺寸与外磁场对磁性纳米结构中单个斯格明子态的调控作用。纳米圆盘因旋转对称性可随直径增大发生从铁磁态到斯格明子、斯格明子ium及多态的丰富拓扑相变；而方形和矩形结构因角落退磁效应及对称性降低，拓扑复杂性受到抑制。在垂直磁场下，纳米圆盘呈现斯格明子ium与斯格明子之间的场驱动转变，而利用非对称性可使方/矩形纳米结构在更宽参数范围内稳定斯格明子。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究系统探讨了几何对称性、尺寸与外磁场对磁性纳米结构中单个斯格明子态的调控作用。纳米圆盘因旋转对称性可随直径增大发生从铁磁态到斯格明子、斯格明子ium及多态的丰富拓扑相变；而方形和矩形结构因角落退磁效应及对称性降低，拓扑复杂性受到抑制。在垂直磁场下，纳米圆盘呈现斯格明子ium与斯格明子之间的场驱动转变，而利用非对称性可使方/矩形纳米结构在更宽参数范围内稳定斯格明子。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17939v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the interplay of geometric symmetry, size, and external magnetic fields in regulating individual skyrmion states within magnetic nanostructures. By analyzing nanodisks, nanosquares, and nanorectangles, we demonstrate that rotational symmetry in nanodisks enables rich topological phase transitions, from ferromagnetic states to skyrmions, skyrmioniums, and multi-states, as their diameter increases. In contrast, square and rectangular structures exhibit suppressed topological complexity due to corner-induced demagnetization effects and reduced symmetries. Under perpendicular magnetic fields, nanodisks show field-driven transitions between skyrmionium and skyrmion states. By leveraging asymmetry, square and rectangular nanostructures stabilize skyrmions over a broader parameter range than nanodisks. These findings highlight geometric symmetry as a critical design parameter for tailoring skyrmion stability and functionality in spintronic applications such as multi-state memory and reconfigurable logic devices.

125

YCu₃(OD)₇₋ₓBr₂₊ₓ在高达120 T磁场中的5/9磁化平台与自旋超固相#

5/9-Magnetization Plateau and Spin Supersolidity in YCu₃₍OD)₇₋ₓBr₂₊ₓ under Magnetic Fields up to 120~T
📚 arXiv👤 Hiroaki Hayashi, Han Li, Feng-Feng Song, Xu-Guang Zhou, Akira Matsuo, Taeyun Kim, Enze Lv, Yuto Ishii, Zhe Qu, Gang Su, Koichi Kindo, Kwang-Yong Choi, Wei Li, Yasuhiro H. Matsuda📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在kagome量子磁体中首次发现5/9分数磁化平台，揭示组分调控平台位置的独特机制；结合120 T强场实验与张量网络理论，证实自旋超固相的存在，为探索强关联拓扑量子物态及阻挫磁体的新奇相图提供了
该工作对新型kagome反铁磁体YCu₃(OD)₇₋ₓBr₂₊ₓ（YCOB）三种组分进行了高达120 T的高精度磁化测量，发现了此前未观测到的5/9分数磁化平台。不同Br⁻浓度的样品在60 T以下呈现几乎相同的磁化曲线，但5/9平台在超高场区出现在显著不同的磁场位置。通过张量网络计算建立含三个空间各向异性海森堡耦合的3J型有效自旋哈密顿量，定量复现了测量结果并捕捉了平台随组分的演化；理论分析还表明在1/3与5/9平台之间存在对交换参数…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对新型kagome反铁磁体YCu₃(OD)₇₋ₓBr₂₊ₓ（YCOB）三种组分进行了高达120 T的高精度磁化测量，发现了此前未观测到的5/9分数磁化平台。不同Br⁻浓度的样品在60 T以下呈现几乎相同的磁化曲线，但5/9平台在超高场区出现在显著不同的磁场位置。通过张量网络计算建立含三个空间各向异性海森堡耦合的3J型有效自旋哈密顿量，定量复现了测量结果并捕捉了平台随组分的演化；理论分析还表明在1/3与5/9平台之间存在对交换参数敏感的自旋超固相。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.17995v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We performed high-precision magnetization measurements up to 120~T on three compositions of the newly discovered kagome antiferromagnet YCu₃₍OD)₇₋ₓBr₂₊ₓ (YCOB), revealing a previously unobserved 5/9 fractional magnetization plateau. All YCOB samples with different Br⁻ concentrations exhibit nearly identical magnetization curves below 60~T, whereas the 5/9 plateau appears at markedly different fields in the ultrahigh-field regime. By modeling the experimental data using tensor-network calculations, we derive the effective spin Hamiltonians for the YCOB family with three spatially anisotropic Heisenberg couplings (the 3J-type model), which quantitatively reproduces the measured magnetization processes and captures the composition-dependent evolution of the 5/9 plateau. Furthermore, our theoretical analysis suggests the emergence of a spin supersolid phase in the field window between the 1/3 and 5/9 plateaus, which is sensitive to spin exchange parameters and accounts for the significant variation in the critical fields of the 5/9 plateau observed among different YCOB compositions.

126

自旋-轨道力矩驱动非共线反铁磁体的多旋转开关#

Multi-rotational switching in a noncollinear antiferromagnet by spin-orbit torque
📚 arXiv👤 Yuma Sato, Yutaro Takeuchi, Yuta Yamane, Shun Kanai, Shunsuke Fukami📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作揭示非共线反铁磁体在自旋-轨道力矩驱动下存在"多旋转开关"新机制，其阈值电流对脉冲宽度的不敏感性突破了传统热激活模型预期，为开发高稳定性、低功耗的反铁磁存储器件提供了新物理基础。
该工作报道了自旋-轨道力矩驱动非共线反铁磁纳米点的一种新型开关动力学：在宽脉冲持续时间和幅度范围内，发现开关回跳事件的阈值电流密度对脉冲持续时间呈现非常规的不敏感性。这一现象归因于非共线反铁磁序在完成反转前经历多次旋转的此前未被认识的过程，即"多旋转开关"。理论分析揭示该行为源于三个关键因素的竞争——电流驱动的非共线反铁磁序相干旋转、未补偿净磁化的场致重取向以及热涨落。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道了自旋-轨道力矩驱动非共线反铁磁纳米点的一种新型开关动力学：在宽脉冲持续时间和幅度范围内，发现开关回跳事件的阈值电流密度对脉冲持续时间呈现非常规的不敏感性。这一现象归因于非共线反铁磁序在完成反转前经历多次旋转的此前未被认识的过程，即"多旋转开关"。理论分析揭示该行为源于三个关键因素的竞争——电流驱动的非共线反铁磁序相干旋转、未补偿净磁化的场致重取向以及热涨落。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18009v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Spintronics has advanced through discoveries of various electrically-driven spin dynamics in nanomagnets. Here, we report a novel switching dynamics of spin systems driven by spin-orbit torque, using a noncollinear antiferromagnetic nanodot. With electric pulses spanning a wide range of durations and amplitudes, we find an unconventional insensitivity of a threshold current density to pulse duration in switch-back events. This observation is attributed to a previously unrecognized process, in which the noncollinear antiferromagnetic order undergoes multiple rotations before completing reversal, a phenomenon we term multi-rotational switching. Our theoretical analysis reveals that multi-rotational switching arises from the interplay of three key factors: current-driven coherent rotation of the noncollinear antiferromagnetic order, field-induced reorientation of the uncompensated net magnetization, and thermal fluctuations. These findings establish a microscopic mechanism governing current-induced switching in noncollinear antiferromagnets, a topic of growing interest for next-generation spintronics technologies, opening a new route to controlling antiferromagnetic order in nanodevices.

127

菱方相NaNbO₃中小极子的第一性原理研究#

First-principles investigation of small polarons in rhombohedral NaNbO₃
📚 arXiv👤 Mohammad Amirabbasi, Lorenzo Villa, Elaheh Ghorbani, Jochen Rohrer, Karsten Albe📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地结合DFT+U与有限尺寸标度法，首次揭示菱方相NaNbO₃中空穴极子具有显著自陷稳定性而电子极子不自陷的电荷不对称性，阐明了氧2p轨道主导的空穴局域化机制，为无铅反铁电电容器通过极子工程
该研究采用DFT+U方法结合强制分段线性法和有限尺寸标度，研究菱方相NaNbO₃中小空穴极子和电子极子的稳定性。发现O-2p轨道中心的空穴极子具有-0.65 eV俘获能和0.32 eV绝热迁移势垒，而过量电子不自陷。该工作为理解无铅反铁电电容器的缺陷工程提供极子电荷补偿机制的基础。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究采用DFT+U方法结合强制分段线性法和有限尺寸标度，研究菱方相NaNbO₃中小空穴极子和电子极子的稳定性。发现O-2p轨道中心的空穴极子具有-0.65 eV俘获能和0.32 eV绝热迁移势垒，而过量电子不自陷。该工作为理解无铅反铁电电容器的缺陷工程提供极子电荷补偿机制的基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18200v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sodium niobate (NaNbO₃) is a perovskite oxide and a key component of emerging lead-free antiferroelectric capacitors for high-energy-density applications. However, its performance can be hindered by irreversible phase transitions and leakage currents associated with low electrical resistivity. Defect and doping engineering offers a potential way to overcome these problems, but its use requires a detailed understanding of electronic, ionic, and polaron charge-compensation mechanisms, where the role of polarons remains largely unexplored. Here, we investigate the stability of small hole and electron polarons in rhombohedral NaNbO₃, which is a structurally well-defined model system that avoids lattice-dynamical instabilities. Trapping energies are calculated using density-functional theory corrected by a Hubbard U, using the enforced-piecewise-linearity approach including finite-size scaling. For the small hole-polaron centered on O-2p orbital, we find a trapping energy of -0.65 (eV) and an adiabatic migration barrier of 0.32 (eV) determined by nudged-elastic-band calculations. In contrast, we show that excess electrons do not self-trap on Nb-4d orbitals, reflecting weak electron-phonon coupling in the conduction band manifold. These results identify oxygen as an intrinsic hole trap in NaNbO₃ and highlight the importance of including hole polarons in defect models of NaNbO₃-based electroceramics.

128

氧化条件下Fe掺杂BaTiO₃中氧空穴极子形成限制费米能级的原因#

Why hole polaron formation on oxygen is limiting the Fermi level in Fe acceptor doped BaTiO₃ under oxidizing conditions
📚 arXiv👤 Mohammad Amirabbasi, Emre Erdem, Denis Sudarikov, Jochen Rohrer, Andreas Klein, Karsten Albe📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究颠覆了传统认知，揭示氧化条件下Fe掺杂BaTiO₃中电荷补偿并非通过Fe³⁺/⁴⁺变价实现，而是氧配体优先捕获空穴形成O⁻极子态。这一"配体氧化"机制限制了费米能级钉扎，为调控铁电氧化物电子结构
该研究揭示氧化Fe掺杂BaTiO₃中氧化空穴优先定域于氧而非Fe，形成Fe³⁺-O⁻复合物，其能量低于形式Fe⁴⁺构型。DFT+U计算证实配体空穴形成是有利的电荷补偿机制，解释了EPR谱中Fe³⁺信号占主导而Fe⁴⁺难以观测的现象，表明氧极子可限制受主掺杂铁电钙钛矿的费米能级移动。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究揭示氧化Fe掺杂BaTiO₃中氧化空穴优先定域于氧而非Fe，形成Fe³⁺-O⁻复合物，其能量低于形式Fe⁴⁺构型。DFT+U计算证实配体空穴形成是有利的电荷补偿机制，解释了EPR谱中Fe³⁺信号占主导而Fe⁴⁺难以观测的现象，表明氧极子可限制受主掺杂铁电钙钛矿的费米能级移动。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18258v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Oxidizing Fe-doped BaTiO₃ is commonly expected to convert substitutional Fe³⁺ acceptors into formal Fe⁴⁺ centers. Yet, the experimentally accessible picture based on electron-paramagnetic resonance (EPR) is dominated by Fe³⁺-related signatures, while Fe⁴⁺ is not a straightforward observable. Here we show that this apparent discrepancy reflects the preferred location of the oxidizing hole: not on Fe, but on oxygen. Using density-functional theory with with occupation-matrix control and a piecewise-linearity-based Hubbard correction (DFT+U) for O-2p states, we find that an oxygen-centered hole polaron is forming a Fe³⁺-O⁻ complex that is lower in energy than the formal Fe⁴⁺ configuration. Our results identify ligand-hole formation as a favorable charge-compensation mechanism in oxidized Fe-doped BaTiO₃ and provide an explanation for the predominance of Fe³⁺-based centers in spectroscopy. More broadly, they show how oxygen polarons can limit Fermi-level shifts and control the electronic response of acceptor-doped ferroelectric perovskites.

129

中心对称2M-WS₂中量子几何诱导的反常手性输运与隐藏对称破缺#

Quantum geometry induced anomalous chiral transport and hidden symmetry breaking in centrosymmetric 2M-WS2
📚 arXiv👤 Hang Cui, Shao-Bo Liu, Erqing Wang, Mingxiang Pan, Yuqiang Fang, Ning Ma, Wenlong Liu, Di Chen, Yu Zhang, Yuanjun Song, Tingting Hao, Jiankun Li, Jian Cui, Ya Feng, Haiwen Liu, Fuqiang Huang, Huaqing Huang, X. -C. Xie, Jian-Hao Chen📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统认知，在中心对称材料2M-WS₂中揭示量子几何可诱导等效对称破缺，产生反常手性输运。核心创新在于建立非平庸量子几何与奇异金属态、非线性电磁响应的深层关联，为拓扑超导候选体系的功能调控及量
该工作在中心对称候选拓扑超导体2M-WS₂中，通过面外磁场下二次谐波产生观测到显著的手性输运。电子磁手性各向异性(eMChA)在费米液体-奇异金属转变温度TFL~25 K附近增强，与块体异常大Nernst响应呼应。理论分析表明非平庸量子几何是这些非线性响应与FL-SM转变关联的根源。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在中心对称候选拓扑超导体2M-WS₂中，通过面外磁场下二次谐波产生观测到显著的手性输运。电子磁手性各向异性(eMChA)在费米液体-奇异金属转变温度TFL~25 K附近增强，与块体异常大Nernst响应呼应。理论分析表明非平庸量子几何是这些非线性响应与FL-SM转变关联的根源。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18277v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Chirality, a widely existing material property in nature involving the breaking of the left-right symmetry, has profound influences in various fields of natural sciences. Nonlinear response, such as electronic magnetochiral anisotropy (eMChA), has been recognized as a sensitive probe for the effects of symmetry breaking and nontrivial quantum geometries in solids. So far, observations of eMChA have primarily been limited to inversion-symmetry broken materials. Here, we report a remarkable chiral transport in centrosymmetric candidate topological superconductor 2M-WS2 flakes observed via second-harmonic generation under an out-of-plane magnetic field. More importantly, the eMChA becomes significant around the crossover temperature TFL ~ 25 K from the Fermi liquid (FL) to strange metal (SM) in the normal state, which interestingly echoes with the anomalously large Nernst response at the same temperature in bulk 2M-WS2. These observations reveal a direct correspondence between the nonlinear response, Nernst response, and FL-SM transition in 2M-WS2. Theoretical analysis indicates that nontrivial quantum geometry is behind the simultaneous response of eMChA and Nernst effects in 2M-WS2 and the contribution from the orbital magnetic moment at the Fermi surface becomes significant during the FL-SM transition. Based on first-principles calculations, a thick-layer-sliding mechanism with minimal energy gain in 2M-WS2 provides one possibility for the generation of such nontrivial quantum geometry. The intertwined physics of remarkable eMChA, Nernst response, and FL-SM transition make 2M-WS2 a rare quantum platform to study the chiral transport and unexplored phenomena in strange metals, which may shed light on the trans-century, unresolved scientific issue in unconventional high-temperature superconductivity.

130

亚稳Cu₁₋ₓCrTe₂——通过软化学完成铜铬硫族Delafossite系列#

Metastable Cu₁₋ₓCrTe₂ -- Completing the copper chromium delafossite series through soft chemistry
📚 arXiv👤 Kai D. Röseler, Geo Sciarini, Felix Eder, Samuel Moody, Vladimir Pomjakushin, Fabian O. von Rohr📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：采用溶剂热阳离子交换法在低温窄窗口合成亚稳Cu₁₋ₓCrTe₂，突破常规固相合成限制；其高Néel温度反铁磁序为低维磁性材料设计提供新平台，彰显软化学在获取热力学不可达亚稳相中的关键作用。
该工作通过K₁₋ₓCrTe₂与CuBr的溶剂热阳离子交换，在~90°C窄温窗内合成此前未报道的Cu₁₋ₓCrTe₂(x≈0.3)。该亚稳相在T_N=239 K发生磁结构转变至反铁磁态，Néel温度高于其他ACrTe₂相。Cu₁₋ₓCrTe₂在250°C即分解为尖晶石CuCr₂Te₄，凸显低温拓扑化学路线获取常规固相合成无法获得的亚稳Cu(I)碲化物的重要性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过K₁₋ₓCrTe₂与CuBr的溶剂热阳离子交换，在~90°C窄温窗内合成此前未报道的Cu₁₋ₓCrTe₂(x≈0.3)。该亚稳相在T_N=239 K发生磁结构转变至反铁磁态，Néel温度高于其他ACrTe₂相。Cu₁₋ₓCrTe₂在250°C即分解为尖晶石CuCr₂Te₄，凸显低温拓扑化学路线获取常规固相合成无法获得的亚稳Cu(I)碲化物的重要性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18400v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In the layered copper chromium dichalcogenide series CuCrX₂, the oxide, the sulfide, and the selenide analogues have been reported, but the telluride CuCrTe₂ has remained unsynthesized so far. Here, we report the synthesis of Cu₁₋ₓCrTe₂ (x approx 0.3), which forms only within a narrow temperature window near 90 degC by solvothermal cation exchange of K₁₋ₓCrTe₂ (x approx 0.3) and CuBr. Cu₁₋ₓCrTe₂ undergoes a magnetostructural transition to an antiferromagnetic state at T_N=239 K, a Néel temperature that is high relative to other ACrTe₂ phases and comparable to that of ferromagnetic, fully-deintercalated CrTe₂. Cu₁₋ₓCrTe₂ is metastable and decomposes at temperatures as low as 250 degC to form spinel CuCr₂Te₄. These results highlight the importance of low-temperature topochemical routes for accessing metastable Cu(I)-containing tellurides that are inaccessible by conventional solid-state synthesis.

131

非中心对称EuPdSi₃薄膜的外延生长与磁相变#

Epitaxial growth and magnetic phase transitions in non-centrosymmetric EuPdSi₃ thin films
📚 arXiv👤 Sebastian Kölsch, Alfons G. Schuck, Olena Fedchenko, Dmitry Vasilyev, Olena Tkach, Sergeij Chernov, Christoph Schlüter, Andrii Gloskowski, Hans-Joachim Elmers, Gerd Schönhense, Jens Müller, Michael Huth📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：首次实现非中心对称EuPdSi₃薄膜外延生长，证实应变与界面效应可显著调控磁相变行为，为探索拓扑磁性与自旋电子学器件提供了可工程化的材料平台。
本文首次报道在MgO(001)衬底上通过分子束外延生长的非中心对称EuPdSi₃外延薄膜。X射线衍射证实其具有BaNiSn₃型四方结构，c轴垂直于膜面。硬X射线光电子能谱揭示Eu为稳定二价态，磁矩约7μ_B。电输运测量在零场下观测到19 K和15 K两个磁相变，外加沿[100]和[001]方向磁场时出现不同温度依赖的磁相，表明应变和界面效应对磁性的显著调控作用。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文首次报道在MgO(001)衬底上通过分子束外延生长的非中心对称EuPdSi₃外延薄膜。X射线衍射证实其具有BaNiSn₃型四方结构，c轴垂直于膜面。硬X射线光电子能谱揭示Eu为稳定二价态，磁矩约7μ_B。电输运测量在零场下观测到19 K和15 K两个磁相变，外加沿[100]和[001]方向磁场时出现不同温度依赖的磁相，表明应变和界面效应对磁性的显著调控作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18418v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Non-centrosymmetric magnetic materials are a promising platform for stabilizing chiral spin textures, such as skyrmions and cycloidal magnetic states. This is particularly true in epitaxial thin film geometries, where strain and interface effects offer additional control. Herein, we report on the first epitaxial thin films of EuPdSi₃ grown by molecular beam epitaxy on MgO(001). X-ray diffraction confirms an epitaxial relationship of tetragonal EuPdSi₃ in the BaNiSn₃ structure with out-of-plane c-axis orientation and parallel in-plane a-axes. Hard x-ray photoelectron spectroscopy reveals a stable Eu valence of 2.0, yielding a large magnetic moment of approximately 7 μ_B per Eu atom in accordance with Hund's rule. Owing to the non-centrosymmetric crystal structure, non-collinear magnetic states such as Néel-type skyrmions and cycloidal phases are allowed by symmetry. Electronic transport measurements reveal two magnetic phase transitions at 19 K and 15 K in zero applied field. Under magnetic fields applied along the crystallographic [100] and [001] directions, distinct temperature dependent magnetic phases emerge, demonstrating the sensitivity of the magnetic ground state to field orientation in epitaxial EuPdSi₃ thin films.

132

交替磁性金属中的方向选择性三重态配对与自旋-边缘锁定#

Direction-selective triplet pairing and spin-edge locking in altermagnetic metals
📚 arXiv👤 Lie Yuan, Junkang Huang, Yu-Xuan Li, Tao Zhou📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文首次揭示交替磁性金属中动量依赖自旋劈裂可诱导方向选择性三重态超导配对，无需外磁场即可实现自旋-边缘锁定的Majorana边界态，为拓扑量子计算提供了新型材料平台与无场调控方案。
本文研究二维d波交替磁性金属中的自洽非传统超导。动量依赖的交替磁性自旋劈裂抑制反自旋单态配对，稳定高度各向同性的同自旋三重态序。在自旋守恒极限下，该方向性三重态配对产生近乎无色散的Majorana边界态；Rashba自旋-轨道耦合混合自旋分支，驱动系统进入混合宇称超导态，形成有色散Majorana边界态。自旋分辨边界谱揭示边界取向与自旋极化之间的特征锁定，无需外磁场即可产生自旋分辨Majorana态。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文研究二维d波交替磁性金属中的自洽非传统超导。动量依赖的交替磁性自旋劈裂抑制反自旋单态配对，稳定高度各向同性的同自旋三重态序。在自旋守恒极限下，该方向性三重态配对产生近乎无色散的Majorana边界态；Rashba自旋-轨道耦合混合自旋分支，驱动系统进入混合宇称超导态，形成有色散Majorana边界态。自旋分辨边界谱揭示边界取向与自旋极化之间的特征锁定，无需外磁场即可产生自旋分辨Majorana态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18429v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate self-consistent unconventional superconductivity in a two-dimensional d-wave altermagnetic metal. We find that momentum-dependent altermagnetic spin splitting suppresses opposite-spin singlet pairing and stabilizes highly anisotropic equal-spin triplet order. In the spin-conserving limit, this directional triplet pairing gives rise to nearly dispersionless Majorana boundary states associated with effective one-dimensional topological channels. Rashba spin-orbit coupling mixes spin sectors, activates additional pairing components, and drives the system into a mixed-parity superconducting state with dispersive Majorana boundary states. The spin-resolved boundary spectra further reveal a characteristic locking between boundary orientation and spin polarization, reflecting the underlying altermagnetic symmetry. These results identify altermagnetic spin splitting as an intrinsic mechanism for selecting unconventional pairing and generating spin-resolved Majorana boundary states without external magnetic fields.

133

局域Zhang-Rice态导致的阻挫：铜氧化物掺杂驱动磁转变的统一理论#

Frustration from Localized Zhang-Rice States: A Unified Theory of Doping-Driven Magnetic Transitions in Cuprates
📚 arXiv👤 Xiaodong Wang, Ping Xu, Jiong Mei, Shao-Hang Shi, Zi-Xiang Li, Mingpu Qin, Kun Jiang, Hui-Ke Jin📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文创新性地将掺杂空穴的局域Zhang-Rice单态作为主动媒介，而非传统理论中的被动扰动，揭示其通过诱导次近邻和第三近邻超交换作用产生磁阻挫的新机制。该统一框架突破了仅考虑近邻交换的局限，首次从微观
本文提出统一微观理论解释掺杂空穴如何破坏铜氧化物反铁磁序。掺杂空穴形成空间局域的Zhang-Rice单态，主动介导涌现自旋交换，引入次近邻J₂和第三近邻J₃超交换作用。该掺杂诱导的交换路径产生显著磁阻挫，自然解释Néel反铁磁序的快速坍塌及空穴掺杂侧自旋玻璃相的出现，为轻掺杂铜氧化物的复杂掺杂驱动磁相变和磁电子-空穴不对称性提供全面框架。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文提出统一微观理论解释掺杂空穴如何破坏铜氧化物反铁磁序。掺杂空穴形成空间局域的Zhang-Rice单态，主动介导涌现自旋交换，引入次近邻J₂和第三近邻J₃超交换作用。该掺杂诱导的交换路径产生显著磁阻挫，自然解释Néel反铁磁序的快速坍塌及空穴掺杂侧自旋玻璃相的出现，为轻掺杂铜氧化物的复杂掺杂驱动磁相变和磁电子-空穴不对称性提供全面框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18453v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The microscopic mechanism by which doped holes disrupt the antiferromagnetic order is one of the fundamental questions in cuprates. In this work, we propose a unified microscopic theory in which doped holes form spatially localized Zhang-Rice singlets which actively mediate emergent spin exchange. Rather than acting as simple non-magnetic vacancies, these localized states introduce emergent next-nearest J₂ and third-nearest J₃ neighbor superexchanges. This dopant-induced exchange pathway generates significant magnetic frustration, naturally explaining the rapid collapse of the Néel AFM order and the emergence of a spin-glass phase on the hole-doped side. Our findings provide a comprehensive framework for understanding the complex doping-driven magnetic phase transitions and magnetic electron-hole asymmetry in lightly doped cuprates.

134

双层CrSBr中软磁振子的自旋热电子学特征#

Spin-caloritronic signatures of soft magnons in bilayer CrSBr
📚 arXiv👤 Rob den Teuling, Ping Tang, Gerrit E. W. Bauer, Yaroslav M. Blanter📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文揭示双层CrSBr中三轴各向异性和偶极相互作用可导致磁振子自旋角动量在场致软化时发散，突破磁振子携带固定ℏ自旋的传统认知；该发散在热自旋Seebeck效应中形成显著峰，为反铁磁自旋热电子学器件提供
本文计算层状反铁磁体双层CrSBr的磁振子自旋角动量随外加磁场和波矢的演化。三轴各向异性和层内偶极相互作用重整化磁振子自旋角动量，在场致磁振子软化时发散。该发散在热自旋Seebeck响应中产生显著峰，为软磁振子提供清晰的自旋热电子学特征，挑战了磁振子携带固定ℏ自旋角动量的传统假设。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文计算层状反铁磁体双层CrSBr的磁振子自旋角动量随外加磁场和波矢的演化。三轴各向异性和层内偶极相互作用重整化磁振子自旋角动量，在场致磁振子软化时发散。该发散在热自旋Seebeck响应中产生显著峰，为软磁振子提供清晰的自旋热电子学特征，挑战了磁振子携带固定ℏ自旋角动量的传统假设。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18478v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Spin transport in magnetic insulators is often treated by assuming that magnons carry a fixed spin angular momentum of hbar, which does not hold in general, however. Here we calculate the magnon spin angular momentum of a layered antiferromagnet as a function of applied magnetic field and wave vector. We show that the triaxial anisotropy and intralayer dipolar interactions in bilayer CrSBr renormalize the magnon spin angular momentum, which diverges upon field-induced magnon softening. This divergence gives rise to a pronounced peak in the thermal spin Seebeck response and provides a clear spin-caloritronic signature of soft magnons.

135

图案化YIG结构中自旋波汇聚实现空间局域二次谐波产生#

Spatially-Localized Second Harmonic Generation via Spin Wave Concentration in Patterned YIG Structures
📚 arXiv👤 Stephanie R. Lake, Marc Eger, Philipp Geyer, Rouven Dreyer, Seth W. Kurfman, Georg Schmidt📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地利用光刻图案化YIG漏斗结构实现自旋波的空间汇聚与局域增强，在远离激发源区域产生高强度磁振子，并首次观测到由此诱导的空间局域二次谐波产生。该方案无需主动调控，为磁振子非线性器件与集成化磁
本文展示通过标准光刻工艺几何限制确定性局域调控色散关系，可在远离激发源数百微米甚至更远区域产生空间局域、高强度的磁振子。被动光刻图案化YIG漏斗结构中的局域强度足以通过常规磁振子散射过程在局域区域实现二次谐波产生。通过高灵敏度频率-空间分辨SNS-MOKE技术直接测量并比较1-ω和2-ω磁振子信号，证实这些效应确为非线性过程。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文展示通过标准光刻工艺几何限制确定性局域调控色散关系，可在远离激发源数百微米甚至更远区域产生空间局域、高强度的磁振子。被动光刻图案化YIG漏斗结构中的局域强度足以通过常规磁振子散射过程在局域区域实现二次谐波产生。通过高灵敏度频率-空间分辨SNS-MOKE技术直接测量并比较1-ω和2-ω磁振子信号，证实这些效应确为非线性过程。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18479v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The anisotropic dispersion and inherent nonlinearity of magnetostatic spin waves in thin films and confined structures provide unique opportunities for implementation in next-generation magnonic devices for data and signal processing. A particular challenge is to establish an effective means to locally generate higher harmonics and subsequently exploit them while avoiding extraneous nonlinear losses. Here we demonstrate that deterministically and locally tuning the dispersion relation by geometric confinement through standard patterning processes, allows the creation spatially localized, high-intensity magnons hundreds of μ m or even further from the excitation source. The local intensity obtained in passive, lithographically patterned YIG funnel structures is sufficient to achieve second harmonic generation in localized regions via conventional magnon scattering processes. We verify these effects are truly nonlinear processes by direct measurement and comparison of the 1-ømega and 2-ømega magnon signals as determined by highly sensitive frequency- and spatially-resolved SNS-MOKE technique. This lays the foundation for using similar devices in future magnon-based infrastructures to localize and enhance sensitivity of readout, downstream magnon-based logic operations, and for other higher harmonic generation-related phenomena and low-power magnonics applications.

136

交替磁性KV₂Se₂O中界面终止态保持的超高隧穿磁电阻#

Termination-Preserved Ultra-high Tunneling Magnetoresistance in Altermagnetic KV2Se2O
📚 arXiv👤 Junnan Guo, Himanshu Mavani, Wenhui Fang, Jifeng Tang, Wenhao Li, Weikang Wu, Hui Li, Evgeny Y. Tsymbal, Lishu Zhang📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统铁磁隧穿结对特定界面终止态的严苛依赖，利用d波交替磁体的压缩节点自旋简并通道与共面磁序的协同效应，首次实现所有界面终止态本征TMR均超10⁵%，并通过K终止钝化将TMR提升至10¹²%量
本文基于第一性原理计算系统研究d波交替磁性体KV₂Se₂O的隧穿结输运性质。压缩节点型自旋简并通道与共面界面磁序的协同作用使所有界面终止态的本征隧穿磁电阻(TMR)超过10⁵%。K终止通过独特钝化特性有效保持体自旋极化，实现高达10¹²%的超高TMR。研究揭示动量空间拓扑与界面钝化耦合为实现巨大磁电阻响应的可靠策略。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文基于第一性原理计算系统研究d波交替磁性体KV₂Se₂O的隧穿结输运性质。压缩节点型自旋简并通道与共面界面磁序的协同作用使所有界面终止态的本征隧穿磁电阻(TMR)超过10⁵%。K终止通过独特钝化特性有效保持体自旋极化，实现高达10¹²%的超高TMR。研究揭示动量空间拓扑与界面钝化耦合为实现巨大磁电阻响应的可靠策略。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18493v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets exhibit nonrelativistic spin splitting without net magnetization, establishing a new platform for next-generation spintronic devices. Although altermagnetic tunnel junctions (AMTJs) represent the most promising realizations, their practical applications are hindered by low tunnel magnetoresistance (TMR) ratios and strong sensitivity to interfacial configurations. Here, we systematically explore the transport properties and microscopic mechanisms of AMTJs based on the recently discovered d-wave altermagnet KV2Se2O. Using first-principles calculations and orbital-resolved analysis, we demonstrate that the synergy between compressed nodal-point like spin-degenerate channels and coplanar interfacial magnetic order yields an ultra-high intrinsic TMR above 105% for all interfacial terminations. More importantly, K-termination effectively preserves bulk spin polarization through its unique passivation characteristics, leading to an ultra-high TMR up to 1012%. These results identify the coupling between momentum-space topology and interfacial passivation provides a reliable strategy for realizing giant magnetoresistive responses in altermagnetic spintronic devices.

137

层间电子相干性关联Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐的磁性与超导性#

Interlayer electronic coherence links magnetism and superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates
📚 arXiv👤 Feiyang Liu, Lixing Chen, Enkang Zhang, Ying-Jie Zhang, Jun Zhao📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在同一镍酸盐单晶中自洽测定本征面内/面外电阻率，发现层间相干-非相干转变的普适性，并建立层间电子相干性与超导转变温度的反关联规律，为理解非常规超导机理及设计新型高温超导材料提供了关键实验判据
本文对高质量双层和三层Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐单晶进行高精度晶轴分辨直流输运测量，采用六端几何自洽确定同一晶体的本征面内和面外电阻率。研究发现两类镍酸盐均存在强本征电子各向异性，面外电阻率呈现非单调温度依赖，揭示层间输运的普遍相干-非相干转变。系列材料中压力下的最高超导转变温度与环境压力电阻率各向异性呈反相关，表明更强层间电子相干性有利于超导。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文对高质量双层和三层Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐单晶进行高精度晶轴分辨直流输运测量，采用六端几何自洽确定同一晶体的本征面内和面外电阻率。研究发现两类镍酸盐均存在强本征电子各向异性，面外电阻率呈现非单调温度依赖，揭示层间输运的普遍相干-非相干转变。系列材料中压力下的最高超导转变温度与环境压力电阻率各向异性呈反相关，表明更强层间电子相干性有利于超导。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18524v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The extent to which electronic dimensionality influences magnetism and superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) nickelates remains unsettled. Here we report high-precision crystallographic-axis-resolved dc transport measurements on high-quality single crystals of bilayer and trilayer RP nickelates. Using a six-terminal geometry, we self-consistently determine the intrinsic in-plane (h̊oₚₐᵣₐₗₗₑₗ₎ and out-of-plane (h̊o_bot) resistivities on the same crystal, while minimizing uncertainties associated with current redistribution in highly anisotropic conductors. We uncover strong intrinsic electronic anisotropy in both bilayer and trilayer nickelates, in contrast to the weak anisotropy inferred from conventional four-probe measurements. Moreover, h̊o_bot exhibits a nonmonotonic temperature dependence, revealing a universal coherent-to-incoherent crossover in interlayer transport. Across the RP nickelate series, the maximum superconducting transition temperature (T_c) observed under pressure is inversely correlated with the ambient-pressure resistivity anisotropy, suggesting that stronger interlayer electronic coherence is favorable for superconductivity. In addition, h̊o_bot serves as an exceptionally sensitive and selective probe of magnetic and density-wave orders, exhibiting pronounced anomalies, whereas only weak signatures are observed in h̊oₚₐᵣₐₗₗₑₗ. Our results highlight interlayer coherence as a key organizing parameter that both tracks the relevant magnetic correlations and is closely tied to superconductivity, providing stringent constraints on microscopic theories of high-T_c superconductivity in nickelates.

138

Cu富集调控缺陷增强极性半导体Cu₁₊ₓMn₁₋ᵧSiTe₃的多功能性质#

Defect Control via Cu Enrichment Enhances Multifunctional Properties in the Polar Semiconductor Cu1+xMn1-ySiTe3
📚 arXiv👤 Subrata Ghosh, Yu Liu, Saugata Sarker, Boyang Zheng, Sreekant Anil, Soumi Mondal, Yuxi Zhang, Sai Venkata Gayathri Ayyagari, Mingyu Xu, Yingdong Guan, Tsung-Han Yang, Xiaoping Wang, Vincent H. Crespi, Nasim Alem, Weiwei Xie, Venkatraman Gopalan, Qiang Zhang, Zhiqiang Mao📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：通过Cu富集策略精准调控缺陷工程，在极性半导体中实现堆垛层错近乎消除与非中心对称结构稳定化，同步增强二阶非线性光学响应与磁有序性，为缺陷-性能耦合机制研究及多功能自旋电子学材料设计提供新范式。
本文证明增加Cu含量可显著减少Cu₁₋ₓMn₁₊ᵧSiTe₃中的高密度堆垛层错缺陷。Cu富集样品Cu₁₊ₓMn₁₋ᵧSiTe₃结晶于非中心对称单斜结构(Pm)，因间隙位出现而近乎无堆垛层错，二次谐波产生响应显著增强。磁性上，Cu富集晶体保持长程反铁磁序，Néel温度约33 K，无玻璃态，但呈现特征自旋翻转转变，表明缺陷控制对极性半导体多功能性质的关键作用。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文证明增加Cu含量可显著减少Cu₁₋ₓMn₁₊ᵧSiTe₃中的高密度堆垛层错缺陷。Cu富集样品Cu₁₊ₓMn₁₋ᵧSiTe₃结晶于非中心对称单斜结构(Pm)，因间隙位出现而近乎无堆垛层错，二次谐波产生响应显著增强。磁性上，Cu富集晶体保持长程反铁磁序，Néel温度约33 K，无玻璃态，但呈现特征自旋翻转转变，表明缺陷控制对极性半导体多功能性质的关键作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18584v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Polar materials have recently attracted significant interest due to their rich multifunctional properties. The chalcogenide polar semiconductor Cu1-xMn1+ySiTe3 (Cu-deficient) is an emerging multiferroic system in which electric polarization is coupled to magnetization. However, its macroscopic ferroelectric polarization is strongly suppressed due to the presence of a high density of stacking faults. In this work, we demonstrate that these crystal defects, likely originating from non-stoichiometry, can be substantially reduced by increasing the Cu content. Cu-enriched samples, Cu1+xMn1-ySiTe3, crystallize in a noncentrosymmetric monoclinic structure (space group Pm) as the Cu-deficient counterpart but show a nearly stacking-fault-free phase, which is attributed to the emergence of an interstitial site. Consequently, the Cu-enriched samples show a pronounced enhancement of the second-harmonic generation (SHG) response compared to Cu-deficient compositions. Magnetically, the Cu-enriched crystals retain long-range antiferromagnetic order with a Neel temperature of TN ~ 33 K without a glassy state but manifest a distinct spin-flop transition along the polar b-axis that is absent in the Cu-deficient compositions. Furthermore, the electronic ground state evolves from insulating to doped semiconducting behavior upon Cu enrichment. Together, these results establish this material system as a unique and versatile platform for elucidating the interplay among composition, crystal defects, and multifunctional properties, offering a route to design magnetic polar systems with tunable quantum functionalities.

139

隧穿铁磁Josephson结中的相位动力学与耗散#

Phase dynamics and dissipation in tunnel ferromagnetic Josephson junctions
📚 arXiv👤 F. Calloni, R. Satariano, R. Ferraiuolo, H. G. Ahmad, D. Gatta, E. Raja, G. Santo, G. Serpico, R. Vydyasagar, D. Montemurro, N. Poccia, A. Vettoliere, G. Ausanio, C. Granata, L. Parlato, G. P. Pepe, A. Bruno, F. Tafuri, D. Massarotti📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作系统验证了隧穿铁磁Josephson结的相位动力学理论模型，核心创新在于实现输运参数与逃逸动力学的独立交叉验证，并首次在亚微米Al基器件中观测到量子相位扩散特征。其意义在于为铁磁Josephso
本文研究基于超导体-绝缘体-薄超导体-铁磁体-超导体多层结构的隧穿铁磁Josephson结电动力学性质，对比Nb和Al电极、不同铁磁插层材料及微米至亚微米尺度器件。电流-电压特性拟合参数与开关电流分布测量独立估计值一致。亚微米Al基器件表现出与先进transmon量子比特可比的电动力学性质，并显示量子相位扩散的清晰特征。输运模型与逃逸动力学的强一致性为混合铁磁Josephson结在超导量子和经典数字电路中的集成潜力提供支撑。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文研究基于超导体-绝缘体-薄超导体-铁磁体-超导体多层结构的隧穿铁磁Josephson结电动力学性质，对比Nb和Al电极、不同铁磁插层材料及微米至亚微米尺度器件。电流-电压特性拟合参数与开关电流分布测量独立估计值一致。亚微米Al基器件表现出与先进transmon量子比特可比的电动力学性质，并显示量子相位扩散的清晰特征。输运模型与逃逸动力学的强一致性为混合铁磁Josephson结在超导量子和经典数字电路中的集成潜力提供支撑。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18586v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate tunnel ferromagnetic Josephson junctions based on Superconductor-Insulator-thin superconductor-Ferromagnet-Superconductor multilayers. A comparative study of their electrodynamic properties is performed for junctions with niobium and aluminum (Al) electrodes, featuring different ferromagnetic interlayer materials and lateral dimensions ranging from the micrometric to the submicrometric scale. The parameters extracted from the fitting of the current-voltage characteristics using the tunnel junction microscopic model are found to be consistent with those independently estimated from switching current distribution measurements. Submicrometric Al-based devices exhibit electrodynamic properties comparable to those implemented in state-of-the-art transmon qubits and display clear signatures of quantum phase diffusion. The strong agreement between transport modelling and escape dynamics establishes a robust framework for describing hybrid ferromagnetic Josephson junctions consistent with their energy scales and supports their potential integration into superconducting quantum and classical digital circuits.

140

飞秒光脉冲诱导亚100飞秒退磁的电子机制#

Electronic mechanism of sub-100-fs demagnetization induced by a femtosecond light pulse
📚 arXiv👤 Konrad J. Kapcia, Victor Tkachenko, Flavio Capotondi, Alexander Lichtenstein, Serguei Molodtsov, Przemysław Piekarz, Beata Ziaja📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作揭示超快退磁的纯电子机制：光激发电子在磁敏感能带内的超快重分布主导亚100飞秒退磁，无需声子或交换作用参与。此发现突破了传统磁动力学认知，为全光调控磁化、发展太赫兹磁存储与超快磁开关器件提供理论
该理论工作研究了单磁畴在几飞秒至几十飞秒、光子能量覆盖光学到X射线范围的光脉冲激发下，强非平衡条件下的退磁过程。预测所有情况下均可在亚100飞秒时间尺度内发生磁化损失，主要源于电子系统激发及随后在磁敏感能带内的电子重分布；该时间尺度过短，声子介导过程或格点间海森堡交换过程尚未显著贡献。研究为辐射驱动亚100飞秒磁化调控及其在磁存储与超快磁开关中的应用奠定基础。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该理论工作研究了单磁畴在几飞秒至几十飞秒、光子能量覆盖光学到X射线范围的光脉冲激发下，强非平衡条件下的退磁过程。预测所有情况下均可在亚100飞秒时间尺度内发生磁化损失，主要源于电子系统激发及随后在磁敏感能带内的电子重分布；该时间尺度过短，声子介导过程或格点间海森堡交换过程尚未显著贡献。研究为辐射驱动亚100飞秒磁化调控及其在磁存储与超快磁开关中的应用奠定基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.18638v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A quantitative understanding of the processes that trigger light-induced demagnetization on ultrashort timescales is crucial for achieving an ultrafast, radiation-controlled magnetic response in materials. This milestone is essential for developing next-generation magnetic storage devices and ultrafast magnetic switches. In this theoretical study, we investigated demagnetization triggered in a single magnetic domain by light pulses ranging from a few to a few tens of femtoseconds in duration, with photon energies spanning the optical and X-ray regimes, under strongly non-equilibrium conditions. We predicted a loss of magnetization in the sub-100-fs range in all cases, primarily due to the excitation of the electronic system and the subsequent redistribution of electrons within the magneto-sensitive band. The considered timescales were too short for phonon-mediated processes or inter-site Heisenberg exchange processes to contribute significantly. These findings pave the way for highly accurate, radiation-driven magnetization control in magnetic materials at sub-100-femtosecond timescales with potential practical applications.

141

整数自旋Heisenberg-Kitaev模型中的手征玻色量子自旋液体#

Chiral bosonic quantum spin liquid in the integer-spin Heisenberg-Kitaev model
📚 arXiv👤 Arnaud Ralko, Jaime Merino📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将Schwinger玻色平均场理论拓展至含单重态-三重态混合配对的整数自旋体系，解决了Kitaev模型中玻色量子自旋液体的理论空白。通过多方法交叉验证识别出手征量子自旋液体态，揭示其可稳
该工作针对蜂窝格点上整数自旋S Heisenberg-Kitaev模型中寻找玻色量子自旋液体的可能性，推导了同时包含单重态与三重态配对通道的Schwinger玻色平均场理论。混合构造与S≤3/2的精确对角化能量及大S极限Luttinger-Tisza半经典能量良好吻合。在Kitaev点附近发现多种竞争的有隙量子自旋液体，通过与精确对角化动力学结构因子比较，识别出手征量子自旋液体态，其自旋激发谱与精确数据高度一致，可存活至大自旋S≲2，…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对蜂窝格点上整数自旋S Heisenberg-Kitaev模型中寻找玻色量子自旋液体的可能性，推导了同时包含单重态与三重态配对通道的Schwinger玻色平均场理论。混合构造与S≤3/2的精确对角化能量及大S极限Luttinger-Tisza半经典能量良好吻合。在Kitaev点附近发现多种竞争的有隙量子自旋液体，通过与精确对角化动力学结构因子比较，识别出手征量子自旋液体态，其自旋激发谱与精确数据高度一致，可存活至大自旋S≲2，提出其为整数自旋反铁磁Kitaev模型的候选量子自旋液体。

English Abstract

arXiv:2405.10731v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Motivated by the possibility of finding a bosonic quantum spin liquid in the integer spin-S Heisenberg-Kitaev model on the honeycomb lattice, we derive a Schwinger boson mean field theory involving both singlet and triplet pairing channels which includes hopping and pairing operators on equal footing. The mixed construction introduced here is justified by the good comparison with exact diagonalization energies of the S łeq 3/2 Heisenberg-Kitaev model and the perfect match with the Luttinger-Tisza semiclassical energies obtained at large-S. We find various competing gapped quantum spin liquids close to the Kitaev point. A comparison of their spin excitation spectrum with the dynamical structure factor obtained from exact diagonalizations allows us to identify the physical spin liquid it Ansatz of the model. In particular, we identify a chiral quantum spin liquid state whose spin excitation spectrum follows closely the exact diagonalization data and survives up to large spin S łesssim 2. We propose this state as a promising quantum spin liquid candidate for the integer spin-S antiferromagnetic Kitaev model which may be realized in S=1 Kitaev materials A₃Ni₂XO₆ and KNiAsO₄.

142

UTe₂中超过40 T超导起始处的增强磁涨落#

Boosted magnetic fluctuations at the onset of superconductivity in UTe₂ beyond 40 T
📚 arXiv👤 T. Thebault, K. Somesh, G. Lapertot, M. Nardone, A. Zitouni, M. Barragan, J. Béard, J. Billette, F. Lecouturier, S. Tardieu, D. Aoki, G. Knebel, D. Braithwaite, W. Knafo📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示UTe₂在变磁转变附近存在强烈的磁涨落各向异性，其峰值方向与磁场诱导超导稳定化区域精确重合，为理解重费米子体系中量子临界磁涨落驱动非常规超导的机制提供了关键实验证据，突破了传统BCS理论
该工作对重费米子化合物UTe₂进行脉冲磁场下达60 T、电流平行a轴且磁场在(b,c)面内旋转的电阻率测量。发现变磁转变处Fermi液体系数A的最大值在磁场从b向c倾斜30-40°时增强，该增强与超过变磁场μ₀H≳40 T的极化顺磁区中超导稳定化重合。这是增强的量子临界磁涨落模式参与该超导相机制的标志，呼吁建立磁场诱导超导与量子临界磁性质之间相互作用的理论描述。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对重费米子化合物UTe₂进行脉冲磁场下达60 T、电流平行a轴且磁场在(b,c)面内旋转的电阻率测量。发现变磁转变处Fermi液体系数A的最大值在磁场从b向c倾斜30-40°时增强，该增强与超过变磁场μ₀H≳40 T的极化顺磁区中超导稳定化重合。这是增强的量子临界磁涨落模式参与该超导相机制的标志，呼吁建立磁场诱导超导与量子临界磁性质之间相互作用的理论描述。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.09351v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Several unconventional superconducting phases have been discovered close to a metamagnetic transition in the heavy-fermion compound UTe₂. Although suspected to be of magnetic nature, the mechanisms stabilizing these superconducting phases remain mysterious. Here, we present electrical-resistivity measurements on UTe₂, with a current Iparallela and under pulsed magnetic fields up to 60~T rotating in the (b,c) plane. We find that the maximum of the Fermi-liquid coefficient A at the metamagnetic transition is enhanced under magnetic fields tilted by 30-40~ⁱ̧rc from b to c. The enhancement of A coincides with the stabilization of superconductivity in the polarized paramagnetic regime beyond the metamagnetic field μ₀Hₘgtrsim40~T. It is the signature of a boosted quantum-critical magnetic-fluctuation mode probably in play for the mechanism of this superconducting phase. This result appeals for descriptions of the interplay between magnetic-field-induced superconductivity and quantum critical magnetic properties.

143

微波场对磁斯格明子的超快操控#

Ultrafast manipulation of magnetic skyrmions by microwave fields
📚 arXiv👤 Xingdi Wang, Haiming Dong, Kai Chang📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次将逆Faraday效应与斯格明子惯性质量纳入统一理论框架，发现微波螺旋度可调控斯格明子吸引/排斥及轨道手性，为超快、低能耗拓扑磁存储与逻辑器件提供了全新操控范式。
该工作理论研究了圆偏振微波诱导逆Faraday效应驱动的磁斯格明子惯性动力学。通过在Thiele方程中引入惯性质量项并解析推导微波诱导磁场与力，展示了连续波与脉冲激发下截然不同的动力学区域。斯格明子惯性将连续驱动下的轨迹从光滑螺旋定性转变为多边形轨道，并实现脉冲后持续回旋以揭示系统本征弛豫动力学。轨迹手性由拓扑荷与圆偏振微波螺旋度共同决定：左旋圆偏振吸引斯格明子至束中心，右旋圆偏振排斥之。系统分析了Gilbert阻尼、微波强度频率及斯…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作理论研究了圆偏振微波诱导逆Faraday效应驱动的磁斯格明子惯性动力学。通过在Thiele方程中引入惯性质量项并解析推导微波诱导磁场与力，展示了连续波与脉冲激发下截然不同的动力学区域。斯格明子惯性将连续驱动下的轨迹从光滑螺旋定性转变为多边形轨道，并实现脉冲后持续回旋以揭示系统本征弛豫动力学。轨迹手性由拓扑荷与圆偏振微波螺旋度共同决定：左旋圆偏振吸引斯格明子至束中心，右旋圆偏振排斥之。系统分析了Gilbert阻尼、微波强度频率及斯格明子质量对振荡与过阻尼动力学相之间转变的控制作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.03550v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We theoretically investigate the inertial dynamics of magnetic skyrmions driven by circularly polarized microwave-induced inverse Faraday effect (MIFE). By incorporating an inertial mass term into the Thiele equation and analytically deriving the microwave-induced magnetic fields and forces, we demonstrate fundamentally distinct dynamical regimes under continuous-wave (CW) versus pulsed excitation. Skyrmion inertia qualitatively transforms trajectories from smooth spirals to polygonal orbits under continuous driving, while enabling sustained post-pulse gyration that reveals the system's intrinsic relaxation dynamics. The handedness of the trajectory is determined by the topological charge and circularly polarized microwave (CPM) helicity: a left-circularly polarized (LCP) CPM attracts skyrmions toward the beam center, while a right-circularly polarized (RCP) CPM repels them. Systematic parameter analysis reveals how Gilbert damping, the intensity and frequency of CPM, and skyrmion mass control the transition between oscillatory and overdamped dynamical phases. Our work identifies inertia, topological charge, and CPM helicity as essential factors in ultrafast skyrmion manipulation and proposes a novel method for designing topological spin textures.

144

二维磁体中双半子与反双半子的寿命#

Lifetime of bimerons and antibimerons in two-dimensional magnets
📚 arXiv👤 Moritz A. Goerzen, Tim Drevelow, Soumyajyoti Haldar, Hendrik Schrautzer, Stefan Heinze, Dongzhe Li📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地在零磁场下实现双半子-反双半子简并共存，克服传统斯格明子需外场的瓶颈；揭示易面磁体中双半子具有更强非线性相互作用特性，为低能耗神经形态计算器件设计提供新物理载体与材料平台。
该工作基于第一性原理计算和过渡态理论，预测在范德瓦尔斯异质结构Fe₃GeTe₂/Cr₂Ge₂Te₆中，零磁场下可共存简并的双半子与反双半子。研究表明，与斯格明子相比，易面磁体中的双半子具有更强的非线性相互作用能力，在神经形态计算等应用中更具优势。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作基于第一性原理计算和过渡态理论，预测在范德瓦尔斯异质结构Fe₃GeTe₂/Cr₂Ge₂Te₆中，零磁场下可共存简并的双半子与反双半子。研究表明，与斯格明子相比，易面磁体中的双半子具有更强的非线性相互作用能力，在神经形态计算等应用中更具优势。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.09344v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Soliton-based computing architectures have recently emerged as a promising avenue to overcome fundamental limitations of conventional information technologies, the von Neumann bottleneck. In this context, magnetic skyrmions have been widely considered for in-situ processing devices due to their mobility and enhanced lifetime in materials with broken inversion symmetry. However, modern applications in non-volatile reservoir or neuromorphic computing raise the additional demand for non-linear inter-soliton interactions. Here, we report that solitons in easy-plane magnets, such as bimerons and antibimerons, show greater versatility and potential for non-linear interactions than skyrmions and antiskyrmions, making them superior candidates for this class of applications. Using first-principles and transition state theory, we predict the coexistence of degenerate bimerons and antibimerons at zero field in a van der Waals heterostructure Fe₃GeTe₂/Cr₂Ge₂Te₆ -- an experimentally feasible system. We demonstrate that, owing to their distinct structural symmetry, bimerons exhibit fundamentally different behavior from skyrmions and cannot be regarded as their in-plane counterparts, as is often assumed. This distinction leads to unique properties of bimerons and antibimerons, which arise from the unbroken rotational symmetry in easy-plane magnets. These range from anisotropic soliton-soliton interactions to strong entropic effects on their lifetime, driven by the non-local nature of thermal excitations. Our findings reveal a broader richness of solitons in easy-plane magnets and underline their unique potential for spintronic devices.

145

热力学中的递归熵：阐释zentropy方法的统计物理基础#

Recursive entropy in thermodynamics: expounding the statistical-physics basis of the zentropy approach
📚 arXiv👤 Luke Allen Myers, Nigel Lee En Hew, Shun-Li Shang, Zi-Kui Liu📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文从统计物理根基重构zentropy理论，核心创新在于揭示熵的递归结构可导出最优粗粒化方案，并将"温度依赖态"赋予严格的热力学位形诠释。该工作为复杂系统（磁体、液体等）的多尺度热力学建模提供了自洽的
该工作建立了zentropy方法的统计物理基础，证明熵的递归性质允许对热力学系统进行最优粗粒化分组，并通过最大化递归形式的熵导出亥姆霍兹自由能与配分函数。研究澄清了"依赖温度的态"作为粗粒化位形的热力学含义，并以磁性材料和液体为例展示了该方法的应用。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作建立了zentropy方法的统计物理基础，证明熵的递归性质允许对热力学系统进行最优粗粒化分组，并通过最大化递归形式的熵导出亥姆霍兹自由能与配分函数。研究澄清了"依赖温度的态"作为粗粒化位形的热力学含义，并以磁性材料和液体为例展示了该方法的应用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.04950v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The recursive property of entropy is well known in information theory; however, the concept is underutilized in thermodynamics, despite being the field where the concept of entropy originated. The zentropy approach is built on this idea, and it has emerged as a useful framework for describing thermodynamic systems across multiple scales, yet its statistical-physics foundation has not been fully articulated. In this work, we establish that foundation by showing that the recursive property allows us to coarse-grain thermodynamic systems into the most useful groups, and deriving the Helmholtz energy and partition function by maximizing entropy in its recursive form. This derivation clarifies the thermodynamic meaning of so-called "states that depend on temperature" as coarse-grained configurations, and maintains a clear distinction between the physical and statistical aspects of statistical mechanics. We then illustrate the usefulness of the approach through two representative applications: magnetic materials, where configurations are defined by spin arrangements, and liquids, where configurations are defined by nearest-neighbor environments. In both cases, the framework enables physically meaningful coarse-graining and captures emergent behavior arising from probability redistribution among configurations. These results position zentropy as an exact and flexible multiscale framework for thermodynamics and statistical mechanics, particularly for systems that admit a natural hierarchical grouping of states.

146

受挫蜂窝铁磁体中基于施温格玻色子的无序致有序#

Order-by-disorder from Schwinger bosons in a frustrated honeycomb ferromagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Arnaud Ralko, Jaime Merino📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将广义施温格玻色子平均场理论拓展至受挫蜂窝磁体，揭示量子涨落通过"无序致有序"机制在窄参数窗口稳定双之字形相，突破了经典磁有序图像；理论预言的磁激发谱为理解BaCo₂(AsO₄)₂的非弹
该工作采用广义施温格玻色子平均场理论结合精确对角化，研究蜂窝磁体BaCo₂(AsO₄)₂中的双之字形磁有序。研究在J₁-J₃海森堡模型窄参数范围内证明了量子涨落通过无序致有序机制稳定双之字形相，与DMRG结果一致，并表征了相关的磁激发谱以解释非弹性中子散射实验。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用广义施温格玻色子平均场理论结合精确对角化，研究蜂窝磁体BaCo₂(AsO₄)₂中的双之字形磁有序。研究在J₁-J₃海森堡模型窄参数范围内证明了量子涨落通过无序致有序机制稳定双之字形相，与DMRG结果一致，并表征了相关的磁激发谱以解释非弹性中子散射实验。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.16429v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The cobalt-based honeycomb magnet BaCo₂₍AsO₄₎₂ (BCAO) has recently emerged as a promising platform for frustrated magnetism beyond conventional paradigms. Neutron-scattering experiments and first-principles calculations have revealed an unexpected double-zigzag (dZZ) magnetically ordered ground state, whose microscopic origin remains under active debate. Here, we revisit this problem within a ferro--antiferromagnetic J₁₋₋J₃ Heisenberg model on the honeycomb lattice using a generalized Schwinger-boson mean-field theory (gSBMFT) that treats ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic interactions on equal footing. This approach, combined with exact diagonalization (ED), allows us to demonstrate the emergence of the dZZ phase in a narrow parameter range, stabilized by quantum fluctuations through an order-by-disorder mechanism, in good agreement with recent density-matrix renormalization-group (DMRG) results. We further characterize the associated magnetic excitations and discuss their relevance to recent inelastic neutron-scattering (INS) measurements on BCAO.

147

利用记忆效应突破玻尔兹曼暴政的二维正则方法#

2D Canonical Approach for Beating the Boltzmann Tyranny Using Memory
📚 arXiv👤 Rafael Schio Wengenroth Silva, Soumen Pradhan, Fabian Hartmann, Leonardo K. Castelano, Ovidiu Lipan, Sven Höfling, Victor Lopez-Richard📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该理论首次将电荷捕获记忆效应纳入量子输运框架，通过动态重整化导带边实现亚热离子开关，为后摩尔时代超低功耗晶体管提供了超越玻尔兹曼极限的普适设计范式。
该工作建立普适理论框架，证明纳米场效应晶体管中的本征记忆效应可自然突破室温下60 mV/decade的亚阈值极限（玻尔兹曼暴政）。在Landauer-Büttiker量子输运形式体系中引入电荷捕获机制，动态重整化导带边。亚阈值摆幅的解析表达式明确将记忆动力学与栅极效率关联，揭示降低的载流子产生率或增强的捕获活动可导致亚热开关，打破玻尔兹曼势垒。模型捕捉关键实验特征并提供可推广的设计原则。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作建立普适理论框架，证明纳米场效应晶体管中的本征记忆效应可自然突破室温下60 mV/decade的亚阈值极限（玻尔兹曼暴政）。在Landauer-Büttiker量子输运形式体系中引入电荷捕获机制，动态重整化导带边。亚阈值摆幅的解析表达式明确将记忆动力学与栅极效率关联，揭示降低的载流子产生率或增强的捕获活动可导致亚热开关，打破玻尔兹曼势垒。模型捕捉关键实验特征并提供可推广的设计原则。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.24883v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The 60 mV/decade subthreshold limit at room temperature, coined as the Boltzmann tyranny, remains a fundamental obstacle to the continued down-scaling of conventional transistors. While several strategies have sought to overcome this constraint through non-thermal carrier injection, most rely on ferroelectric-based or otherwise material-specific mechanisms that require complex fabrication and stability control. Here, we develop a universal theoretical framework showing that intrinsic memory effects in nanometric field-effect transistors can naturally bypass this limit. Within the Landauer-Büttiker quantum transport formalism, we incorporate charge-trapping mechanisms that dynamically renormalize the conduction band edge. The resulting analytical expression for the subthreshold swing explicitly links memory dynamics to gate efficiency, revealing that a reduced carrier generation rate or enhanced trapping activity leads to sub-thermal switching, thus breaking the Boltzmann barrier. The model captures key experimental features and provides clear, generalizable design principles, establishing memory-assisted transistors as a robust pathway toward ultra-low-power and multifunctional electronic architectures.

148

双层ScI₂中层堆垛依赖的磁有序#

Stacking-dependent magnetic ordering in bilayer ScI₂
📚 arXiv👤 Soumyajit Sarkar, Soham Chandra📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示双层ScI₂中层间磁耦合对堆垛构型的极端敏感性：AA/BA呈铁磁耦合而AB呈反铁磁耦合，这种"堆垛开关"效应为二维磁性的人工调控提供新范式。结合强垂直磁各向异性和有限温度磁序，该材料有望
该工作结合第一性原理和有限温度研究，探讨双层ScI₂在不同堆垛构型（AA、AB、BA）下的磁有序。DFT+U计算表明体系具有自旋极化基态，层内铁磁交换强且对堆垛不敏感，而层间交换强烈依赖堆垛几何：AA和BA为铁磁耦合，AB为反铁磁耦合。自旋-轨道耦合显示体系具有稳健的垂直磁各向异性，蒙特卡洛模拟预测所有双层构型均具有有限温度磁序。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合第一性原理和有限温度研究，探讨双层ScI₂在不同堆垛构型（AA、AB、BA）下的磁有序。DFT+U计算表明体系具有自旋极化基态，层内铁磁交换强且对堆垛不敏感，而层间交换强烈依赖堆垛几何：AA和BA为铁磁耦合，AB为反铁磁耦合。自旋-轨道耦合显示体系具有稳健的垂直磁各向异性，蒙特卡洛模拟预测所有双层构型均具有有限温度磁序。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.11781v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Stacking-dependent magnetism in two-dimensional van der Waals materials offers an effective route for controlling magnetic order without chemical modification. Here, we present a combined first-principles and finite-temperature study of magnetic ordering in bilayer ScI₂ with different stacking configurations. Using density functional theory with Hubbard-U corrections, we investigate the structural, electronic, and magnetic properties of monolayer and bilayer ScI₂ in AA, AB, and BA stackings. The electronic structure exhibits a spin-polarized ground state dominated by Sc-d states near the Fermi level. Mapping total energies onto an effective Heisenberg spin Hamiltonian reveals strong intralayer ferromagnetic exchange that is largely insensitive to stacking, while the interlayer exchange depends strongly on stacking geometry, favoring ferromagnetic coupling for AA and BA stackings and antiferromagnetic coupling for the AB stacking. Spin--orbit coupling calculations show that both monolayer and bilayer ScI₂ possess a robust out-of-plane magnetic easy axis. Finite-temperature Monte Carlo simulations indicate that all bilayer configurations sustain magnetic ordering at and above room temperature, with ordering temperatures in the range 360--375~K, as confirmed by Binder cumulant analysis and finite-size scaling. These results demonstrate that stacking geometry enables control of the magnetic ground state in bilayer ScI₂ without significantly affecting its thermal stability.

149

GdTiO₃/EuTiO₃极性-磁性界面处的巨非互易电导#

Gigantic Nonreciprocal Conduction at a Polar-Magnetic Interface of GdTiO₃/EuTiO₃
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 N. Takahara, K. S. Takahashi, N. Nagaosa, Y. Tokura, and M. Kawasaki📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在GdTiO₃/EuTiO₃异质界面处利用结构反演对称性破缺与磁性耦合，实现了体相材料中罕见的巨非互易电导效应。其核心创新在于将极性场与磁性有序协同调控，为低功耗量子电子器件及自旋-轨道耦合非互
本研究在GdTiO₃/EuTiO₃氧化物异质结构中，利用界面破缺反演对称性实现了巨大的非互易电导效应。该极性-磁性界面展现出与体相材料截然不同的新奇输运现象，为探索界面量子态及自旋-轨道耦合驱动的非互易电子学提供了理想平台。

非磁性烧绿石铌酸盐中的线性四聚体形成#

Linear Tetramer Formation in Nonmagnetic Pyrochlore Niobate
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 Shota Nishida, Shunsuke Kitou, Shingo Toyoda, Yuiga Nakamura, Yusuke Tokunaga, and Taka-hisa Arima📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文突破传统认知，在含S=1/2离子的烧绿石体系中首次观测到非磁性基态，揭示线性四聚体结构通过晶格畸变实现自旋单态形成的微观机制，为几何阻挫材料中电荷-自旋-晶格耦合竞争提供了关键实验证据，对量子自旋
该工作研究烧绿石结构Y₂Nb₂O₇中的位移型短程有序，该材料虽含有形式价态为Nb⁴⁺(S=1/2)的离子，却呈现非磁性绝缘态。作者利用同步辐射X射线衍射揭示了Nb⁴⁺离子在烧绿石格点上形成线性四聚体的结构机制，为理解几何阻挫体系中自旋猝灭与电荷有序的竞争提供了实验依据。

CrSBr双层中的声驱动磁振子#

Acoustically-driven magnons in CrSBr bilayers
📚 arXiv👤 A. Shubnic, I. Chestnov, I. Lobanov, V. Uzdin, I. Iorsh, I. A. Shelykh📅 2026-05-19⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示了CrSBr双层中层间交换耦合对应变的异常敏感性这一独特物理机制，突破了传统磁振子激发需依赖微波或自旋极化电流的局限，开创了声学手段高效驱动磁振子的新范式；磁场可调谐性为低能耗、可重构的自旋
该工作研究了环境稳定二维磁性材料CrSBr双层中自旋激发与声波的耦合，发现层间交换耦合对应变的强依赖性使得声波可共振产生磁振子。研究表明共振频率等产生参数可通过外磁场调控，使CrSBr成为自旋电子学应用的有前景平台。
阅读原文 ↗

中文摘要

该工作研究了环境稳定二维磁性材料CrSBr双层中自旋激发与声波的耦合，发现层间交换耦合对应变的强依赖性使得声波可共振产生磁振子。研究表明共振频率等产生参数可通过外磁场调控，使CrSBr成为自旋电子学应用的有前景平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.12866v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We study the coupling between spin excitations and acoustic waves in bilayers of CrSBr, an ambiently stable 2D magnetic material. We demonstrate that a strong dependence of inter-layer exchange coupling on strain makes possible the resonant generation of magnons by an acoustic wave. It is shown that the parameters of the generation, in particular the resonant frequency, can be tuned by an external magnetic field, which makes CrSBr a promising platform for spintronics applications.
