We combine a generic coding agent (Google's AntiGravity) with an LLM-driven tree search algorithm (Empirical Research Assistance / ERA) to autonomously generate high-efficiency three-dimensional photovoltaic (3DPV) structures that overcome losses limiting flat solar panels at mid-latitudes. These structures operate by presenting favorable angles to the sun throughout the day, and for illustrative purposes we focus on optimizing performance for a single solar day. Our workflow begins by using AntiGravity to reproduce calculations i̧tebernardi2012solar showing that 3DPV can have energy densities much higher than stationary flat PV panels. We use these initial designs as the starting point for large scale tree search, where we seek improved solutions and score them for their diurnal yield. The initial tree search leads to nominally more efficient solutions, yet they are caused by algorithmic reward hacking, arising from non-physical design features such as structurally levitating disconnected tiers and exploitations of the discretizations in the optics solver. To counteract this, we develop a workflow where the coding agent iteratively patches the physics engine with constraints to eliminate reward hacking. With reward-hacking eliminated, ERA discovers a series of designs with various constraints and improved performance, including optimal designs with different fixed collector areas, optimizing zenith tracking and avoiding self shadowing. Combining coding agents with tree search (ERA) provides a powerful platform for scientific discovery, for problems whose solutions can be empirically evaluated with a score function.

174

基于代理式AI的加州内华达山脉流域季节性径流概率预报#

Probabilistic Seasonal Streamflow Forecasting Across California's Sierra Nevada Watersheds with Agentic AI
📚 arXiv👤 Ignacio Lopez-Gomez, Michael P. Brenner, Tapio Schneider📅 2026-05-18🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文创新性地将大语言模型驱动的AI代理与蒙特卡洛树搜索代码变异系统相结合，构建自主化水文模型开发工作流。该框架突破传统统计预报对历史数据的依赖，通过自动发现数据集、融合领域知识与优化模型架构，显著加速
针对加州内华达山脉水文气候变化削弱历史统计预报技能的问题，作者展示了由大语言模型驱动的代理式AI助手与自动代码变异系统协同工作流，可加速季节性径流预报系统的开发。AI代理负责发现数据集、综合领域知识与探索模型架构，代码变异系统则通过蒙特卡洛树搜索在代码空间中优化解。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对加州内华达山脉水文气候变化削弱历史统计预报技能的问题，作者展示了由大语言模型驱动的代理式AI助手与自动代码变异系统协同工作流，可加速季节性径流预报系统的开发。AI代理负责发现数据集、综合领域知识与探索模型架构，代码变异系统则通过蒙特卡洛树搜索在代码空间中优化解。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16178v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate seasonal runoff forecasts are critical for managing California's reservoirs and water supply for millions of its residents. Winter snow accumulation provides a strong source of predictability of snowmelt-based runoff in the spring and summer months, but progressive hydroclimatic changes in the Sierra Nevada are altering its timing and volume. These changes reduce the skill of statistical forecasts trained on historical data, highlighting the need for improved forecasting systems that can capture the changing dynamics of snowmelt. Here we demonstrate that a collaborative workflow between an agentic AI assistant and an automated code-mutation system, both powered by large language models, can accelerate the development of competitive seasonal runoff forecasting systems. In our framework, the AI agent discovers relevant datasets, synthesizes domain knowledge from prior forecasting competitions and the scientific literature, and explores the space of model architectures, while the code-mutation system refines each of the solutions explored by the agent through Monte Carlo Tree Search over the code space. The resulting system forecasts monthly Full Natural Flow (FNF) at 1- to 6-month lead times across 23 Sierra Nevada watersheds using an adaptive ensemble of three XGBoost quantile regression sub-models with physics-informed feature engineering. Evaluated against California's operational Bulletin 120 forecasts over 2021-2025, the agent-evolved model achieves superior skill for early-season cumulative April-July runoff predictions, reducing watershed-averaged quantile forecast error by up to 29%, and offering a new paradigm for AI-driven scientific model development in the geosciences.

175

基于最优控制的类Transformer推理#

Transformer-like Inference from Optimal Control
📚 arXiv👤 Aditya Kudre, Heng-Sheng Chang, Prashant G. Mehta📅 2026-05-18🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究从最优控制第一性原理重构Transformer推理，将仅解码器架构的层操作解释为控制问题的必然解，提出对偶滤波器作为显式推理算法；其意义在于架起了深度学习与经典控制理论的桥梁，为理解Transf
本文从第一性原理推导求解条件概率预测问题的推理架构，将仅解码器Transformer的层操作恢复为最优控制理论的必然结果。框架涵盖两类模型：受Transformer直接启发的离散值过程非线性模型，以及作为可解基线的线性高斯模型。预测目标被重构为最优控制问题，其解产生显式推理算法——对偶滤波器，其层结构镜像仅解码器Transformer的层结构。数值实验揭示嵌入维度不足时，Transformer会隐式利用非马尔可夫结构。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文从第一性原理推导求解条件概率预测问题的推理架构，将仅解码器Transformer的层操作恢复为最优控制理论的必然结果。框架涵盖两类模型：受Transformer直接启发的离散值过程非线性模型，以及作为可解基线的线性高斯模型。预测目标被重构为最优控制问题，其解产生显式推理算法——对偶滤波器，其层结构镜像仅解码器Transformer的层结构。数值实验揭示嵌入维度不足时，Transformer会隐式利用非马尔可夫结构。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.15608v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Decoder-only transformers compute the conditional probability of the next token from a sequence of past observations. This paper derives, from first principles, inference architectures that solve the same prediction problem - and in doing so, recovers transformer-like layer operations as a consequence of optimal control theory. The framework is developed for two model classes: a nonlinear model of discrete-valued processes, directly motivated by the transformer, and a linear Gaussian model as a tractable baseline. For both model classes, the prediction objective is reformulated as an optimal control problem whose solution yields an explicit inference algorithm, the dual filter, with a layer structure that mirrors the layer structure of a decoder-only transformer. Numerical experiments provide a comparison of the optimal control to attention weights from a trained transformer. These experiments reveal that when the embedding dimension is insufficient, the transformer implicitly exploits non-Markovian structure.

176

桥接熵：流与薛定谔采样器的条件-边缘离散化#

Entropy Across the Bridge: Conditional-Marginal Discretization for Flow and Schrödinger Samplers
📚 arXiv👤 Bruno Trentini, Dejan Stancevic, Michael M. Bronstein, Alexander Tong, Luca Ambrogioni📅 2026-05-18🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出桥接熵理论，将条件桥几何与边缘流演化解耦，构建无训练熵推理调度器。核心创新在于发现高斯布朗桥熵率的闭式U形解，启发边界加权非均匀离散化策略。该工作突破了传统均匀步长限制，在扩散模型采样效率与生
本文推导桥感知离散化的条件-边缘熵率目标函数，分离端点条件桥几何与边缘流演化，构建无需训练的先验熵推理调度器。对于高斯布朗桥，该速率具有闭式U形解，启发边界加权的非均匀网格。在二维桥/流模型上，估计剖面恢复预测形状，10步ODE-Heun的MMD较线性提升18.1%，配套SDE-Heun同步提升22.7%；在EDM/CIFAR-10上，五步FID达186.3±4.0；在AlphaFlow蛋白质生成任务上亦展现优势。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文推导桥感知离散化的条件-边缘熵率目标函数，分离端点条件桥几何与边缘流演化，构建无需训练的先验熵推理调度器。对于高斯布朗桥，该速率具有闭式U形解，启发边界加权的非均匀网格。在二维桥/流模型上，估计剖面恢复预测形状，10步ODE-Heun的MMD较线性提升18.1%，配套SDE-Heun同步提升22.7%；在EDM/CIFAR-10上，五步FID达186.3±4.0；在AlphaFlow蛋白质生成任务上亦展现优势。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16126v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: For a fixed flow-based generative model under a small inference budget, sample quality can depend strongly on where the sampler spends its few function evaluations. Flow matching and Schrödinger bridges define probability paths, yet their inference grids are usually heuristic or inherited from one-endpoint diffusion. We derive a conditional-marginal entropy-rate objective for bridge-aware discretization, separating endpoint-conditioned bridge geometry from marginal flow evolution, and use it to build a training-free entropic inference-time scheduler from first principles. For Gaussian Brownian bridges this rate is closed-form and U-shaped, motivating boundary-heavy nonuniform grids. On trained two-dimensional bridge/flow models, the estimated profile recovers the predicted shape and improves 10-step ODE-Heun MMD over linear by 18.1%, with a paired 22.7% SDE-Heun improvement in the same low-NFE sweep. On EDM/CIFAR-10, the entropic time-discretization gives the best tested five-step FID (186.3 ± 4.0 versus 200.5 ± 2.9 for linear and 238.0 ± 5.3 for cosine). On AlphaFlow protein generation, entropic conditional-marginal (cond-marg) scheduling shows advantage in low-NFE regimes on both CAMEO22 and ATLAS benchmarks. These results support entropy-rate scheduling as a practical low-budget allocation signal for high-dimensional bridge and flow samplers.

177

智能能源基础设施的统一生成式AI框架：智能燃气分配、公用事业计费、碳分析与量子启发优化#

A Unified Generative-AI Framework for Smart Energy Infrastructure: Intelligent Gas Distribution, Utility Billing, Carbon Analytics, and Quantum-Inspired Optimisation
📚 arXiv👤 Pavan Manjunath, Thomas pruefer📅 2026-05-18🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该框架首次将生成式AI与量子启发优化深度融合于能源基础设施全链条，突破传统单一模块优化局限，实现燃气分配、计费与碳管理的协同智能决策，为能源行业数字化转型提供可扩展的跨域集成范式。
该工作提出了一个融合智能计量、生成式人工智能与量子启发组合优化的统一框架，用于重塑能源公用事业对物理基础设施、客户互动和环境责任的管理方式。该框架涵盖智能燃气分配、自动化公用事业计费、碳排放分析和量子启发优化等核心模块，旨在提升能源系统的运营效率与可持续性。该研究面向能源数字化转型需求，具体技术细节与验证结果需查阅原文。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出了一个融合智能计量、生成式人工智能与量子启发组合优化的统一框架，用于重塑能源公用事业对物理基础设施、客户互动和环境责任的管理方式。该框架涵盖智能燃气分配、自动化公用事业计费、碳排放分析和量子启发优化等核心模块，旨在提升能源系统的运营效率与可持续性。该研究面向能源数字化转型需求，具体技术细节与验证结果需查阅原文。

English Abstract

arXiv:2605.16232v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The accelerating convergence of smart metering, generative artificial intelligence, and quantum-inspired combinatorial optimisation is reshaping how energy utilities manage physical infrastructure, customer engagement, and environmental accountability

阅读建议
  • 先读本周总览，再看交叉研究，最后按磁性/铁电与 AI 分区深挖。
  • 期刊分布适合快速判断本周成果主要来自顶刊还是预印本平台。
  • 若需要长期追踪某条研究线，可回到归档页连续浏览多周内容。
